T1: ∏ (x : C) (xx : D x),
♯ FF (η x xx) ;; ε x (FF x xx) =
#?' id_disp (FF x xx)
x: C
yy: D' x
#? (#?' id_disp (GG x yy)) = ?b
C: category
D, D': disp_cat C
FF: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D D'
GG: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D' D
η: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D)
  (disp_functor_composite FF GG)
ε: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite GG FF)
  (disp_functor_identity D')
Hη: ∏ (x : C) (xx : D x),
is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso x) (η x xx)
Hε: ∏ (x : C) (xx : D' x),
is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso x) (ε x xx)
T1: ∏ (x : C) (xx : D x),
♯ FF (η x xx) ;; ε x (FF x xx) =
#?' id_disp (FF x xx)
x: C
yy: D' x
?b = #?' id_disp (GG x yy)
 
C: category
D, D': disp_cat C
FF: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D D'
GG: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D' D
η: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D)
  (disp_functor_composite FF GG)
ε: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite GG FF)
  (disp_functor_identity D')
Hη: ∏ (x : C) (xx : D x),
is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso x) (η x xx)
Hε: ∏ (x : C) (xx : D' x),
is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso x) (ε x xx)
T1: ∏ (x : C) (xx : D x),
♯ FF (η x xx) ;; ε x (FF x xx) =
#?' id_disp (FF x xx)
x: C
yy: D' x
#? id_disp (GG x yy) = #?' id_disp (GG x yy)

  
C: category
D, D': disp_cat C
FF: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D D'
GG: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D' D
η: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D)
  (disp_functor_composite FF GG)
ε: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite GG FF)
  (disp_functor_identity D')
Hη: ∏ (x : C) (xx : D x),
is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso x) (η x xx)
Hε: ∏ (x : C) (xx : D' x),
is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso x) (ε x xx)
T1: ∏ (x : C) (xx : D x),
♯ FF (η x xx) ;; ε x (FF x xx) =
#?' id_disp (FF x xx)
x: C
yy: D' x
#? id_disp (GG x yy) = #? id_disp (GG x yy)
 apply maponpaths_2, homset_property.
Qed.
(* TODO: [Qed.] takes about 30sec!  [etrans_dep] + [etrans_disp] make it shorter and more readable (see commit 7c1f411a), but make the typechecking time even worse. *)


C: category
D, D': disp_cat C
A: disp_adjunction_id_data D D'
E: form_equiv_over_id A
triangle_2_statement_over_id A
→ triangle_1_statement_over_id A


C: category
D, D': disp_cat C
A: disp_adjunction_id_data D D'
E: form_equiv_over_id A
triangle_2_statement_over_id A
→ triangle_1_statement_over_id A

  (* dual to previous lemma *)
Abort.

(* TODO: adjointification of a quasi-equivalence. *)

End EquivalencesOverId.

(**
 Being an equivalence is a proposition
 *)

C: category
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C
HF: disp_adjunction_id_data D₁ D₂
isaprop (form_equiv_over_id HF)


C: category
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C
HF: disp_adjunction_id_data D₁ D₂
isaprop (form_equiv_over_id HF)

  use isapropdirprod ; repeat (use impred ; intro) ; apply isaprop_is_z_iso_disp.
Qed.

(**
 Useful lemma
 *)

C: category
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C
LL: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂
HLL: is_equiv_over_id LL
x: C
xx: D₁ x
♯ LL
  (inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
     (is_z_iso_unit_over_id HLL x xx)) =
counit_over_id HLL x (LL x xx)


C: category
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C
LL: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂
HLL: is_equiv_over_id LL
x: C
xx: D₁ x
♯ LL
  (inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
     (is_z_iso_unit_over_id HLL x xx)) =
counit_over_id HLL x (LL x xx)

  
C: category
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C
LL: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂
HLL: is_equiv_over_id LL
x: C
xx: D₁ x
♯ LL
  (inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
     (is_z_iso_unit_over_id HLL x xx)) =
transportf
  (mor_disp
     (LL (functor_identity C x)
        (disp_functor_composite (pr1 (pr1 HLL))
           (pr1 (pr2 (pr1 HLL))) x xx))
     (LL (functor_identity C x)
        (disp_functor_identity D₁ x xx)))
  (id_left
     ((# (functor_identity C))%cat
        (inv_from_z_iso
           (identity_z_iso (functor_identity C x)))))
  (id_disp
     (LL (functor_identity C x)
        (disp_functor_composite (pr1 (pr1 HLL))
           (pr1 (pr2 (pr1 HLL))) x xx)) ;; counit_over_id
                                             HLL x
                                             (LL x xx))

  
C: category
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C
LL: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂
HLL: is_equiv_over_id LL
x: C
xx: D₁ x
♯ LL
  (inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
     (is_z_iso_unit_over_id HLL x xx)) =
transportf
  (mor_disp
     (LL (functor_identity C x)
        (disp_functor_composite (pr1 (pr1 HLL))
           (pr1 (pr2 (pr1 HLL))) x xx))
     (LL (functor_identity C x)
        (disp_functor_identity D₁ x xx)))
  (id_left
     ((# (functor_identity C))%cat
        (inv_from_z_iso
           (identity_z_iso (functor_identity C x)))))
  (transportf
     (λ z : C
            ⟦ functor_identity C
                (functor_identity C x),
            functor_identity C (functor_identity C x)
            ⟧,
      LL (functor_identity C x)
        (disp_functor_composite (pr1 (pr1 HLL))
           (pr1 (pr2 (pr1 HLL))) x xx) -->[
      z] LL (functor_identity C x)
           (disp_functor_composite (pr1 (pr1 HLL))
              (pr1 (pr2 (pr1 HLL))) x xx))
     (functor_id (functor_identity C)
        (functor_identity C x))
     (♯ LL
        (id_disp
           (disp_functor_composite (pr1 (pr1 HLL))
              (pr1 (pr2 (pr1 HLL))) x xx))) ;; counit_over_id
                                                 HLL x
                                                 (LL x
                                                 xx))

  
C: category
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C
LL: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂
HLL: is_equiv_over_id LL
x: C
xx: D₁ x
♯ LL
  (inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
     (is_z_iso_unit_over_id HLL x xx)) =
transportf
  (mor_disp
     (LL (functor_identity C x)
        (disp_functor_composite (pr1 (pr1 HLL))
           (pr1 (pr2 (pr1 HLL))) x xx))
     (LL (functor_identity C x)
        (disp_functor_identity D₁ x xx)))
  (id_left
     ((# (functor_identity C))%cat
        (inv_from_z_iso
           (identity_z_iso (functor_identity C x)))))
  (transportf
     (mor_disp
        (LL (functor_identity C x)
           (disp_functor_composite (pr1 (pr1 HLL))
              (pr1 (pr2 (pr1 HLL))) x xx))
        (LL (functor_identity C x)
           (disp_functor_identity D₁ x xx)))
     (cancel_postcomposition
        ((# (functor_identity C))%cat
           (identity (functor_identity C x)))
        (identity
           (functor_identity C (functor_identity C x)))
        ((# (functor_identity C))%cat
           (inv_from_z_iso
              (identity_z_iso (functor_identity C x))))
        (functor_id (functor_identity C)
           (functor_identity C x)))
     (♯ LL
        (id_disp
           (disp_functor_composite (pr1 (pr1 HLL))
              (pr1 (pr2 (pr1 HLL))) x xx)) ;; counit_over_id
                                                HLL x
                                                (LL x
                                                 xx)))

  
C: category
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C
LL: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂
HLL: is_equiv_over_id LL
x: C
xx: D₁ x
♯ LL
  (inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
     (is_z_iso_unit_over_id HLL x xx)) =
transportf
  (mor_disp
     (LL (functor_identity C x)
        (disp_functor_composite (pr1 (pr1 HLL))
           (pr1 (pr2 (pr1 HLL))) x xx))
     (LL (functor_identity C x)
        (disp_functor_identity D₁ x xx)))
  (cancel_postcomposition
     ((# (functor_identity C))%cat
        (identity (functor_identity C x)))
     (identity
        (functor_identity C (functor_identity C x)))
     ((# (functor_identity C))%cat
        (inv_from_z_iso
           (identity_z_iso (functor_identity C x))))
     (functor_id (functor_identity C)
        (functor_identity C x)) @
   id_left
     ((# (functor_identity C))%cat
        (inv_from_z_iso
           (identity_z_iso (functor_identity C x)))))
  (♯ LL
     (id_disp
        (disp_functor_composite (pr1 (pr1 HLL))
           (pr1 (pr2 (pr1 HLL))) x xx)) ;; counit_over_id
                                             HLL x

D₁, D₂: disp_cat C

xx: D₁ x
transportf
  (mor_disp
     (LL (functor_identity C x)
        (disp_functor_composite (pr1 (pr1 HLL))
           (pr1 (pr2 (pr1 HLL))) x xx))
     (LL (functor_identity C x)
        (disp_functor_identity D₁ x xx)))
  (cancel_postcomposition
     ((# (functor_identity C))%cat
        (identity (functor_identity C x)))
     (identity
        (functor_identity C (functor_identity C x)))
     ((# (functor_identity C))%cat
        (inv_from_z_iso
           (identity_z_iso (functor_identity C x))))
     (functor_id (functor_identity C)
        (functor_identity C x)) @
   id_left
     ((# (functor_identity C))%cat
        (inv_from_z_iso
           (identity_z_iso (functor_identity C x)))))
  (♯ LL
     (id_disp
        (disp_functor_composite (pr1 (pr1 HLL))
           (pr1 (pr2 (pr1 HLL))) x xx)) ;; counit_over_id
                                             HLL x
                                             (LL x xx)) =
♯ LL
  (inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
     (is_z_iso_unit_over_id HLL x xx))

     ((# (functor_identity C))%cat
        (inv_from_z_iso
           (identity_z_iso (functor_identity C x)))
      · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
          (identity_z_iso (functor_identity C x)))
     ((# (functor_identity C))%cat
        (inv_from_z_iso
           (identity_z_iso (functor_identity C x))
         · identity_z_iso (functor_identity C x)))
     ((# (functor_identity C))%cat
        (inv_from_z_iso
           (identity_z_iso (functor_identity C x))))
     (! functor_comp (functor_identity C)
          (inv_from_z_iso
             (identity_z_iso (functor_identity C x)))
          (identity_z_iso (functor_identity C x))) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     ((# (functor_identity C))%cat
        (inv_from_z_iso
           (identity_z_iso (functor_identity C x))
         · identity_z_iso (functor_identity C x)))
     ((# (functor_identity C))%cat
        (identity (functor_identity C x)))
     ((# (functor_identity C))%cat
        (inv_from_z_iso
           (identity_z_iso (functor_identity C x))))
     (maponpaths (# (functor_identity C))%cat
        (z_iso_after_z_iso_inv
           (identity_z_iso (functor_identity C x)))) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     ((# (functor_identity C))%cat
        (identity (functor_identity C x)))
     (identity
        (functor_identity C (functor_identity C x)))
     ((# (functor_identity C))%cat
        (inv_from_z_iso
           (identity_z_iso (functor_identity C x))))
     (functor_id (functor_identity C)
        (functor_identity C x)) @
   id_left
     ((# (functor_identity C))%cat
        (inv_from_z_iso
           (identity_z_iso (functor_identity C x)))))
  (transportf
     (mor_disp
        (LL (functor_identity C x)
           (disp_functor_composite (pr1 (pr1 HLL))
              (pr1 (pr2 (pr1 HLL))) x xx))
        (LL (functor_identity C x)
           (disp_functor_identity D₁ x xx)))
     (assoc
        ((# (functor_identity C))%cat
           (inv_from_z_iso
              (identity_z_iso (functor_identity C x))))
        ((# (functor_identity C))%cat
           (identity_z_iso (functor_identity C x)))
        ((# (functor_identity C))%cat
           (inv_from_z_iso
              (identity_z_iso (functor_identity C x)))))
     (♯ LL
        (inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
           (is_z_iso_unit_over_id HLL x xx)) ;; (♯ LL
                                                 (unit_over_id
                                                 (pr1
                                                 HLL)
                                                 x xx) ;; 
                                                 counit_over_id
                                                 HLL x
                                                 (LL x
                                                 xx)))) =
♯ LL

     (is_z_iso_unit_over_id HLL x xx))

        (identity_z_iso (functor_identity C x)))
     ((# (functor_identity C))%cat
        (inv_from_z_iso
           (identity_z_iso (functor_identity C x)))) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     ((# (functor_identity C))%cat
        (inv_from_z_iso
           (identity_z_iso (functor_identity C x)))
      · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
          (identity_z_iso (functor_identity C x)))
     ((# (functor_identity C))%cat
        (inv_from_z_iso
           (identity_z_iso (functor_identity C x))
         · identity_z_iso (functor_identity C x)))
     ((# (functor_identity C))%cat
        (inv_from_z_iso
           (identity_z_iso (functor_identity C x))))
     (! functor_comp (functor_identity C)
          (inv_from_z_iso
             (identity_z_iso (functor_identity C x)))
          (identity_z_iso (functor_identity C x))) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     ((# (functor_identity C))%cat
        (inv_from_z_iso
           (identity_z_iso (functor_identity C x))
         · identity_z_iso (functor_identity C x)))
     ((# (functor_identity C))%cat
        (identity (functor_identity C x)))
     ((# (functor_identity C))%cat
        (inv_from_z_iso
           (identity_z_iso (functor_identity C x))))
     (maponpaths (# (functor_identity C))%cat
        (z_iso_after_z_iso_inv
           (identity_z_iso (functor_identity C x)))) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     ((# (functor_identity C))%cat
        (identity (functor_identity C x)))
     (identity
        (functor_identity C (functor_identity C x)))
     ((# (functor_identity C))%cat
        (inv_from_z_iso
           (identity_z_iso (functor_identity C x))))
     (functor_id (functor_identity C)
        (functor_identity C x)) @
   id_left
     ((# (functor_identity C))%cat
        (inv_from_z_iso
           (identity_z_iso (functor_identity C x)))))
  (♯ LL
     (inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
        (is_z_iso_unit_over_id HLL x xx)) ;; id_disp
                                               (pr1
                                                 HLL
                                                 (functor_identity
                                                 C x)
                                                 (disp_functor_identity
                                                 D₁ x
                                                 xx))) =
♯ LL
  (inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
     (is_z_iso_unit_over_id HLL x xx))

  
C: category
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C
LL: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂
HLL: is_equiv_over_id LL
x: C
xx: D₁ x
transportf
  (mor_disp
     (LL (functor_identity C x)
        (disp_functor_composite (pr1 (pr1 HLL))
           (pr1 (pr2 (pr1 HLL))) x xx))
     (pr1 HLL (functor_identity C x)
        (disp_functor_identity D₁ x xx)))
  (maponpaths
     (compose
        ((# (functor_identity C))%cat
           (inv_from_z_iso
              (identity_z_iso (functor_identity C x)))))
     (! id_left
          (identity
             (functor_identity C
                (functor_identity C x)))) @
   assoc
     ((# (functor_identity C))%cat
        (inv_from_z_iso
           (identity_z_iso (functor_identity C x))))
     ((# (functor_identity C))%cat
        (identity_z_iso (functor_identity C x)))
     ((# (functor_identity C))%cat
        (inv_from_z_iso
           (identity_z_iso (functor_identity C x)))) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     ((# (functor_identity C))%cat
        (inv_from_z_iso
           (identity_z_iso (functor_identity C x)))
      · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
          (identity_z_iso (functor_identity C x)))
     ((# (functor_identity C))%cat
        (inv_from_z_iso
           (identity_z_iso (functor_identity C x))
         · identity_z_iso (functor_identity C x)))
     ((# (functor_identity C))%cat
        (inv_from_z_iso
           (identity_z_iso (functor_identity C x))))
     (! functor_comp (functor_identity C)
          (inv_from_z_iso
             (identity_z_iso (functor_identity C x)))
          (identity_z_iso (functor_identity C x))) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     ((# (functor_identity C))%cat
        (inv_from_z_iso
           (identity_z_iso (functor_identity C x))
         · identity_z_iso (functor_identity C x)))
     ((# (functor_identity C))%cat
        (identity (functor_identity C x)))
     ((# (functor_identity C))%cat
        (inv_from_z_iso
           (identity_z_iso (functor_identity C x))))
     (maponpaths (# (functor_identity C))%cat
        (z_iso_after_z_iso_inv
           (identity_z_iso (functor_identity C x)))) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     ((# (functor_identity C))%cat
        (identity (functor_identity C x)))
     (identity
        (functor_identity C (functor_identity C x)))
     ((# (functor_identity C))%cat
        (inv_from_z_iso
           (identity_z_iso (functor_identity C x))))
     (functor_id (functor_identity C)
        (functor_identity C x)) @
   id_left
     ((# (functor_identity C))%cat
        (inv_from_z_iso
           (identity_z_iso (functor_identity C x)))))
  (transportb
     (mor_disp
        (LL (functor_identity C x)
           (disp_functor_composite (pr1 (pr1 HLL))
              (pr1 (pr2 (pr1 HLL))) x xx))
        (pr1 HLL (functor_identity C x)
           (disp_functor_identity D₁ x xx)))
     (id_right
        ((# (functor_identity C))%cat
           (inv_from_z_iso
              (identity_z_iso (functor_identity C x)))))
     (♯ LL
        (inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
           (is_z_iso_unit_over_id HLL x xx)))) =
♯ LL
  (inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
     (is_z_iso_unit_over_id HLL x xx))

  
C: category
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C
LL: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂
HLL: is_equiv_over_id LL
x: C
xx: D₁ x
transportf
  (mor_disp
     (LL (functor_identity C x)
        (disp_functor_composite (pr1 (pr1 HLL))
           (pr1 (pr2 (pr1 HLL))) x xx))
     (pr1 HLL (functor_identity C x)
        (disp_functor_identity D₁ x xx)))
  (maponpaths
     (compose
        ((# (functor_identity C))%cat
           (inv_from_z_iso
              (identity_z_iso (functor_identity C x)))))
     (! id_left
          (identity
             (functor_identity C
                (functor_identity C x)))) @
   assoc
     ((# (functor_identity C))%cat
        (inv_from_z_iso
           (identity_z_iso (functor_identity C x))))
     ((# (functor_identity C))%cat
        (identity_z_iso (functor_identity C x)))
     ((# (functor_identity C))%cat

           (identity_z_iso (functor_identity C x)))) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     ((# (functor_identity C))%cat
        (inv_from_z_iso
           (identity_z_iso (functor_identity C x)))
      · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
          (identity_z_iso (functor_identity C x)))
     ((# (functor_identity C))%cat

           (identity_z_iso (functor_identity C x))
         · identity_z_iso (functor_identity C x)))
     ((# (functor_identity C))%cat

     (! functor_comp (functor_identity C)
          (inv_from_z_iso

          (identity_z_iso (functor_identity C x))) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     ((# (functor_identity C))%cat
        (inv_from_z_iso

     ((# (functor_identity C))%cat

     (maponpaths (# (functor_identity C))%cat

   cancel_postcomposition
     ((# (functor_identity C))%cat

     ((# (functor_identity C))%cat

  (transportf
     (mor_disp
        (LL (functor_identity C x)
           (disp_functor_composite (pr1 (pr1 HLL))
              (pr1 (pr2 (pr1 HLL))) x xx))
        (pr1 HLL (functor_identity C x)
           (disp_functor_identity D₁ x xx)))
     (! id_right
          ((# (functor_identity C))%cat
             (inv_from_z_iso

     (♯ LL

           (is_z_iso_unit_over_id HLL x xx)))) =
♯ LL

     (is_z_iso_unit_over_id HLL x xx))

  
C: category
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C
LL: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂
HLL: is_equiv_over_id LL
x: C
xx: D₁ x
transportf
  (mor_disp
     (LL (functor_identity C x)
        (disp_functor_composite (pr1 (pr1 HLL))
           (pr1 (pr2 (pr1 HLL))) x xx))
     (pr1 HLL (functor_identity C x)
        (disp_functor_identity D₁ x xx)))
  (! id_right
       ((# (functor_identity C))%cat
          (inv_from_z_iso
             (identity_z_iso (functor_identity C x)))) @
   maponpaths
     (compose
        ((# (functor_identity C))%cat
           (inv_from_z_iso
              (identity_z_iso (functor_identity C x)))))
     (! id_left
          (identity
             (functor_identity C
                (functor_identity C x)))) @
   assoc
     ((# (functor_identity C))%cat
        (inv_from_z_iso
           (identity_z_iso (functor_identity C x))))
     ((# (functor_identity C))%cat
        (identity_z_iso (functor_identity C x)))
     ((# (functor_identity C))%cat
        (inv_from_z_iso
           (identity_z_iso (functor_identity C x)))) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     ((# (functor_identity C))%cat
        (inv_from_z_iso
           (identity_z_iso (functor_identity C x)))
      · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
          (identity_z_iso (functor_identity C x)))
     ((# (functor_identity C))%cat
        (inv_from_z_iso
           (identity_z_iso (functor_identity C x))
         · identity_z_iso (functor_identity C x)))
     ((# (functor_identity C))%cat
        (inv_from_z_iso
           (identity_z_iso (functor_identity C x))))
     (! functor_comp (functor_identity C)
          (inv_from_z_iso
             (identity_z_iso (functor_identity C x)))
          (identity_z_iso (functor_identity C x))) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     ((# (functor_identity C))%cat
        (inv_from_z_iso
           (identity_z_iso (functor_identity C x))
         · identity_z_iso (functor_identity C x)))
     ((# (functor_identity C))%cat
        (identity (functor_identity C x)))
     ((# (functor_identity C))%cat
        (inv_from_z_iso
           (identity_z_iso (functor_identity C x))))
     (maponpaths (# (functor_identity C))%cat
        (z_iso_after_z_iso_inv
           (identity_z_iso (functor_identity C x)))) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     ((# (functor_identity C))%cat
        (identity (functor_identity C x)))
     (identity
        (functor_identity C (functor_identity C x)))
     ((# (functor_identity C))%cat
        (inv_from_z_iso
           (identity_z_iso (functor_identity C x))))
     (functor_id (functor_identity C)
        (functor_identity C x)) @
   id_left
     ((# (functor_identity C))%cat
        (inv_from_z_iso
           (identity_z_iso (functor_identity C x)))))
  (♯ LL
     (inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
        (is_z_iso_unit_over_id HLL x xx))) =
♯ LL
  (inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
     (is_z_iso_unit_over_id HLL x xx))

  
C: category
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C
LL: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂
HLL: is_equiv_over_id LL
x: C
xx: D₁ x
isaset
  (C ⟦ functor_identity C (functor_identity C x),
   functor_identity C (functor_identity C x) ⟧)

  apply homset_property.
Qed.

(** * Constructions on and of displayed equivalences over identity *)

(** ** Full + faithful + ess split => equivalence *)
Section Equiv_from_ff_plus_ess_split.
(* TODO: consider naming throughout this section!  Especially: anything with [ses] should be fixed. *)

Context {C : category} {D' D : disp_cat C}
        (FF : disp_functor (functor_identity _) D' D)
        (FF_split : disp_functor_disp_ess_split_surj FF)
        (FF_ff : disp_functor_ff FF).

(** *** Utility lemmas from fullness+faithfulness *)

(* TODO: inline throughout? *)
Let FFweq {x y} xx yy (f : x --> y) := disp_functor_ff_weq _ FF_ff xx yy f.
Let FFinv {x y} {xx} {yy} {f}
  := @disp_functor_ff_inv _ _ _ _ _ _ FF_ff x y xx yy f.

(* TODO: once [disp_functor_ff_transportf_gen] is done, replace this with that. *)

C: category
D', D: disp_cat C
FF: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D' D
FF_split: disp_functor_disp_ess_split_surj FF
FF_ff: disp_functor_ff FF
FFweq:= λ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
disp_functor_ff_weq FF FF_ff xx yy f: ∏ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
xx -->[ f] yy
≃ FF x xx -->[
  (# (functor_identity C))%cat f] 
  FF y yy
FFinv:= λ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
disp_functor_ff_inv FF FF_ff: ∏ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
FF x xx -->[
(# (functor_identity C))%cat f] 
FF y yy → xx -->[ f] yy
x, y: C
f, f': C ⟦ x, y ⟧
e: f = f'
xx: D' x
yy: D' y
ff: FF x xx -->[ f] FF y yy
FFinv (transportf (mor_disp (FF x xx) (FF y yy)) e ff) =
transportf (mor_disp xx yy) e (FFinv ff)


C: category
D', D: disp_cat C
FF: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D' D
FF_split: disp_functor_disp_ess_split_surj FF
FF_ff: disp_functor_ff FF
FFweq:= λ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
disp_functor_ff_weq FF FF_ff xx yy f: ∏ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
xx -->[ f] yy
≃ FF x xx -->[
  (# (functor_identity C))%cat f] 
  FF y yy
FFinv:= λ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
disp_functor_ff_inv FF FF_ff: ∏ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
FF x xx -->[
(# (functor_identity C))%cat f] 
FF y yy → xx -->[ f] yy
x, y: C
f, f': C ⟦ x, y ⟧
e: f = f'
xx: D' x
yy: D' y
ff: FF x xx -->[ f] FF y yy
FFinv (transportf (mor_disp (FF x xx) (FF y yy)) e ff) =
transportf (mor_disp xx yy) e (FFinv ff)

  
C: category
D', D: disp_cat C
FF: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D' D
FF_split: disp_functor_disp_ess_split_surj FF
FF_ff: disp_functor_ff FF
FFweq:= λ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
disp_functor_ff_weq FF FF_ff xx yy f: ∏ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
xx -->[ f] yy
≃ FF x xx -->[
  (# (functor_identity C))%cat f] 
  FF y yy
FFinv:= λ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
disp_functor_ff_inv FF FF_ff: ∏ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
FF x xx -->[
(# (functor_identity C))%cat f] 
FF y yy → xx -->[ f] yy
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D' x
yy: D' y
ff: FF x xx -->[ f] FF y yy
FFinv
  (transportf (mor_disp (FF x xx) (FF y yy))
     (idpath f) ff) =
transportf (mor_disp xx yy) (idpath f) (FFinv ff)
 apply idpath.
Qed.


C: category
D', D: disp_cat C
FF: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D' D
FF_split: disp_functor_disp_ess_split_surj FF
FF_ff: disp_functor_ff FF
FFweq:= λ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
disp_functor_ff_weq FF FF_ff xx yy f: ∏ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
xx -->[ f] yy
≃ FF x xx -->[
  (# (functor_identity C))%cat f] 
  FF y yy
FFinv:= λ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
disp_functor_ff_inv FF FF_ff: ∏ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
FF x xx -->[
(# (functor_identity C))%cat f] 
FF y yy → xx -->[ f] yy
x, y: C
xx: D' x
yy: D' y
f: z_iso x y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
isiso: is_z_iso_disp f (♯ FF ff)
is_z_iso_disp f ff


C: category
D', D: disp_cat C
FF: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D' D
FF_split: disp_functor_disp_ess_split_surj FF
FF_ff: disp_functor_ff FF
FFweq:= λ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
disp_functor_ff_weq FF FF_ff xx yy f: ∏ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
xx -->[ f] yy
≃ FF x xx -->[
  (# (functor_identity C))%cat f] 
  FF y yy
FFinv:= λ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
disp_functor_ff_inv FF FF_ff: ∏ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
FF x xx -->[
(# (functor_identity C))%cat f] 
FF y yy → xx -->[ f] yy
x, y: C
xx: D' x
yy: D' y
f: z_iso x y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
isiso: is_z_iso_disp f (♯ FF ff)
is_z_iso_disp f ff

  
C: category
D', D: disp_cat C
FF: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D' D
FF_split: disp_functor_disp_ess_split_surj FF
FF_ff: disp_functor_ff FF
FFweq:= λ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
disp_functor_ff_weq FF FF_ff xx yy f: ∏ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
xx -->[ f] yy
≃ FF x xx -->[
  (# (functor_identity C))%cat f] 
  FF y yy
FFinv:= λ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
disp_functor_ff_inv FF FF_ff: ∏ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
FF x xx -->[
(# (functor_identity C))%cat f] 
FF y yy → xx -->[ f] yy
x, y: C
xx: D' x
yy: D' y
f: z_iso x y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
isiso: is_z_iso_disp f (♯ FF ff)
is_z_iso_disp
  (functor_on_z_iso (functor_identity C) f) (♯ FF ff)

  exact (disp_functor_on_is_z_iso_disp (disp_functor_identity _) isiso).
Qed.


C: category
D', D: disp_cat C
FF: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D' D
FF_split: disp_functor_disp_ess_split_surj FF
FF_ff: disp_functor_ff FF
FFweq:= λ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
disp_functor_ff_weq FF FF_ff xx yy f: ∏ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
xx -->[ f] yy
≃ FF x xx -->[
  (# (functor_identity C))%cat f] 
  FF y yy
FFinv:= λ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
disp_functor_ff_inv FF FF_ff: ∏ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
FF x xx -->[
(# (functor_identity C))%cat f] 
FF y yy → xx -->[ f] yy
x, y: C
xx: D' x
yy: D' y
f: z_iso x y
ff: FF x xx -->[ f] FF y yy
Hff: is_z_iso_disp f ff
is_z_iso_disp f (FFinv ff)


C: category
D', D: disp_cat C
FF: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D' D
FF_split: disp_functor_disp_ess_split_surj FF
FF_ff: disp_functor_ff FF
FFweq:= λ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
disp_functor_ff_weq FF FF_ff xx yy f: ∏ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
xx -->[ f] yy
≃ FF x xx -->[
  (# (functor_identity C))%cat f] 
  FF y yy
FFinv:= λ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
disp_functor_ff_inv FF FF_ff: ∏ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
FF x xx -->[
(# (functor_identity C))%cat f] 
FF y yy → xx -->[ f] yy
x, y: C
xx: D' x
yy: D' y
f: z_iso x y
ff: FF x xx -->[ f] FF y yy
Hff: is_z_iso_disp f ff
is_z_iso_disp f (FFinv ff)

  
C: category
D', D: disp_cat C
FF: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D' D
FF_split: disp_functor_disp_ess_split_surj FF
FF_ff: disp_functor_ff FF
FFweq:= λ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
disp_functor_ff_weq FF FF_ff xx yy f: ∏ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
xx -->[ f] yy
≃ FF x xx -->[
  (# (functor_identity C))%cat f] 
  FF y yy
FFinv:= λ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
disp_functor_ff_inv FF FF_ff: ∏ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
FF x xx -->[
(# (functor_identity C))%cat f] 
FF y yy → xx -->[ f] yy
x, y: C
xx: D' x
yy: D' y
f: z_iso x y
ff: FF x xx -->[ f] FF y yy
Hff: is_z_iso_disp f ff
is_z_iso_disp f (♯ FF (FFinv ff))

  
C: category
D', D: disp_cat C
FF: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D' D
FF_split: disp_functor_disp_ess_split_surj FF
FF_ff: disp_functor_ff FF
FFweq:= λ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
disp_functor_ff_weq FF FF_ff xx yy f: ∏ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
xx -->[ f] yy
≃ FF x xx -->[
  (# (functor_identity C))%cat f] 
  FF y yy
FFinv:= λ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
disp_functor_ff_inv FF FF_ff: ∏ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
FF x xx -->[
(# (functor_identity C))%cat f] 
FF y yy → xx -->[ f] yy
x, y: C
xx: D' x
yy: D' y
f: z_iso x y
ff: FF x xx -->[ f] FF y yy
Hff: is_z_iso_disp f ff
ff = ♯ FF (FFinv ff)

  
C: category
D', D: disp_cat C
FF: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D' D
FF_split: disp_functor_disp_ess_split_surj FF
FF_ff: disp_functor_ff FF
FFweq:= λ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
disp_functor_ff_weq FF FF_ff xx yy f: ∏ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
xx -->[ f] yy
≃ FF x xx -->[
  (# (functor_identity C))%cat f] 
  FF y yy
FFinv:= λ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
disp_functor_ff_inv FF FF_ff: ∏ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
FF x xx -->[
(# (functor_identity C))%cat f] 
FF y yy → xx -->[ f] yy
x, y: C
xx: D' x
yy: D' y
f: z_iso x y
ff: FF x xx -->[ f] FF y yy
Hff: is_z_iso_disp f ff
♯ FF (FFinv ff) = ff
 use homotweqinvweq.
Qed.

(** *** Converse functor *)

(* TODO: does [Local Definition] actually keep it local?  It seems not — e.g. [Print GG_data] still works after the section closes. Is there a way to actually keep them local?  If not, find less generic names for [GG] and its components. *)

C: category
D', D: disp_cat C
FF: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D' D
FF_split: disp_functor_disp_ess_split_surj FF
FF_ff: disp_functor_ff FF
FFweq:= λ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
disp_functor_ff_weq FF FF_ff xx yy f: ∏ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
xx -->[ f] yy
≃ FF x xx -->[
  (# (functor_identity C))%cat f] 
  FF y yy
FFinv:= λ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
disp_functor_ff_inv FF FF_ff: ∏ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
FF x xx -->[
(# (functor_identity C))%cat f] 
FF y yy → xx -->[ f] yy
disp_functor_data (functor_identity C) D D'


C: category
D', D: disp_cat C
FF: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D' D
FF_split: disp_functor_disp_ess_split_surj FF
FF_ff: disp_functor_ff FF
FFweq:= λ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
disp_functor_ff_weq FF FF_ff xx yy f: ∏ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
xx -->[ f] yy
≃ FF x xx -->[
  (# (functor_identity C))%cat f] 
  FF y yy
FFinv:= λ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
disp_functor_ff_inv FF FF_ff: ∏ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
FF x xx -->[
(# (functor_identity C))%cat f] 
FF y yy → xx -->[ f] yy
disp_functor_data (functor_identity C) D D'

  
C: category
D', D: disp_cat C
FF: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D' D
FF_split: disp_functor_disp_ess_split_surj FF
FF_ff: disp_functor_ff FF
FFweq:= λ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
disp_functor_ff_weq FF FF_ff xx yy f: ∏ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
xx -->[ f] yy
≃ FF x xx -->[
  (# (functor_identity C))%cat f] 
  FF y yy
FFinv:= λ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
disp_functor_ff_inv FF FF_ff: ∏ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
FF x xx -->[
(# (functor_identity C))%cat f] 
FF y yy → xx -->[ f] yy
∏ x : C, D x → D' (functor_identity C x)
C: category
D', D: disp_cat C
FF: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D' D
FF_split: disp_functor_disp_ess_split_surj FF
FF_ff: disp_functor_ff FF
FFweq:= λ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
disp_functor_ff_weq FF FF_ff xx yy f: ∏ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
xx -->[ f] yy
≃ FF x xx -->[
  (# (functor_identity C))%cat f] 
  FF y yy
FFinv:= λ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
disp_functor_ff_inv FF FF_ff: ∏ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
FF x xx -->[
(# (functor_identity C))%cat f] 
FF y yy → xx -->[ f] yy
(λ Fob : ∏ x : C, D x → D' (functor_identity C x),
 ∏ (x y : C) (xx : D x) 
 (yy : D y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
 xx -->[ f] yy
 → Fob x xx -->[
   (# (functor_identity C))%cat f] 
   Fob y yy) ?pr1

  
C: category
D', D: disp_cat C
FF: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D' D
FF_split: disp_functor_disp_ess_split_surj FF
FF_ff: disp_functor_ff FF
FFweq:= λ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
disp_functor_ff_weq FF FF_ff xx yy f: ∏ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
xx -->[ f] yy
≃ FF x xx -->[
  (# (functor_identity C))%cat f] 
  FF y yy
FFinv:= λ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
disp_functor_ff_inv FF FF_ff: ∏ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
FF x xx -->[
(# (functor_identity C))%cat f] 
FF y yy → xx -->[ f] yy
∏ x : C, D x → D' (functor_identity C x)
 
C: category
D', D: disp_cat C
FF: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D' D
FF_split: disp_functor_disp_ess_split_surj FF
FF_ff: disp_functor_ff FF
FFweq:= λ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
disp_functor_ff_weq FF FF_ff xx yy f: ∏ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
xx -->[ f] yy
≃ FF x xx -->[
  (# (functor_identity C))%cat f] 
  FF y yy
FFinv:= λ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
disp_functor_ff_inv FF FF_ff: ∏ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
FF x xx -->[
(# (functor_identity C))%cat f] 
FF y yy → xx -->[ f] yy
x: C
xx: D x
D' (functor_identity C x)
 exact (pr1 (FF_split x xx)).
  
C: category
D', D: disp_cat C
FF: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D' D
FF_split: disp_functor_disp_ess_split_surj FF
FF_ff: disp_functor_ff FF
FFweq:= λ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
disp_functor_ff_weq FF FF_ff xx yy f: ∏ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
xx -->[ f] yy
≃ FF x xx -->[
  (# (functor_identity C))%cat f] 
  FF y yy
FFinv:= λ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
disp_functor_ff_inv FF FF_ff: ∏ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
FF x xx -->[
(# (functor_identity C))%cat f] 
FF y yy → xx -->[ f] yy
(λ Fob : ∏ x : C, D x → D' (functor_identity C x),
 ∏ (x y : C) (xx : D x) (yy : D y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
 xx -->[ f] yy
 → Fob x xx -->[
   (# (functor_identity C))%cat f] Fob y yy)
  (λ (x : C) (xx : D x), pr1 (FF_split x xx))
 
C: category
D', D: disp_cat C
FF: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D' D
FF_split: disp_functor_disp_ess_split_surj FF
FF_ff: disp_functor_ff FF
FFweq:= λ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
disp_functor_ff_weq FF FF_ff xx yy f: ∏ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
xx -->[ f] yy
≃ FF x xx -->[
  (# (functor_identity C))%cat f] 
  FF y yy
FFinv:= λ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
disp_functor_ff_inv FF FF_ff: ∏ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
FF x xx -->[
(# (functor_identity C))%cat f] 
FF y yy → xx -->[ f] yy
x, y: C
xx: D x
yy: D y
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
pr1 (FF_split x xx) -->[ f] pr1 (FF_split y yy)

    
C: category
D', D: disp_cat C
FF: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D' D
FF_split: disp_functor_disp_ess_split_surj FF
FF_ff: disp_functor_ff FF
FFweq:= λ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
disp_functor_ff_weq FF FF_ff xx yy f: ∏ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
xx -->[ f] yy
≃ FF x xx -->[
  (# (functor_identity C))%cat f] 
  FF y yy
FFinv:= λ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
disp_functor_ff_inv FF FF_ff: ∏ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
FF x xx -->[
(# (functor_identity C))%cat f] 
FF y yy → xx -->[ f] yy
x, y: C
xx: D x
yy: D y
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
Hxx:= FF_split x xx: ∑ yy : D' x,
z_iso_disp
  (identity_z_iso (functor_identity C x))
  (FF x yy) xx
pr1 Hxx -->[ f] pr1 (FF_split y yy)

    
C: category
D', D: disp_cat C
FF: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D' D
FF_split: disp_functor_disp_ess_split_surj FF
FF_ff: disp_functor_ff FF
FFweq:= λ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
disp_functor_ff_weq FF FF_ff xx yy f: ∏ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
xx -->[ f] yy
≃ FF x xx -->[
  (# (functor_identity C))%cat f] 
  FF y yy
FFinv:= λ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
disp_functor_ff_inv FF FF_ff: ∏ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
FF x xx -->[
(# (functor_identity C))%cat f] 
FF y yy → xx -->[ f] yy
x, y: C
xx: D x
yy: D y
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
Hxx:= FF_split x xx: ∑ yy : D' x,
z_iso_disp
  (identity_z_iso (functor_identity C x))
  (FF x yy) xx
Hyy:= FF_split y yy: ∑ yy0 : D' y,
z_iso_disp
  (identity_z_iso (functor_identity C y))
  (FF y yy0) yy
pr1 Hxx -->[ f] pr1 Hyy

    
C: category
D', D: disp_cat C
FF: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D' D
FF_split: disp_functor_disp_ess_split_surj FF
FF_ff: disp_functor_ff FF
FFweq:= λ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
disp_functor_ff_weq FF FF_ff xx yy f: ∏ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
xx -->[ f] yy
≃ FF x xx -->[
  (# (functor_identity C))%cat f] 
  FF y yy
FFinv:= λ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
disp_functor_ff_inv FF FF_ff: ∏ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
FF x xx -->[
(# (functor_identity C))%cat f] 
FF y yy → xx -->[ f] yy
x, y: C
xx: D x
yy: D y
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
Hxx:= FF_split x xx: ∑ yy : D' x,
z_iso_disp
  (identity_z_iso (functor_identity C x))
  (FF x yy) xx
Hyy:= FF_split y yy: ∑ yy0 : D' y,
z_iso_disp
  (identity_z_iso (functor_identity C y))
  (FF y yy0) yy
FF x (pr1 Hxx) -->[
(# (functor_identity C))%cat f] FF y (pr1 Hyy)

    
C: category
D', D: disp_cat C
FF: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D' D
FF_split: disp_functor_disp_ess_split_surj FF
FF_ff: disp_functor_ff FF
FFweq:= λ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
disp_functor_ff_weq FF FF_ff xx yy f: ∏ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
xx -->[ f] yy
≃ FF x xx -->[
  (# (functor_identity C))%cat f] 
  FF y yy
FFinv:= λ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
disp_functor_ff_inv FF FF_ff: ∏ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
FF x xx -->[
(# (functor_identity C))%cat f] 
FF y yy → xx -->[ f] yy
x, y: C
xx: D x
yy: D y
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
Hxx:= FF_split x xx: ∑ yy : D' x,
z_iso_disp
  (identity_z_iso (functor_identity C x))
  (FF x yy) xx
Hyy:= FF_split y yy: ∑ yy0 : D' y,
z_iso_disp
  (identity_z_iso (functor_identity C y))
  (FF y yy0) yy
?Goal = (# (functor_identity C))%cat f
C: category
D', D: disp_cat C
FF: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D' D
FF_split: disp_functor_disp_ess_split_surj FF
FF_ff: disp_functor_ff FF
FFweq:= λ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
disp_functor_ff_weq FF FF_ff xx yy f: ∏ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
xx -->[ f] yy
≃ FF x xx -->[
  (# (functor_identity C))%cat f] 
  FF y yy
FFinv:= λ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
disp_functor_ff_inv FF FF_ff: ∏ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
FF x xx -->[
(# (functor_identity C))%cat f] 
FF y yy → xx -->[ f] yy
x, y: C
xx: D x
yy: D y
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
Hxx:= FF_split x xx: ∑ yy : D' x,
z_iso_disp
  (identity_z_iso (functor_identity C x))
  (FF x yy) xx
Hyy:= FF_split y yy: ∑ yy0 : D' y,
z_iso_disp
  (identity_z_iso (functor_identity C y))
  (FF y yy0) yy
FF x (pr1 Hxx) -->[ ?Goal] FF y (pr1 Hyy)

    
C: category
D', D: disp_cat C
FF: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D' D
FF_split: disp_functor_disp_ess_split_surj FF
FF_ff: disp_functor_ff FF
FFweq:= λ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
disp_functor_ff_weq FF FF_ff xx yy f: ∏ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
xx -->[ f] yy
≃ FF x xx -->[
  (# (functor_identity C))%cat f] 
  FF y yy
FFinv:= λ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
disp_functor_ff_inv FF FF_ff: ∏ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
FF x xx -->[
(# (functor_identity C))%cat f] 
FF y yy → xx -->[ f] yy
x, y: C
xx: D x
yy: D y
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
Hxx:= FF_split x xx: ∑ yy : D' x,
z_iso_disp
  (identity_z_iso (functor_identity C x))
  (FF x yy) xx
Hyy:= FF_split y yy: ∑ yy0 : D' y,
z_iso_disp
  (identity_z_iso (functor_identity C y))
  (FF y yy0) yy
identity_z_iso (functor_identity C x) · f
· inv_from_z_iso
    (identity_z_iso (functor_identity C y)) =
(# (functor_identity C))%cat f

    
C: category
D', D: disp_cat C
FF: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D' D
FF_split: disp_functor_disp_ess_split_surj FF
FF_ff: disp_functor_ff FF
FFweq:= λ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
disp_functor_ff_weq FF FF_ff xx yy f: ∏ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
xx -->[ f] yy
≃ FF x xx -->[
  (# (functor_identity C))%cat f] 
  FF y yy
FFinv:= λ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
disp_functor_ff_inv FF FF_ff: ∏ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
FF x xx -->[
(# (functor_identity C))%cat f] 
FF y yy → xx -->[ f] yy
x, y: C
xx: D x
yy: D y
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
Hxx:= FF_split x xx: ∑ yy : D' x,
z_iso_disp
  (identity_z_iso (functor_identity C x))
  (FF x yy) xx
Hyy:= FF_split y yy: ∑ yy0 : D' y,
z_iso_disp
  (identity_z_iso (functor_identity C y))
  (FF y yy0) yy
identity x · f · identity y = f
 
C: category
D', D: disp_cat C
FF: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D' D
FF_split: disp_functor_disp_ess_split_surj FF
FF_ff: disp_functor_ff FF
FFweq:= λ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
disp_functor_ff_weq FF FF_ff xx yy f: ∏ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
xx -->[ f] yy
≃ FF x xx -->[
  (# (functor_identity C))%cat f] 
  FF y yy
FFinv:= λ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
disp_functor_ff_inv FF FF_ff: ∏ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
FF x xx -->[
(# (functor_identity C))%cat f] 
FF y yy → xx -->[ f] yy
x, y: C
xx: D x
yy: D y
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
Hxx:= FF_split x xx: ∑ yy : D' x,
z_iso_disp
  (identity_z_iso (functor_identity C x))
  (FF x yy) xx
Hyy:= FF_split y yy: ∑ yy0 : D' y,
z_iso_disp
  (identity_z_iso (functor_identity C y))
  (FF y yy0) yy
identity x · f · identity y = ?b
C: category
D', D: disp_cat C
FF: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D' D
FF_split: disp_functor_disp_ess_split_surj FF
FF_ff: disp_functor_ff FF
FFweq:= λ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
disp_functor_ff_weq FF FF_ff xx yy f: ∏ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
xx -->[ f] yy
≃ FF x xx -->[
  (# (functor_identity C))%cat f] 
  FF y yy
FFinv:= λ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
disp_functor_ff_inv FF FF_ff: ∏ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
FF x xx -->[
(# (functor_identity C))%cat f] 
FF y yy → xx -->[ f] yy
x, y: C
xx: D x
yy: D y
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
Hxx:= FF_split x xx: ∑ yy : D' x,
z_iso_disp
  (identity_z_iso (functor_identity C x))
  (FF x yy) xx
Hyy:= FF_split y yy: ∑ yy0 : D' y,
z_iso_disp
  (identity_z_iso (functor_identity C y))
  (FF y yy0) yy
?b = f
 
C: category
D', D: disp_cat C
FF: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D' D
FF_split: disp_functor_disp_ess_split_surj FF
FF_ff: disp_functor_ff FF
FFweq:= λ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
disp_functor_ff_weq FF FF_ff xx yy f: ∏ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
xx -->[ f] yy
≃ FF x xx -->[
  (# (functor_identity C))%cat f] 
  FF y yy
FFinv:= λ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
disp_functor_ff_inv FF FF_ff: ∏ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),

(# (functor_identity C))%cat f] 
FF y yy → xx -->[ f] yy
x, y: C
xx: D x
yy: D y
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
Hxx:= FF_split x xx: ∑ yy : D' x,
z_iso_disp
  (identity_z_iso (functor_identity C x))
  (FF x yy) xx
Hyy:= FF_split y yy: ∑ yy0 : D' y,
z_iso_disp
  (identity_z_iso (functor_identity C y))
  (FF y yy0) yy
identity x · f = f
 apply id_left.
Defined.


C: category
D', D: disp_cat C
FF: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D' D
FF_split: disp_functor_disp_ess_split_surj FF
FF_ff: disp_functor_ff FF
FFweq:= λ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
disp_functor_ff_weq FF FF_ff xx yy f: ∏ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
xx -->[ f] yy
≃ FF x xx -->[
  (# (functor_identity C))%cat f] 
  FF y yy
FFinv:= λ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
disp_functor_ff_inv FF FF_ff: ∏ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
FF x xx -->[
(# (functor_identity C))%cat f] 
FF y yy → xx -->[ f] yy
disp_functor_axioms GG_data


C: category
D', D: disp_cat C
FF: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D' D
FF_split: disp_functor_disp_ess_split_surj FF
FF_ff: disp_functor_ff FF
FFweq:= λ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
disp_functor_ff_weq FF FF_ff xx yy f: ∏ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
xx -->[ f] yy
≃ FF x xx -->[
  (# (functor_identity C))%cat f] 
  FF y yy
FFinv:= λ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
disp_functor_ff_inv FF FF_ff: ∏ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
FF x xx -->[
(# (functor_identity C))%cat f] 
FF y yy → xx -->[ f] yy
disp_functor_axioms GG_data

  
C: category
D', D: disp_cat C
FF: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D' D
FF_split: disp_functor_disp_ess_split_surj FF
FF_ff: disp_functor_ff FF
FFweq:= λ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
disp_functor_ff_weq FF FF_ff xx yy f: ∏ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
xx -->[ f] yy
≃ FF x xx -->[
  (# (functor_identity C))%cat f] 
  FF y yy
FFinv:= λ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
disp_functor_ff_inv FF FF_ff: ∏ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
FF x xx -->[
(# (functor_identity C))%cat f] 
FF y yy → xx -->[ f] yy
∏ (x : C) (xx : D x),
FFinv
  (transportf
     (mor_disp (FF x (pr1 (FF_split x xx)))
        (FF x (pr1 (FF_split x xx))))
     (id_right (identity x · identity x) @
      id_left (identity x))
     (pr2 (FF_split x xx) ;; id_disp xx ;; inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
                                             (pr2
                                                (FF_split
                                                 x xx)))) =
transportb
  (mor_disp (pr1 (FF_split x xx))
     (pr1 (FF_split x xx)))
  (functor_id (functor_identity C) x)
  (id_disp (pr1 (FF_split x xx)))
C: category
D', D: disp_cat C
FF: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D' D
FF_split: disp_functor_disp_ess_split_surj FF
FF_ff: disp_functor_ff FF
FFweq:= λ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
disp_functor_ff_weq FF FF_ff xx yy f: ∏ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
xx -->[ f] yy
≃ FF x xx -->[
  (# (functor_identity C))%cat f] 
  FF y yy
FFinv:= λ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
disp_functor_ff_inv FF FF_ff: ∏ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
FF x xx -->[
(# (functor_identity C))%cat f] 
FF y yy → xx -->[ f] yy
∏ (x y z : C) (xx : D x) 
(yy : pr1 D y) (zz : pr1 D z) 
(f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧) (g : C ⟦ y, z ⟧) 
(ff : xx -->[ f] yy) (gg : yy -->[ g] zz),
FFinv
  (transportf
     (mor_disp (FF x (pr1 (FF_split x xx)))
        (FF z (pr1 (FF_split z zz))))
     (id_right (identity x · (f · g)) @
      id_left (f · g))
     (pr2 (FF_split x xx) ;; 
      (ff ;; gg) ;; inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
                      (pr2 (FF_split z zz)))) =
transportb
  (mor_disp (pr1 (FF_split x xx))
     (pr1 (FF_split z zz)))
  (functor_comp (functor_identity C) f g)
  (FFinv
     (transportf
        (mor_disp (FF x (pr1 (FF_split x xx)))
           (FF y (pr1 (FF_split y yy))))
        (id_right (identity x · f) @ id_left f)
        (pr2 (FF_split x xx) ;; ff ;; 
         inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso 
           (pr2 (FF_split y yy)))) ;; 
   FFinv
     (transportf
        (mor_disp (FF y (pr1 (FF_split y yy)))
           (FF z (pr1 (FF_split z zz))))
        (id_right (identity y · g) @ id_left g)
        (pr2 (FF_split y yy) ;; gg ;; 
         inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso 
           (pr2 (FF_split z zz)))))

D', D: disp_cat C
FF: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D' D

FF_ff: disp_functor_ff FF

(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
disp_functor_ff_weq FF FF_ff xx yy f: ∏ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
xx -->[ f] yy
≃ FF x xx -->[
  (# (functor_identity C))%cat f] 
  FF y yy
FFinv:= λ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
disp_functor_ff_inv FF FF_ff: ∏ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
FF x xx -->[
(# (functor_identity C))%cat f] 
FF y yy → xx -->[ f] yy
∏ (x : C) (xx : D x),
FFinv
  (transportf
     (mor_disp (FF x (pr1 (FF_split x xx)))
        (FF x (pr1 (FF_split x xx))))
     (id_right (identity x · identity x) @
      id_left (identity x))
     (pr2 (FF_split x xx) ;; id_disp xx ;; inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
                                             (pr2
                                                (FF_split
                                                 x xx)))) =
transportb
  (mor_disp (pr1 (FF_split x xx))
     (pr1 (FF_split x xx)))
  (functor_id (functor_identity C) x)
  (id_disp (pr1 (FF_split x xx)))

xx -->[ f] yy
≃ FF x xx -->[
  (# (functor_identity C))%cat f]

(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
disp_functor_ff_inv FF FF_ff: ∏ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
FF x xx -->[
(# (functor_identity C))%cat f] 
FF y yy → xx -->[ f] yy
x: C
xx: D x
FFinv
  (transportf
     (mor_disp (FF x (pr1 (FF_split x xx)))
        (FF x (pr1 (FF_split x xx))))
     (id_right (identity x · identity x) @
      id_left (identity x))
     (pr2 (FF_split x xx) ;; id_disp xx ;; inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
                                             (pr2
                                                (FF_split
                                                 x xx)))) =

  (mor_disp (pr1 (FF_split x xx))
     (pr1 (FF_split x xx)))
  (functor_id (functor_identity C) x)

C: category
D', D: disp_cat C
FF: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D' D
FF_split: disp_functor_disp_ess_split_surj FF
FF_ff: disp_functor_ff FF
FFweq:= λ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
disp_functor_ff_weq FF FF_ff xx yy f: ∏ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
xx -->[ f] yy
≃ FF x xx -->[
  (# (functor_identity C))%cat f] 
  FF y yy
FFinv:= λ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
disp_functor_ff_inv FF FF_ff: ∏ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
FF x xx -->[
(# (functor_identity C))%cat f] 
FF y yy → xx -->[ f] yy
x: C
xx: D x
transportf
  (mor_disp (FF x (pr1 (FF_split x xx)))
     (FF x (pr1 (FF_split x xx))))
  (id_right (identity x · identity x) @
   id_left (identity x))
  (pr2 (FF_split x xx) ;; id_disp xx ;; inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
                                          (pr2
                                             (FF_split
                                                x xx))) =
disp_functor_ff_weq FF FF_ff (pr1 (FF_split x xx))
  (pr1 (FF_split x xx)) (identity x)
  (transportb
     (mor_disp (pr1 (FF_split x xx))
        (pr1 (FF_split x xx)))
     (functor_id (functor_identity C) x)
     (id_disp (pr1 (FF_split x xx))))
 
C: category
D', D: disp_cat C
FF: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D' D
FF_split: disp_functor_disp_ess_split_surj FF
FF_ff: disp_functor_ff FF
FFweq:= λ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
disp_functor_ff_weq FF FF_ff xx yy f: ∏ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
xx -->[ f] yy
≃ FF x xx -->[
  (# (functor_identity C))%cat f] 
  FF y yy
FFinv:= λ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
disp_functor_ff_inv FF FF_ff: ∏ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
FF x xx -->[
(# (functor_identity C))%cat f] 
FF y yy → xx -->[ f] yy
x: C
xx: D x
transportf
  (mor_disp (FF x (pr1 (FF_split x xx)))
     (FF x (pr1 (FF_split x xx))))
  (id_right (identity x · identity x) @
   id_left (identity x))
  (pr2 (FF_split x xx) ;; id_disp xx ;; inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
                                          (pr2
                                             (FF_split
                                                x xx))) =
♯ FF (id_disp (pr1 (FF_split x xx)))

  (# (functor_identity C))%cat f]

disp_functor_ff_inv FF FF_ff: ∏ (x y : C) (xx : D' x)

C: category
D', D: disp_cat C
FF: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D' D
FF_split: disp_functor_disp_ess_split_surj FF
FF_ff: disp_functor_ff FF
FFweq:= λ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
disp_functor_ff_weq FF FF_ff xx yy f: ∏ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
xx -->[ f] yy
≃ FF x xx -->[
  (# (functor_identity C))%cat f] 
  FF y yy
FFinv:= λ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
disp_functor_ff_inv FF FF_ff: ∏ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
FF x xx -->[
(# (functor_identity C))%cat f] 
FF y yy → xx -->[ f] yy
x: C
xx: D x
pr2 (FF_split x xx) ;; id_disp xx ;; inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
                                       (pr2
                                          (FF_split x
                                             xx)) =
?t2

  (# (functor_identity C))%cat f] 
  FF y yy
FFinv:= λ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
disp_functor_ff_inv FF FF_ff: ∏ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
FF x xx -->[
(# (functor_identity C))%cat f] 
FF y yy → xx -->[ f] yy
x: C
xx: D x
?b =
transportb
  (mor_disp (FF x (pr1 (FF_split x xx)))
     (FF x (pr1 (FF_split x xx))))
  (functor_id (functor_identity C) x)
  (id_disp (FF x (pr1 (FF_split x xx))))
 
C: category
D', D: disp_cat C
FF: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D' D
FF_split: disp_functor_disp_ess_split_surj FF
FF_ff: disp_functor_ff FF
FFweq:= λ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
disp_functor_ff_weq FF FF_ff xx yy f: ∏ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
xx -->[ f] yy
≃ FF x xx -->[
  (# (functor_identity C))%cat f] 
  FF y yy
FFinv:= λ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
disp_functor_ff_inv FF FF_ff: ∏ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
FF x xx -->[
(# (functor_identity C))%cat f] 
FF y yy → xx -->[ f] yy
x: C
xx: D x
transportf
  (mor_disp (FF x (pr1 (FF_split x xx)))
     (FF x (pr1 (FF_split x xx))))
  (! z_iso_inv_after_z_iso
       (identity_z_iso (functor_identity C x)) @
   cancel_postcomposition (identity x)
     (identity x · identity x) (identity x)
     (! id_right (identity x)) @
   id_right (identity x · identity x) @
   id_left (identity x))
  (id_disp (FF x (pr1 (FF_split x xx)))) =
transportb
  (mor_disp (FF x (pr1 (FF_split x xx)))
     (FF x (pr1 (FF_split x xx))))
  (functor_id (functor_identity C) x)
  (id_disp (FF x (pr1 (FF_split x xx))))

    
C: category
D', D: disp_cat C
FF: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D' D
FF_split: disp_functor_disp_ess_split_surj FF
FF_ff: disp_functor_ff FF
FFweq:= λ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
disp_functor_ff_weq FF FF_ff xx yy f: ∏ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
xx -->[ f] yy
≃ FF x xx -->[
  (# (functor_identity C))%cat f] 
  FF y yy
FFinv:= λ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
disp_functor_ff_inv FF FF_ff: ∏ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
FF x xx -->[
(# (functor_identity C))%cat f] 
FF y yy → xx -->[ f] yy
x: C
xx: D x
transportf
  (mor_disp (FF x (pr1 (FF_split x xx)))
     (FF x (pr1 (FF_split x xx))))
  (! z_iso_inv_after_z_iso
       (identity_z_iso (functor_identity C x)) @
   cancel_postcomposition (identity x)
     (identity x · identity x) (identity x)
     (! id_right (identity x)) @
   id_right (identity x · identity x) @
   id_left (identity x))
  (id_disp (FF x (pr1 (FF_split x xx)))) =
transportf
  (mor_disp (FF x (pr1 (FF_split x xx)))
     (FF x (pr1 (FF_split x xx))))
  (! functor_id (functor_identity C) x)
  (id_disp (FF x (pr1 (FF_split x xx))))
 apply maponpaths_2, homset_property.
  
C: category
D', D: disp_cat C
FF: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D' D
FF_split: disp_functor_disp_ess_split_surj FF
FF_ff: disp_functor_ff FF
FFweq:= λ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
disp_functor_ff_weq FF FF_ff xx yy f: ∏ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
xx -->[ f] yy
≃ FF x xx -->[
  (# (functor_identity C))%cat f] 
  FF y yy
FFinv:= λ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
disp_functor_ff_inv FF FF_ff: ∏ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
FF x xx -->[
(# (functor_identity C))%cat f] 
FF y yy → xx -->[ f] yy
∏ (x y z : C) (xx : D x) (yy : pr1 D y) (zz : pr1 D z)
(f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧) (g : C ⟦ y, z ⟧) (ff : xx -->[ f] yy)
(gg : yy -->[ g] zz),
FFinv
  (transportf
     (mor_disp (FF x (pr1 (FF_split x xx)))
        (FF z (pr1 (FF_split z zz))))
     (id_right (identity x · (f · g)) @
      id_left (f · g))
     (pr2 (FF_split x xx) ;; (ff ;; gg) ;; inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
                                             (pr2
                                                (FF_split
                                                 z zz)))) =
transportb
  (mor_disp (pr1 (FF_split x xx))
     (pr1 (FF_split z zz)))
  (functor_comp (functor_identity C) f g)
  (FFinv
     (transportf
        (mor_disp (FF x (pr1 (FF_split x xx)))
           (FF y (pr1 (FF_split y yy))))
        (id_right (identity x · f) @ id_left f)
        (pr2 (FF_split x xx) ;; ff ;; inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
                                        (pr2
                                           (FF_split y
                                              yy)))) ;; 
   FFinv
     (transportf
        (mor_disp (FF y (pr1 (FF_split y yy)))
           (FF z (pr1 (FF_split z zz))))
        (id_right (identity y · g) @ id_left g)
        (pr2 (FF_split y yy) ;; gg ;; inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
                                        (pr2
                                           (FF_split z
                                              zz)))))
 
C: category
D', D: disp_cat C
FF: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D' D
FF_split: disp_functor_disp_ess_split_surj FF
FF_ff: disp_functor_ff FF
FFweq:= λ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
disp_functor_ff_weq FF FF_ff xx yy f: ∏ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
xx -->[ f] yy
≃ FF x xx -->[
  (# (functor_identity C))%cat f] 
  FF y yy
FFinv:= λ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
disp_functor_ff_inv FF FF_ff: ∏ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
FF x xx -->[
(# (functor_identity C))%cat f] 
FF y yy → xx -->[ f] yy
x, y, z: C
xx: D x
yy: pr1 D y
zz: pr1 D z
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: yy -->[ g] zz
FFinv
  (transportf
     (mor_disp (FF x (pr1 (FF_split x xx)))
        (FF z (pr1 (FF_split z zz))))
     (id_right (identity x · (f · g)) @
      id_left (f · g))
     (pr2 (FF_split x xx) ;; (ff ;; gg) ;; inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
                                             (pr2
                                                (FF_split
                                                 z zz)))) =
transportb
  (mor_disp (pr1 (FF_split x xx))
     (pr1 (FF_split z zz)))
  (functor_comp (functor_identity C) f g)
  (FFinv
     (transportf
        (mor_disp (FF x (pr1 (FF_split x xx)))
           (FF y (pr1 (FF_split y yy))))
        (id_right (identity x · f) @ id_left f)
        (pr2 (FF_split x xx) ;; ff ;; inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
                                        (pr2
                                           (FF_split y
                                              yy)))) ;; 
   FFinv
     (transportf
        (mor_disp (FF y (pr1 (FF_split y yy)))
           (FF z (pr1 (FF_split z zz))))
        (id_right (identity y · g) @ id_left g)
        (pr2 (FF_split y yy) ;; gg ;; inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
                                        (pr2
                                           (FF_split z
                                              zz)))))

    
C: category
D', D: disp_cat C
FF: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D' D
FF_split: disp_functor_disp_ess_split_surj FF
FF_ff: disp_functor_ff FF
FFweq:= λ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
disp_functor_ff_weq FF FF_ff xx yy f: ∏ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
xx -->[ f] yy
≃ FF x xx -->[
  (# (functor_identity C))%cat f] 
  FF y yy
FFinv:= λ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
disp_functor_ff_inv FF FF_ff: ∏ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
FF x xx -->[
(# (functor_identity C))%cat f] 
FF y yy → xx -->[ f] yy
x, y, z: C
xx: D x
yy: pr1 D y
zz: pr1 D z
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: yy -->[ g] zz
transportf
  (mor_disp (FF x (pr1 (FF_split x xx)))
     (FF z (pr1 (FF_split z zz))))
  (id_right (identity x · (f · g)) @ id_left (f · g))
  (pr2 (FF_split x xx) ;; (ff ;; gg) ;; inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
                                          (pr2
                                             (FF_split
                                                z zz))) =
disp_functor_ff_weq FF FF_ff (pr1 (FF_split x xx))
  (pr1 (FF_split z zz)) (f · g)
  (transportb
     (mor_disp (pr1 (FF_split x xx))
        (pr1 (FF_split z zz)))
     (functor_comp (functor_identity C) f g)
     (FFinv
        (transportf
           (mor_disp (FF x (pr1 (FF_split x xx)))
              (FF y (pr1 (FF_split y yy))))
           (id_right (identity x · f) @ id_left f)
           (pr2 (FF_split x xx) ;; ff ;; inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
                                           (pr2
                                              (FF_split
                                                 y yy)))) ;; 
      FFinv
        (transportf
           (mor_disp (FF y (pr1 (FF_split y yy)))
              (FF z (pr1 (FF_split z zz))))
           (id_right (identity y · g) @ id_left g)
           (pr2 (FF_split y yy) ;; gg ;; inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
                                           (pr2
                                              (FF_split
                                                 z zz))))))

D', D: disp_cat C

FF_ff: disp_functor_ff FF

(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
disp_functor_ff_weq FF FF_ff xx yy f: ∏ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
xx -->[ f] yy
≃ FF x xx -->[
  (# (functor_identity C))%cat f] 
  FF y yy

(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
disp_functor_ff_inv FF FF_ff: ∏ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
FF x xx -->[
(# (functor_identity C))%cat f] 
FF y yy → xx -->[ f] yy
x, y, z: C
xx: D x
yy: pr1 D y
zz: pr1 D z
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: yy -->[ g] zz
transportf
  (mor_disp (FF x (pr1 (FF_split x xx)))
     (FF z (pr1 (FF_split z zz))))
  (id_right (identity x · (f · g)) @ id_left (f · g))
  (pr2 (FF_split x xx) ;; (ff ;; gg) ;; inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
                                          (pr2
                                             (FF_split
                                                z zz))) =
♯ FF
  (FFinv
     (transportf
        (mor_disp (FF x (pr1 (FF_split x xx)))
           (FF y (pr1 (FF_split y yy))))
        (id_right (identity x · f) @ id_left f)
        (pr2 (FF_split x xx) ;; ff ;; inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
                                        (pr2
                                           (FF_split y
                                              yy)))) ;; 
   FFinv
     (transportf
        (mor_disp (FF y (pr1 (FF_split y yy)))
           (FF z (pr1 (FF_split z zz))))
        (id_right (identity y · g) @ id_left g)
        (pr2 (FF_split y yy) ;; gg ;; inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
                                        (pr2
                                           (FF_split z
                                              zz)))))

xx -->[ f] yy
≃ FF x xx -->[

(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
disp_functor_ff_inv FF FF_ff: ∏ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
FF x xx -->[
(# (functor_identity C))%cat f] 
FF y yy → xx -->[ f] yy
x, y, z: C
xx: D x
yy: pr1 D y
zz: pr1 D z
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: yy -->[ g] zz

  (mor_disp (FF x (pr1 (FF_split x xx)))
     (FF z (pr1 (FF_split z zz))))
  (id_right (identity x · (f · g)) @ id_left (f · g))
  (pr2 (FF_split x xx) ;; (ff ;; gg) ;; inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
                                          (pr2
                                             (FF_split
                                                z zz))) =
?b

         inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso

C: category
D', D: disp_cat C
FF: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D' D
FF_split: disp_functor_disp_ess_split_surj FF
FF_ff: disp_functor_ff FF
FFweq:= λ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
disp_functor_ff_weq FF FF_ff xx yy f: ∏ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
xx -->[ f] yy
≃ FF x xx -->[
  (# (functor_identity C))%cat f] 
  FF y yy
FFinv:= λ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
disp_functor_ff_inv FF FF_ff: ∏ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
FF x xx -->[
(# (functor_identity C))%cat f] 
FF y yy → xx -->[ f] yy
x, y, z: C
xx: D x
yy: pr1 D y
zz: pr1 D z
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: yy -->[ g] zz
?b0 = ?b
 
C: category
D', D: disp_cat C
FF: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D' D
FF_split: disp_functor_disp_ess_split_surj FF
FF_ff: disp_functor_ff FF
FFweq:= λ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
disp_functor_ff_weq FF FF_ff xx yy f: ∏ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
xx -->[ f] yy
≃ FF x xx -->[
  (# (functor_identity C))%cat f] 
  FF y yy
FFinv:= λ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
disp_functor_ff_inv FF FF_ff: ∏ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
FF x xx -->[
(# (functor_identity C))%cat f] 
FF y yy → xx -->[ f] yy
x, y, z: C
xx: D x
yy: pr1 D y
zz: pr1 D z
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: yy -->[ g] zz
transportb
  (mor_disp (FF x (pr1 (FF_split x xx)))
     (FF z (pr1 (FF_split z zz))))
  (functor_comp (functor_identity C) f g)
  (♯ FF
     (FFinv
        (transportf
           (mor_disp (FF x (pr1 (FF_split x xx)))
              (FF y (pr1 (FF_split y yy))))
           (id_right (identity x · f) @ id_left f)
           (pr2 (FF_split x xx) ;; ff ;; inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
                                           (pr2
                                              (FF_split
                                                 y yy))))) ;; 
   ♯ FF
     (FFinv
        (transportf
           (mor_disp (FF y (pr1 (FF_split y yy)))
              (FF z (pr1 (FF_split z zz))))
           (id_right (identity y · g) @ id_left g)
           (pr2 (FF_split y yy) ;; gg ;; inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
                                           (pr2
                                              (FF_split
                                                 z zz)))))) =
?b

FF x xx -->[
(# (functor_identity C))%cat f] 
FF y yy → xx -->[ f] yy
x, y, z: C
xx: D x
yy: pr1 D y
zz: pr1 D z
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: yy -->[ g] zz
transportf
  (mor_disp (FF x (pr1 (FF_split x xx)))
     (FF y (pr1 (FF_split y yy))))
  (id_right (identity x · f) @ id_left f)
  (pr2 (FF_split x xx) ;; ff ;; inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
                                  (pr2 (FF_split y yy))) ;; 
transportf
  (mor_disp (FF y (pr1 (FF_split y yy)))
     (FF z (pr1 (FF_split z zz))))
  (id_right (identity y · g) @ id_left g)
  (pr2 (FF_split y yy) ;; gg ;; inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
                                  (pr2 (FF_split z zz))) =
?t2
C: category
D', D: disp_cat C
FF: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D' D
FF_split: disp_functor_disp_ess_split_surj FF
FF_ff: disp_functor_ff FF
FFweq:= λ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
disp_functor_ff_weq FF FF_ff xx yy f: ∏ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
xx -->[ f] yy
≃ FF x xx -->[
  (# (functor_identity C))%cat f] 
  FF y yy
FFinv:= λ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
disp_functor_ff_inv FF FF_ff: ∏ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
FF x xx -->[
(# (functor_identity C))%cat f] 
FF y yy → xx -->[ f] yy
x, y, z: C
xx: D x
yy: pr1 D y
zz: pr1 D z
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: yy -->[ g] zz
transportb
  (mor_disp (FF x (pr1 (FF_split x xx)))
     (FF z (pr1 (FF_split z zz))))
  (functor_comp (functor_identity C) f g) 
  ?t2 = ?b

C: category
D', D: disp_cat C
FF: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D' D
FF_split: disp_functor_disp_ess_split_surj FF
FF_ff: disp_functor_ff FF
FFweq:= λ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
disp_functor_ff_weq FF FF_ff xx yy f: ∏ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
xx -->[ f] yy
≃ FF x xx -->[
  (# (functor_identity C))%cat f] 
  FF y yy
FFinv:= λ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
disp_functor_ff_inv FF FF_ff: ∏ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
FF x xx -->[
(# (functor_identity C))%cat f] 
FF y yy → xx -->[ f] yy
x, y, z: C
xx: D x
yy: pr1 D y
zz: pr1 D z
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: yy -->[ g] zz
transportf
  (mor_disp (FF x (pr1 (FF_split x xx)))
     (FF z (pr1 (FF_split z zz))))
  (maponpaths
     (compose ((# (functor_identity C))%cat f))
     (id_right (identity y · g) @ id_left g))
  (transportf
     (mor_disp (FF x (pr1 (FF_split x xx)))
        (FF y (pr1 (FF_split y yy))))
     (id_right (identity x · f) @ id_left f)
     (pr2 (FF_split x xx) ;; ff ;; inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
                                     (pr2
                                        (FF_split y yy))) ;; 
   (pr2 (FF_split y yy) ;; gg ;; inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
                                   (pr2
                                      (FF_split z zz)))) =
?t2

(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
disp_functor_ff_inv FF FF_ff: ∏ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
FF x xx -->[

yy: pr1 D y
zz: pr1 D z

g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧

transportb
  (mor_disp (FF x (pr1 (FF_split x xx)))

     (mor_disp (FF x (pr1 (FF_split x xx)))
        (FF z (pr1 (FF_split z zz))))

C: category
D', D: disp_cat C
FF: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D' D
FF_split: disp_functor_disp_ess_split_surj FF
FF_ff: disp_functor_ff FF
FFweq:= λ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
disp_functor_ff_weq FF FF_ff xx yy f: ∏ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
xx -->[ f] yy
≃ FF x xx -->[
  (# (functor_identity C))%cat f] 
  FF y yy
FFinv:= λ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
disp_functor_ff_inv FF FF_ff: ∏ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
FF x xx -->[
(# (functor_identity C))%cat f] 
FF y yy → xx -->[ f] yy
x, y, z: C
xx: D x
yy: pr1 D y
zz: pr1 D z
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: yy -->[ g] zz
transportf
  (mor_disp (FF x (pr1 (FF_split x xx)))
     (FF z (pr1 (FF_split z zz))))
  (cancel_postcomposition
     (identity x · f · identity y)
     ((# (functor_identity C))%cat f)
     (identity y · g · identity z)
     (id_right (identity x · f) @ id_left f))
  (pr2 (FF_split x xx) ;; ff ;; inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
                                  (pr2 (FF_split y yy)) ;; 
   (pr2 (FF_split y yy) ;; gg ;; inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
                                   (pr2
                                      (FF_split z zz)))) =
?t2

(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
xx -->[ f] yy
≃ FF x xx -->[
  (# (functor_identity C))%cat f] 
  FF y yy
FFinv:= λ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
disp_functor_ff_inv FF FF_ff: ∏ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
FF x xx -->[
(# (functor_identity C))%cat f] 
FF y yy → xx -->[ f] yy
x, y, z: C
xx: D x
yy: pr1 D y
zz: pr1 D z
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: yy -->[ g] zz
transportb
  (mor_disp (FF x (pr1 (FF_split x xx)))
     (FF z (pr1 (FF_split z zz))))
  (functor_comp (functor_identity C) f g)
  (transportf
     (mor_disp (FF x (pr1 (FF_split x xx)))
        (FF z (pr1 (FF_split z zz))))
     (maponpaths
        (compose ((# (functor_identity C))%cat f))
        (id_right (identity y · g) @ id_left g))
     (transportf
        (mor_disp (FF x (pr1 (FF_split x xx)))
           (FF z (pr1 (FF_split z zz))))
        (cancel_postcomposition
           (identity x · f · identity y)
           ((# (functor_identity C))%cat f)
           (identity y · g · identity z)
           (id_right (identity x · f) @ id_left f))
        ?t2)) = ?b

                               (pr2 (FF_split y yy)) ;;

D', D: disp_cat C
FF: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D' D

FF_ff: disp_functor_ff FF
FFweq:= λ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
disp_functor_ff_weq FF FF_ff xx yy f: ∏ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
xx -->[ f] yy
≃ FF x xx -->[
  (# (functor_identity C))%cat f] 
  FF y yy

(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
disp_functor_ff_inv FF FF_ff: ∏ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),

(# (functor_identity C))%cat f] 
FF y yy → xx -->[ f] yy

xx: D x
yy: pr1 D y
zz: pr1 D z
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: yy -->[ g] zz
pr2 (FF_split x xx) ;; ff ;; inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
                               (pr2 (FF_split y yy)) ;;

  (mor_disp (FF y (pr1 (FF_split y yy)))
     (FF z (pr1 (FF_split z zz))))

                                   (pr2
                                      (FF_split z zz)))) =
?t2

?b0
C: category
D', D: disp_cat C
FF: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D' D
FF_split: disp_functor_disp_ess_split_surj FF
FF_ff: disp_functor_ff FF
FFweq:= λ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
disp_functor_ff_weq FF FF_ff xx yy f: ∏ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
xx -->[ f] yy
≃ FF x xx -->[
  (# (functor_identity C))%cat f] 
  FF y yy
FFinv:= λ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
disp_functor_ff_inv FF FF_ff: ∏ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
FF x xx -->[
(# (functor_identity C))%cat f] 
FF y yy → xx -->[ f] yy
x, y, z: C
xx: D x
yy: pr1 D y
zz: pr1 D z
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: yy -->[ g] zz
?b0 = ?t2
C: category
D', D: disp_cat C
FF: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D' D
FF_split: disp_functor_disp_ess_split_surj FF
FF_ff: disp_functor_ff FF
FFweq:= λ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
disp_functor_ff_weq FF FF_ff xx yy f: ∏ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
xx -->[ f] yy
≃ FF x xx -->[
  (# (functor_identity C))%cat f] 
  FF y yy
FFinv:= λ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
disp_functor_ff_inv FF FF_ff: ∏ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
FF x xx -->[
(# (functor_identity C))%cat f] 
FF y yy → xx -->[ f] yy
x, y, z: C
xx: D x
yy: pr1 D y
zz: pr1 D z
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: yy -->[ g] zz
transportb
  (mor_disp (FF x (pr1 (FF_split x xx)))
     (FF z (pr1 (FF_split z zz))))
  (functor_comp (functor_identity C) f g)
  (transportf
     (mor_disp (FF x (pr1 (FF_split x xx)))
        (FF z (pr1 (FF_split z zz))))
     (maponpaths
        (compose ((# (functor_identity C))%cat f))
        (id_right (identity y · g) @ id_left g))
     (transportf
        (mor_disp (FF x (pr1 (FF_split x xx)))
           (FF z (pr1 (FF_split z zz))))
        (cancel_postcomposition
           (identity x · f · identity y)
           ((# (functor_identity C))%cat f)
           (identity y · g · identity z)
           (id_right (identity x · f) @ id_left f))
        (transportf
           (mor_disp (FF x (pr1 (FF_split x xx)))
              (FF z (pr1 (FF_split z zz))))
           (maponpaths
              (compose (identity x · f · identity y))
              (assoc (identity y) g (identity z))) 
           ?t2))) = ?b
 
C: category
D', D: disp_cat C
FF: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D' D
FF_split: disp_functor_disp_ess_split_surj FF
FF_ff: disp_functor_ff FF
FFweq:= λ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
disp_functor_ff_weq FF FF_ff xx yy f: ∏ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
xx -->[ f] yy
≃ FF x xx -->[
  (# (functor_identity C))%cat f] 
  FF y yy
FFinv:= λ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
disp_functor_ff_inv FF FF_ff: ∏ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
FF x xx -->[
(# (functor_identity C))%cat f] 
FF y yy → xx -->[ f] yy
x, y, z: C
xx: D x
yy: pr1 D y
zz: pr1 D z
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: yy -->[ g] zz
transportb
  (mor_disp (FF x (pr1 (FF_split x xx)))
     (FF z (pr1 (FF_split z zz))))
  (assoc (identity x · f · identity y) (identity y)
     (g · identity z))
  (pr2 (FF_split x xx) ;; ff ;; inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
                                  (pr2 (FF_split y yy)) ;; 
   pr2 (FF_split y yy) ;; (gg ;; inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
                                   (pr2
                                      (FF_split z zz)))) =
?t2

D', D: disp_cat C
FF: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D' D

FF_ff: disp_functor_ff FF
FFweq:= λ (x y : C) (xx : D' x)

disp_functor_ff_weq FF FF_ff xx yy f: ∏ (x y : C) (xx : D' x)
