disp_functor_ff_inv FF FF_ff: ∏ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
FF x xx -->[
(# (functor_identity C))%cat f] 
FF y yy → xx -->[ f] yy
x, y, z: C
xx: D x
yy: pr1 D y
zz: pr1 D z
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: yy -->[ g] zz
transportb
  (mor_disp (FF x (pr1 (FF_split x xx)))
     (FF z (pr1 (FF_split z zz))))
  (functor_comp (functor_identity C) f g)
  (transportf
     (mor_disp (FF x (pr1 (FF_split x xx)))
        (FF z (pr1 (FF_split z zz))))
     (maponpaths
        (compose ((# (functor_identity C))%cat f))
        (id_right (identity y · g) @ id_left g))
     (transportf
        (mor_disp (FF x (pr1 (FF_split x xx)))
           (FF z (pr1 (FF_split z zz))))
        (cancel_postcomposition
           (identity x · f · identity y)
           ((# (functor_identity C))%cat f)
           (identity y · g · identity z)
           (id_right (identity x · f) @ id_left f))
        (transportf
           (mor_disp (FF x (pr1 (FF_split x xx)))
              (FF z (pr1 (FF_split z zz))))
           (maponpaths
              (compose (identity x · f · identity y))
              (assoc (identity y) g (identity z))) 
           ?t2))) = ?b

D', D: disp_cat C
FF: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D' D
FF_split: disp_functor_disp_ess_split_surj FF

disp_functor_ff_inv FF FF_ff: ∏ (x y : C) (xx : D' x)

FF x xx -->[
(# (functor_identity C))%cat f] 
FF y yy → xx -->[ f] yy
x, y, z: C
xx: D x
yy: pr1 D y
zz: pr1 D z
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: yy -->[ g] zz
pr2 (FF_split x xx) ;; ff ;; inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
                               (pr2 (FF_split y yy)) ;; 
pr2 (FF_split y yy) ;; (gg ;; inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
                                (pr2 (FF_split z zz))) =
?t2

C: category
D', D: disp_cat C
FF: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D' D
FF_split: disp_functor_disp_ess_split_surj FF
FF_ff: disp_functor_ff FF
FFweq:= λ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
disp_functor_ff_weq FF FF_ff xx yy f: ∏ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
xx -->[ f] yy
≃ FF x xx -->[
  (# (functor_identity C))%cat f] 
  FF y yy
FFinv:= λ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
disp_functor_ff_inv FF FF_ff: ∏ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
FF x xx -->[
(# (functor_identity C))%cat f] 
FF y yy → xx -->[ f] yy
x, y, z: C
xx: D x
yy: pr1 D y
zz: pr1 D z
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: yy -->[ g] zz
pr2 (FF_split x xx) ;; ff ;; inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
                               (pr2 (FF_split y yy)) ;; 
pr2 (FF_split y yy) = ?y'

  (functor_comp (functor_identity C) f g)
  (transportf

        (FF z (pr1 (FF_split z zz))))

              (compose (identity x · f · identity y))

           (transportb
              (mor_disp 
                 (FF x (pr1 (FF_split x xx)))
                 (FF z (pr1 (FF_split z zz))))
              (assoc (identity x · f · identity y)
                 (identity y) 
                 (g · identity z)) 
              ?t2)))) =

C: category
D', D: disp_cat C
FF: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D' D
FF_split: disp_functor_disp_ess_split_surj FF
FF_ff: disp_functor_ff FF
FFweq:= λ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
disp_functor_ff_weq FF FF_ff xx yy f: ∏ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
xx -->[ f] yy
≃ FF x xx -->[
  (# (functor_identity C))%cat f] 
  FF y yy

(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
disp_functor_ff_inv FF FF_ff: ∏ (x y : C) (xx : D' x)

FF x xx -->[

FF y yy → xx -->[ f] yy
x, y, z: C
xx: D x
yy: pr1 D y
zz: pr1 D z
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: yy -->[ g] zz
pr2 (FF_split x xx) ;; ff ;; inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
                               (pr2 (FF_split y yy)) ;; 
pr2 (FF_split y yy) = ?b0
C: category
D', D: disp_cat C
FF: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D' D
FF_split: disp_functor_disp_ess_split_surj FF
FF_ff: disp_functor_ff FF
FFweq:= λ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
disp_functor_ff_weq FF FF_ff xx yy f: ∏ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
xx -->[ f] yy
≃ FF x xx -->[
  (# (functor_identity C))%cat f] 
  FF y yy
FFinv:= λ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
disp_functor_ff_inv FF FF_ff: ∏ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
FF x xx -->[
(# (functor_identity C))%cat f] 
FF y yy → xx -->[ f] yy
x, y, z: C
xx: D x
yy: pr1 D y
zz: pr1 D z
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: yy -->[ g] zz
?b0 = ?y'
C: category
D', D: disp_cat C
FF: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D' D
FF_split: disp_functor_disp_ess_split_surj FF
FF_ff: disp_functor_ff FF
FFweq:= λ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
disp_functor_ff_weq FF FF_ff xx yy f: ∏ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
xx -->[ f] yy
≃ FF x xx -->[
  (# (functor_identity C))%cat f] 
  FF y yy
FFinv:= λ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
disp_functor_ff_inv FF FF_ff: ∏ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
FF x xx -->[
(# (functor_identity C))%cat f] 
FF y yy → xx -->[ f] yy
x, y, z: C
xx: D x
yy: pr1 D y
zz: pr1 D z
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: yy -->[ g] zz

C: category
D', D: disp_cat C
FF: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D' D
FF_split: disp_functor_disp_ess_split_surj FF
FF_ff: disp_functor_ff FF
FFweq:= λ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
disp_functor_ff_weq FF FF_ff xx yy f: ∏ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
xx -->[ f] yy
≃ FF x xx -->[
  (# (functor_identity C))%cat f] 
  FF y yy
FFinv:= λ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
disp_functor_ff_inv FF FF_ff: ∏ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
FF x xx -->[
(# (functor_identity C))%cat f] 
FF y yy → xx -->[ f] yy
x, y, z: C
xx: D x
yy: pr1 D y
zz: pr1 D z
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: yy -->[ g] zz
transportb
  (mor_disp (FF x (pr1 (FF_split x xx)))
     (FF z (pr1 (FF_split z zz))))
  (functor_comp (functor_identity C) f g)
  (transportf
     (mor_disp (FF x (pr1 (FF_split x xx)))
        (FF z (pr1 (FF_split z zz))))
     (maponpaths
        (compose ((# (functor_identity C))%cat f))
        (id_right (identity y · g) @ id_left g))
     (transportf
        (mor_disp (FF x (pr1 (FF_split x xx)))
           (FF z (pr1 (FF_split z zz))))
        (cancel_postcomposition
           (identity x · f · identity y)
           ((# (functor_identity C))%cat f)
           (identity y · g · identity z)
           (id_right (identity x · f) @ id_left f))
        (transportf
           (mor_disp (FF x (pr1 (FF_split x xx)))
              (FF z (pr1 (FF_split z zz))))
           (maponpaths
              (compose (identity x · f · identity y))
              (assoc (identity y) g (identity z)))
           (transportb
              (mor_disp 
                 (FF x (pr1 (FF_split x xx)))
                 (FF z (pr1 (FF_split z zz))))
              (assoc (identity x · f · identity y)
                 (identity y) 
                 (g · identity z)) 
              ?t2)))) = 
?b

disp_functor_ff_inv FF FF_ff: ∏ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
FF x xx -->[
(# (functor_identity C))%cat f] 
FF y yy → xx -->[ f] yy
x, y, z: C
xx: D x
yy: pr1 D y
zz: pr1 D z
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: yy -->[ g] zz
pr2 (FF_split x xx) ;; ff ;; ?t21 = ?t20

D', D: disp_cat C
FF: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D' D

FF_ff: disp_functor_ff FF
FFweq:= λ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
disp_functor_ff_weq FF FF_ff xx yy f: ∏ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
xx -->[ f] yy
≃ FF x xx -->[
  (# (functor_identity C))%cat f] 
  FF y yy

(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
disp_functor_ff_inv FF FF_ff: ∏ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),

(# (functor_identity C))%cat f] 
FF y yy → xx -->[ f] yy
x, y, z: C
xx: D x
yy: pr1 D y
zz: pr1 D z
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: yy -->[ g] zz
transportf (mor_disp (FF x (pr1 (FF_split x xx))) yy)
  (assoc (identity x · f) (identity y) (identity y))
  ?t20 ;; (gg ;; inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
                   (pr2 (FF_split z zz))) = 
?t2
C: category
D', D: disp_cat C
FF: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D' D
FF_split: disp_functor_disp_ess_split_surj FF
FF_ff: disp_functor_ff FF
FFweq:= λ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
disp_functor_ff_weq FF FF_ff xx yy f: ∏ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
xx -->[ f] yy
≃ FF x xx -->[
  (# (functor_identity C))%cat f] 
  FF y yy
FFinv:= λ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
disp_functor_ff_inv FF FF_ff: ∏ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
FF x xx -->[
(# (functor_identity C))%cat f] 
FF y yy → xx -->[ f] yy
x, y, z: C
xx: D x
yy: pr1 D y
zz: pr1 D z
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: yy -->[ g] zz
transportb
  (mor_disp (FF x (pr1 (FF_split x xx)))
     (FF z (pr1 (FF_split z zz))))
  (functor_comp (functor_identity C) f g)
  (transportf
     (mor_disp (FF x (pr1 (FF_split x xx)))
        (FF z (pr1 (FF_split z zz))))
     (maponpaths
        (compose ((# (functor_identity C))%cat f))
        (id_right (identity y · g) @ id_left g))
     (transportf
        (mor_disp (FF x (pr1 (FF_split x xx)))
           (FF z (pr1 (FF_split z zz))))
        (cancel_postcomposition
           (identity x · f · identity y)
           ((# (functor_identity C))%cat f)
           (identity y · g · identity z)
           (id_right (identity x · f) @ id_left f))
        (transportf
           (mor_disp (FF x (pr1 (FF_split x xx)))
              (FF z (pr1 (FF_split z zz))))
           (maponpaths
              (compose (identity x · f · identity y))
              (assoc (identity y) g (identity z)))
           (transportb
              (mor_disp 
                 (FF x (pr1 (FF_split x xx)))
                 (FF z (pr1 (FF_split z zz))))
              (assoc (identity x · f · identity y)
                 (identity y) 
                 (g · identity z)) 
              ?t2)))) = 
?b

FF_split: disp_functor_disp_ess_split_surj FF
FF_ff: disp_functor_ff FF
FFweq:= λ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
disp_functor_ff_weq FF FF_ff xx yy f: ∏ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
xx -->[ f] yy
≃ FF x xx -->[
  (# (functor_identity C))%cat f] 
  FF y yy
FFinv:= λ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
disp_functor_ff_inv FF FF_ff: ∏ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
FF x xx -->[
(# (functor_identity C))%cat f] 
FF y yy → xx -->[ f] yy
x, y, z: C
xx: D x
yy: pr1 D y
zz: pr1 D z
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: yy -->[ g] zz
?b0 = ?t20
C: category
D', D: disp_cat C
FF: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D' D
FF_split: disp_functor_disp_ess_split_surj FF
FF_ff: disp_functor_ff FF
FFweq:= λ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
disp_functor_ff_weq FF FF_ff xx yy f: ∏ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
xx -->[ f] yy
≃ FF x xx -->[
  (# (functor_identity C))%cat f] 
  FF y yy
FFinv:= λ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
disp_functor_ff_inv FF FF_ff: ∏ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
FF x xx -->[
(# (functor_identity C))%cat f] 
FF y yy → xx -->[ f] yy
x, y, z: C
xx: D x
yy: pr1 D y
zz: pr1 D z
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: yy -->[ g] zz
transportf (mor_disp (FF x (pr1 (FF_split x xx))) yy)
  (assoc (identity x · f) (identity y) (identity y))
  ?t20 ;; (gg ;; inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
                   (pr2 (FF_split z zz))) = 
?t2
C: category
D', D: disp_cat C
FF: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D' D
FF_split: disp_functor_disp_ess_split_surj FF
FF_ff: disp_functor_ff FF
FFweq:= λ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
disp_functor_ff_weq FF FF_ff xx yy f: ∏ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
xx -->[ f] yy
≃ FF x xx -->[
  (# (functor_identity C))%cat f] 
  FF y yy
FFinv:= λ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
disp_functor_ff_inv FF FF_ff: ∏ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
FF x xx -->[
(# (functor_identity C))%cat f] 
FF y yy → xx -->[ f] yy
x, y, z: C
xx: D x
yy: pr1 D y
zz: pr1 D z
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: yy -->[ g] zz
transportb
  (mor_disp (FF x (pr1 (FF_split x xx)))
     (FF z (pr1 (FF_split z zz))))
  (functor_comp (functor_identity C) f g)
  (transportf
     (mor_disp (FF x (pr1 (FF_split x xx)))
        (FF z (pr1 (FF_split z zz))))
     (maponpaths
        (compose ((# (functor_identity C))%cat f))
        (id_right (identity y · g) @ id_left g))
     (transportf
        (mor_disp (FF x (pr1 (FF_split x xx)))
           (FF z (pr1 (FF_split z zz))))
        (cancel_postcomposition
           (identity x · f · identity y)
           ((# (functor_identity C))%cat f)
           (identity y · g · identity z)
           (id_right (identity x · f) @ id_left f))
        (transportf
           (mor_disp (FF x (pr1 (FF_split x xx)))
              (FF z (pr1 (FF_split z zz))))
           (maponpaths
              (compose (identity x · f · identity y))
              (assoc (identity y) g (identity z)))
           (transportb
              (mor_disp 
                 (FF x (pr1 (FF_split x xx)))
                 (FF z (pr1 (FF_split z zz))))
              (assoc (identity x · f · identity y)
                 (identity y) 
                 (g · identity z)) 
              ?t2)))) = 
?b

D', D: disp_cat C

FF_ff: disp_functor_ff FF

zz: pr1 D z
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: yy -->[ g] zz
transportf (mor_disp (FF x (pr1 (FF_split x xx))) yy)
  (maponpaths (compose (identity x · f))
     (! z_iso_after_z_iso_inv
          (identity_z_iso (functor_identity C y))))
  (transportb
     (mor_disp (FF x (pr1 (FF_split x xx))) yy)
     (id_right (identity x · f))
     (pr2 (FF_split x xx) ;; ff)) = ?t20

        (mor_disp (FF x (pr1 (FF_split x xx)))
           (FF z (pr1 (FF_split z zz))))
        (cancel_postcomposition
           (identity x · f · identity y)
           ((# (functor_identity C))%cat f)
           (identity y · g · identity z)
           (id_right (identity x · f) @ id_left f))
        (transportf
           (mor_disp (FF x (pr1 (FF_split x xx)))
              (FF z (pr1 (FF_split z zz))))
           (maponpaths
              (compose (identity x · f · identity y))
              (assoc (identity y) g (identity z)))
           (transportb
              (mor_disp 
                 (FF x (pr1 (FF_split x xx)))
                 (FF z (pr1 (FF_split z zz))))
              (assoc (identity x · f · identity y)
                 (identity y) 
                 (g · identity z)) 
              ?t2)))) = 
?b

           
C: category
D', D: disp_cat C
FF: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D' D
FF_split: disp_functor_disp_ess_split_surj FF
FF_ff: disp_functor_ff FF
FFweq:= λ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
disp_functor_ff_weq FF FF_ff xx yy f: ∏ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
xx -->[ f] yy
≃ FF x xx -->[
  (# (functor_identity C))%cat f] 
  FF y yy
FFinv:= λ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
disp_functor_ff_inv FF FF_ff: ∏ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
FF x xx -->[
(# (functor_identity C))%cat f] 
FF y yy → xx -->[ f] yy
x, y, z: C
xx: D x
yy: pr1 D y
zz: pr1 D z
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: yy -->[ g] zz
transportb
  (mor_disp (FF x (pr1 (FF_split x xx)))
     (FF z (pr1 (FF_split z zz))))
  (functor_comp (functor_identity C) f g)
  (transportf
     (mor_disp (FF x (pr1 (FF_split x xx)))
        (FF z (pr1 (FF_split z zz))))
     (maponpaths
        (compose ((# (functor_identity C))%cat f))
        (id_right (identity y · g) @ id_left g))
     (transportf
        (mor_disp (FF x (pr1 (FF_split x xx)))
           (FF z (pr1 (FF_split z zz))))
        (cancel_postcomposition
           (identity x · f · identity y)
           ((# (functor_identity C))%cat f)
           (identity y · g · identity z)
           (id_right (identity x · f) @ id_left f))
        (transportf
           (mor_disp (FF x (pr1 (FF_split x xx)))
              (FF z (pr1 (FF_split z zz))))
           (maponpaths
              (compose (identity x · f · identity y))
              (assoc (identity y) g (identity z)))
           (transportb
              (mor_disp (FF x (pr1 (FF_split x xx)))
                 (FF z (pr1 (FF_split z zz))))
              (assoc (identity x · f · identity y)
                 (identity y) (g · identity z))
              (transportf
                 (mor_disp
                    (FF x (pr1 (FF_split x xx)))
                    (FF z (pr1 (FF_split z zz))))
                 (cancel_postcomposition
                    (identity x · f)
                    (identity x · f · identity y
                     · identity y) (g · identity z)
                    ((! id_right (identity x · f) @
                      maponpaths
                        (compose (identity x · f))
                        (! z_iso_after_z_iso_inv
                             (identity_z_iso
                                (functor_identity C y)))) @
                     assoc (identity x · f)
                       (identity y) (identity y)))
                 (pr2 (FF_split x xx) ;; ff ;; (gg ;; 
                                                inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
                                                 (pr2
                                                 (FF_split
                                                 z zz))))))))) =
?b

  (maponpaths (compose (identity x · f · identity y))
     (assoc (identity y) g (identity z)) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (identity x · f · identity y)
     ((# (functor_identity C))%cat f)
     (identity y · g · identity z)
     (id_right (identity x · f) @ id_left f) @
   maponpaths
     (compose ((# (functor_identity C))%cat f))
     (id_right (identity y · g) @ id_left g) @
   ! functor_comp (functor_identity C) f g)
  (transportb
     (mor_disp (FF x (pr1 (FF_split x xx)))
        (FF z (pr1 (FF_split z zz))))
     (assoc (identity x · f · identity y) (identity y)
        (g · identity z))
     (transportf
        (mor_disp (FF x (pr1 (FF_split x xx)))
           (FF z (pr1 (FF_split z zz))))
        (cancel_postcomposition (identity x · f)
           (identity x · f · identity y · identity y)
           (g · identity z)
           ((! id_right (identity x · f) @
             maponpaths (compose (identity x · f))
               (! z_iso_after_z_iso_inv
                    (identity_z_iso
                       (functor_identity C y)))) @
            assoc (identity x · f) (identity y)
              (identity y)))
        (pr2 (FF_split x xx) ;; ff ;; (gg ;; inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
                                               (pr2
                                                 (FF_split
                                                 z zz)))))) =
?b

         
C: category
D', D: disp_cat C
FF: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D' D
FF_split: disp_functor_disp_ess_split_surj FF
FF_ff: disp_functor_ff FF
FFweq:= λ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
disp_functor_ff_weq FF FF_ff xx yy f: ∏ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
xx -->[ f] yy
≃ FF x xx -->[
  (# (functor_identity C))%cat f] 
  FF y yy
FFinv:= λ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
disp_functor_ff_inv FF FF_ff: ∏ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
FF x xx -->[
(# (functor_identity C))%cat f] 
FF y yy → xx -->[ f] yy
x, y, z: C
xx: D x
yy: pr1 D y
zz: pr1 D z
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: yy -->[ g] zz
transportf
  (mor_disp (FF x (pr1 (FF_split x xx)))
     (FF z (pr1 (FF_split z zz))))
  (maponpaths (compose (identity x · f · identity y))
     (assoc (identity y) g (identity z)) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (identity x · f · identity y)
     ((# (functor_identity C))%cat f)
     (identity y · g · identity z)
     (id_right (identity x · f) @ id_left f) @
   maponpaths
     (compose ((# (functor_identity C))%cat f))
     (id_right (identity y · g) @ id_left g) @
   ! functor_comp (functor_identity C) f g)
  (transportb
     (mor_disp (FF x (pr1 (FF_split x xx)))
        (FF z (pr1 (FF_split z zz))))
     (assoc (identity x · f · identity y) (identity y)
        (g · identity z))
     (transportf
        (mor_disp (FF x (pr1 (FF_split x xx)))
           (FF z (pr1 (FF_split z zz))))
        (cancel_postcomposition (identity x · f)
           (identity x · f · identity y · identity y)
           (g · identity z)
           ((! id_right (identity x · f) @
             maponpaths (compose (identity x · f))
               (! z_iso_after_z_iso_inv
                    (identity_z_iso
                       (functor_identity C y)))) @
            assoc (identity x · f) (identity y)
              (identity y)))
        (pr2 (FF_split x xx) ;; ff ;; (gg ;; inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
                                               (pr2
                                                 (FF_split
                                                 z zz)))))) =
?b0

   maponpaths (compose (identity x · f · identity y))
     (assoc (identity y) g (identity z)) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (identity x · f · identity y)
     ((# (functor_identity C))%cat f)
     (identity y · g · identity z)
     (id_right (identity x · f) @ id_left f) @
   maponpaths
     (compose ((# (functor_identity C))%cat f))
     (id_right (identity y · g) @ id_left g) @
   ! functor_comp (functor_identity C) f g)
  (transportf
     (mor_disp (FF x (pr1 (FF_split x xx)))
        (FF z (pr1 (FF_split z zz))))
     (cancel_postcomposition (identity x · f)
        (identity x · f · identity y · identity y)
        (g · identity z)
        ((! id_right (identity x · f) @
          maponpaths (compose (identity x · f))
            (! z_iso_after_z_iso_inv
                 (identity_z_iso
                    (functor_identity C y)))) @
         assoc (identity x · f) (identity y)
           (identity y)))
     (pr2 (FF_split x xx) ;; ff ;; (gg ;; inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
                                            (pr2
                                               (FF_split
                                                 z zz))))) =

C: category
D', D: disp_cat C
FF: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D' D
FF_split: disp_functor_disp_ess_split_surj FF
FF_ff: disp_functor_ff FF
FFweq:= λ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
disp_functor_ff_weq FF FF_ff xx yy f: ∏ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
xx -->[ f] yy
≃ FF x xx -->[
  (# (functor_identity C))%cat f] 
  FF y yy
FFinv:= λ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
disp_functor_ff_inv FF FF_ff: ∏ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
FF x xx -->[
(# (functor_identity C))%cat f] 
FF y yy → xx -->[ f] yy
x, y, z: C
xx: D x
yy: pr1 D y
zz: pr1 D z
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: yy -->[ g] zz
transportf
  (mor_disp (FF x (pr1 (FF_split x xx)))
     (FF z (pr1 (FF_split z zz))))
  (cancel_postcomposition (identity x · f)
     (identity x · f · identity y · identity y)
     (g · identity z)
     ((! id_right (identity x · f) @
       maponpaths (compose (identity x · f))
         (! z_iso_after_z_iso_inv
              (identity_z_iso (functor_identity C y)))) @
      assoc (identity x · f) (identity y) (identity y)) @
   ! assoc (identity x · f · identity y) (identity y)
       (g · identity z) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x · f · identity y))
     (assoc (identity y) g (identity z)) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (identity x · f · identity y)
     ((# (functor_identity C))%cat f)
     (identity y · g · identity z)
     (id_right (identity x · f) @ id_left f) @
   maponpaths
     (compose ((# (functor_identity C))%cat f))
     (id_right (identity y · g) @ id_left g) @
   ! functor_comp (functor_identity C) f g)
  (pr2 (FF_split x xx) ;; ff ;; (gg ;; inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
                                         (pr2
                                            (FF_split
                                               z zz)))) =
?b

         (* A trick to hide the huge equality term: *)
         
C: category
D', D: disp_cat C
FF: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D' D
FF_split: disp_functor_disp_ess_split_surj FF
FF_ff: disp_functor_ff FF
FFweq:= λ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
disp_functor_ff_weq FF FF_ff xx yy f: ∏ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
xx -->[ f] yy
≃ FF x xx -->[
  (# (functor_identity C))%cat f] 
  FF y yy
FFinv:= λ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
disp_functor_ff_inv FF FF_ff: ∏ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
FF x xx -->[
(# (functor_identity C))%cat f] 
FF y yy → xx -->[ f] yy
x, y, z: C
xx: D x
yy: pr1 D y
zz: pr1 D z
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: yy -->[ g] zz
cancel_postcomposition (identity x · f)
  (identity x · f · identity y · identity y)
  (g · identity z)
  ((! id_right (identity x · f) @
    maponpaths (compose (identity x · f))
      (! z_iso_after_z_iso_inv
           (identity_z_iso (functor_identity C y)))) @
   assoc (identity x · f) (identity y) (identity y)) @
! assoc (identity x · f · identity y) (identity y)
    (g · identity z) @
maponpaths (compose (identity x · f · identity y))
  (assoc (identity y) g (identity z)) @
cancel_postcomposition (identity x · f · identity y)
  ((# (functor_identity C))%cat f)
  (identity y · g · identity z)
  (id_right (identity x · f) @ id_left f) @
maponpaths (compose ((# (functor_identity C))%cat f))
  (id_right (identity y · g) @ id_left g) @
! functor_comp (functor_identity C) f g = ?y'
 shelve.
       
C: category
D', D: disp_cat C
FF: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D' D
FF_split: disp_functor_disp_ess_split_surj FF
FF_ff: disp_functor_ff FF
FFweq:= λ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
disp_functor_ff_weq FF FF_ff xx yy f: ∏ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
xx -->[ f] yy
≃ FF x xx -->[
  (# (functor_identity C))%cat f] 
  FF y yy
FFinv:= λ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
disp_functor_ff_inv FF FF_ff: ∏ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
FF x xx -->[
(# (functor_identity C))%cat f] 
FF y yy → xx -->[ f] yy
x, y, z: C
xx: D x
yy: pr1 D y
zz: pr1 D z
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: yy -->[ g] zz
transportf
  (mor_disp (FF x (pr1 (FF_split x xx)))
     (FF z (pr1 (FF_split z zz))))
  (id_right (identity x · (f · g)) @ id_left (f · g))
  (pr2 (FF_split x xx) ;; (ff ;; gg) ;; inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
                                          (pr2
                                             (FF_split
                                                z zz))) =
transportf
  (mor_disp (FF x (pr1 (FF_split x xx)))
     (FF z (pr1 (FF_split z zz)))) ?y'
  (pr2 (FF_split x xx) ;; ff ;; (gg ;; inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
                                         (pr2
                                            (FF_split
                                               z zz))))

    
C: category
D', D: disp_cat C
FF: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D' D
FF_split: disp_functor_disp_ess_split_surj FF
FF_ff: disp_functor_ff FF
FFweq:= λ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
disp_functor_ff_weq FF FF_ff xx yy f: ∏ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
xx -->[ f] yy
≃ FF x xx -->[
  (# (functor_identity C))%cat f] 
  FF y yy
FFinv:= λ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
disp_functor_ff_inv FF FF_ff: ∏ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
FF x xx -->[
(# (functor_identity C))%cat f] 
FF y yy → xx -->[ f] yy
x, y, z: C
xx: D x
yy: pr1 D y
zz: pr1 D z
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: yy -->[ g] zz
transportf
  (mor_disp (FF x (pr1 (FF_split x xx)))
     (FF z (pr1 (FF_split z zz))))
  (id_right (identity x · (f · g)) @ id_left (f · g))
  (pr2 (FF_split x xx) ;; (ff ;; gg) ;; inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
                                          (pr2
                                             (FF_split
                                                z zz))) =
?b
C: category
D', D: disp_cat C
FF: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D' D
FF_split: disp_functor_disp_ess_split_surj FF
FF_ff: disp_functor_ff FF
FFweq:= λ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
disp_functor_ff_weq FF FF_ff xx yy f: ∏ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
xx -->[ f] yy
≃ FF x xx -->[
  (# (functor_identity C))%cat f] 
  FF y yy
FFinv:= λ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
disp_functor_ff_inv FF FF_ff: ∏ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
FF x xx -->[
(# (functor_identity C))%cat f] 
FF y yy → xx -->[ f] yy
x, y, z: C
xx: D x
yy: pr1 D y
zz: pr1 D z
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: yy -->[ g] zz
?b =
transportf
  (mor_disp (FF x (pr1 (FF_split x xx)))
     (FF z (pr1 (FF_split z zz)))) 
  ?y'
  (pr2 (FF_split x xx) ;; ff ;; 
   (gg ;; inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
            (pr2 (FF_split z zz))))

D', D: disp_cat C

pr2 (FF_split x xx) ;; (ff ;; gg) ;; inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso

gg: yy -->[ g] zz
transportf
  (mor_disp (FF x (pr1 (FF_split x xx)))
     (FF z (pr1 (FF_split z zz))))
  (id_right (identity x · (f · g)) @ id_left (f · g))
  ?t2 =
transportf
  (mor_disp (FF x (pr1 (FF_split x xx)))
     (FF z (pr1 (FF_split z zz)))) 
  ?y'
  (pr2 (FF_split x xx) ;; ff ;; 
   (gg ;; inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
            (pr2 (FF_split z zz))))

      
C: category
D', D: disp_cat C
FF: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D' D
FF_split: disp_functor_disp_ess_split_surj FF
FF_ff: disp_functor_ff FF
FFweq:= λ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
disp_functor_ff_weq FF FF_ff xx yy f: ∏ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
xx -->[ f] yy
≃ FF x xx -->[
  (# (functor_identity C))%cat f] 
  FF y yy
FFinv:= λ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
disp_functor_ff_inv FF FF_ff: ∏ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
FF x xx -->[
(# (functor_identity C))%cat f] 
FF y yy → xx -->[ f] yy
x, y, z: C
xx: D x
yy: pr1 D y
zz: pr1 D z
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: yy -->[ g] zz
pr2 (FF_split x xx) ;; (ff ;; gg) ;; inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
                                       (pr2
                                          (FF_split z
                                             zz)) = 
?b

D', D: disp_cat C

(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
disp_functor_ff_weq FF FF_ff xx yy f: ∏ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
xx -->[ f] yy

  (# (functor_identity C))%cat f]

(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
disp_functor_ff_inv FF FF_ff: ∏ (x y : C) (xx : D' x)

disp_functor_ff_weq FF FF_ff xx yy f: ∏ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
xx -->[ f] yy

  (# (functor_identity C))%cat f]

(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
disp_functor_ff_inv FF FF_ff: ∏ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),

  (mor_disp (FF x (pr1 (FF_split x xx)))

  (id_right (identity x · (f · g)) @ id_left (f · g))

     (mor_disp (FF x (pr1 (FF_split x xx)))
        (FF z (pr1 (FF_split z zz))))

        (identity z) (! assoc (identity x) f g))

xx -->[ f] yy

(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),

zz: pr1 D z

        (assoc (identity x · f) g (identity z))

                                               z zz))))

FF_ff: disp_functor_ff FF
FFweq:= λ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
disp_functor_ff_weq FF FF_ff xx yy f: ∏ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
xx -->[ f] yy
≃ FF x xx -->[
  (# (functor_identity C))%cat f] 
  FF y yy
FFinv:= λ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
disp_functor_ff_inv FF FF_ff: ∏ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
FF x xx -->[
(# (functor_identity C))%cat f] 
FF y yy → xx -->[ f] yy
x, y, z: C
xx: D x
yy: pr1 D y
zz: pr1 D z
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: yy -->[ g] zz
?b =
transportf
  (mor_disp (FF x (pr1 (FF_split x xx)))
     (FF z (pr1 (FF_split z zz)))) 
  ?y'
  (pr2 (FF_split x xx) ;; ff ;; 
   (gg ;; inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
            (pr2 (FF_split z zz))))
 
C: category
D', D: disp_cat C
FF: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D' D
FF_split: disp_functor_disp_ess_split_surj FF
FF_ff: disp_functor_ff FF
FFweq:= λ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
disp_functor_ff_weq FF FF_ff xx yy f: ∏ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
xx -->[ f] yy
≃ FF x xx -->[
  (# (functor_identity C))%cat f] 
  FF y yy
FFinv:= λ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
disp_functor_ff_inv FF FF_ff: ∏ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
FF x xx -->[
(# (functor_identity C))%cat f] 
FF y yy → xx -->[ f] yy
x, y, z: C
xx: D x
yy: pr1 D y
zz: pr1 D z
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: yy -->[ g] zz
transportf
  (mor_disp (FF x (pr1 (FF_split x xx)))
     (FF z (pr1 (FF_split z zz))))
  (cancel_postcomposition (identity x · f · g)
     (identity x · (f · g)) (identity z)
     (! assoc (identity x) f g) @
   id_right (identity x · (f · g)) @ id_left (f · g))
  (transportf
     (mor_disp (FF x (pr1 (FF_split x xx)))
        (FF z (pr1 (FF_split z zz))))
     (assoc (identity x · f) g (identity z))
     (pr2 (FF_split x xx) ;; ff ;; (gg ;; inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
                                            (pr2
                                               (FF_split
                                                 z zz))))) =
transportf
  (mor_disp (FF x (pr1 (FF_split x xx)))
     (FF z (pr1 (FF_split z zz)))) ?y'
  (pr2 (FF_split x xx) ;; ff ;; (gg ;; inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
                                         (pr2
                                            (FF_split
                                               z zz))))

D', D: disp_cat C
FF: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D' D
FF_split: disp_functor_disp_ess_split_surj FF
FF_ff: disp_functor_ff FF
FFweq:= λ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
disp_functor_ff_weq FF FF_ff xx yy f: ∏ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
xx -->[ f] yy
≃ FF x xx -->[
  (# (functor_identity C))%cat f] 
  FF y yy
FFinv:= λ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
disp_functor_ff_inv FF FF_ff: ∏ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
FF x xx -->[
(# (functor_identity C))%cat f] 
FF y yy → xx -->[ f] yy
x, y, z: C
xx: D x
yy: pr1 D y
zz: pr1 D z
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: yy -->[ g] zz
transportf
  (mor_disp (FF x (pr1 (FF_split x xx)))
     (FF z (pr1 (FF_split z zz))))
  (cancel_postcomposition (identity x · f · g)
     (identity x · (f · g)) (identity z)
     (! assoc (identity x) f g) @
   id_right (identity x · (f · g)) @ id_left (f · g))
  (transportf
     (mor_disp (FF x (pr1 (FF_split x xx)))
        (FF z (pr1 (FF_split z zz))))
     (assoc (identity x · f) g (identity z))
     (pr2 (FF_split x xx) ;; ff ;; (gg ;; inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
                                            (pr2
                                               (FF_split
                                                 z zz))))) =
?b
C: category
D', D: disp_cat C
FF: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D' D

FF_ff: disp_functor_ff FF

disp_functor_ff_weq FF FF_ff xx yy f: ∏ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
xx -->[ f] yy
≃ FF x xx -->[
  (# (functor_identity C))%cat f] 
  FF y yy
FFinv:= λ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
disp_functor_ff_inv FF FF_ff: ∏ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),

(# (functor_identity C))%cat f] 
FF y yy → xx -->[ f] yy

yy: pr1 D y
zz: pr1 D z
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy

transportf
  (mor_disp (FF x (pr1 (FF_split x xx)))
     (FF z (pr1 (FF_split z zz))))

C: category
D', D: disp_cat C
FF: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D' D
FF_split: disp_functor_disp_ess_split_surj FF
FF_ff: disp_functor_ff FF
FFweq:= λ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
disp_functor_ff_weq FF FF_ff xx yy f: ∏ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
xx -->[ f] yy
≃ FF x xx -->[
  (# (functor_identity C))%cat f] 
  FF y yy
FFinv:= λ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
disp_functor_ff_inv FF FF_ff: ∏ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
FF x xx -->[
(# (functor_identity C))%cat f] 
FF y yy → xx -->[ f] yy
x, y, z: C
xx: D x
yy: pr1 D y
zz: pr1 D z
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: yy -->[ g] zz
transportf
  (mor_disp (FF x (pr1 (FF_split x xx)))
     (FF z (pr1 (FF_split z zz))))
  (assoc (identity x · f) g (identity z) @
   cancel_postcomposition (identity x · f · g)
     (identity x · (f · g)) (identity z)
     (! assoc (identity x) f g) @
   id_right (identity x · (f · g)) @ id_left (f · g))
  (pr2 (FF_split x xx) ;; ff ;; (gg ;; inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
                                         (pr2
                                            (FF_split
                                               z zz)))) =
transportf
  (mor_disp (FF x (pr1 (FF_split x xx)))
     (FF z (pr1 (FF_split z zz)))) ?y'
  (pr2 (FF_split x xx) ;; ff ;; (gg ;; inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
                                         (pr2
                                            (FF_split
                                               z zz))))

    apply maponpaths_2, homset_property.
    
C: category
D', D: disp_cat C
FF: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D' D
FF_split: disp_functor_disp_ess_split_surj FF
FF_ff: disp_functor_ff FF
FFweq:= λ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
disp_functor_ff_weq FF FF_ff xx yy f: ∏ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
xx -->[ f] yy
≃ FF x xx -->[
  (# (functor_identity C))%cat f] 
  FF y yy
FFinv:= λ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
disp_functor_ff_inv FF FF_ff: ∏ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
FF x xx -->[
(# (functor_identity C))%cat f] 
FF y yy → xx -->[ f] yy
x, y, z: C
xx: D x
yy: pr1 D y
zz: pr1 D z
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: yy -->[ g] zz
identity x · f · (g · identity z) =
(# (functor_identity C))%cat (f · g)
C: category
D', D: disp_cat C
FF: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D' D
FF_split: disp_functor_disp_ess_split_surj FF
FF_ff: disp_functor_ff FF
FFweq:= λ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
disp_functor_ff_weq FF FF_ff xx yy f: ∏ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
xx -->[ f] yy
≃ FF x xx -->[
  (# (functor_identity C))%cat f] 
  FF y yy
FFinv:= λ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
disp_functor_ff_inv FF FF_ff: ∏ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
FF x xx -->[
(# (functor_identity C))%cat f] 
FF y yy → xx -->[ f] yy
x, y, z: C
xx: D x
yy: pr1 D y
zz: pr1 D z
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: yy -->[ g] zz
cancel_postcomposition 
  (identity x · f)
  (identity x · f · identity y · identity y)
  (g · identity z)
  ((! id_right (identity x · f) @
    maponpaths (compose (identity x · f))
      (! z_iso_after_z_iso_inv
           (identity_z_iso (functor_identity C y)))) @
   assoc (identity x · f) (identity y) (identity y)) @
! assoc (identity x · f · identity y) 
    (identity y) (g · identity z) @
maponpaths (compose (identity x · f · identity y))
  (assoc (identity y) g (identity z)) @
cancel_postcomposition 
  (identity x · f · identity y)
  ((# (functor_identity C))%cat f)
  (identity y · g · identity z)
  (id_right (identity x · f) @ id_left f) @
maponpaths (compose ((# (functor_identity C))%cat f))
  (id_right (identity y · g) @ id_left g) @
! functor_comp (functor_identity C) f g = 
?y'
 2: apply idpath.
Qed.

Definition GG : disp_functor _ _ _ := (_ ,, GG_ax).

Definition ε_ses_ff_data
  : disp_nat_trans_data (nat_trans_id _ )
      (disp_functor_composite GG FF) (disp_functor_identity _ )
:= λ x xx, (pr2 (FF_split x xx)).


C: category
D', D: disp_cat C
FF: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D' D
FF_split: disp_functor_disp_ess_split_surj FF
FF_ff: disp_functor_ff FF
FFweq:= λ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
disp_functor_ff_weq FF FF_ff xx yy f: ∏ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
xx -->[ f] yy
≃ FF x xx -->[
  (# (functor_identity C))%cat f] 
  FF y yy
FFinv:= λ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
disp_functor_ff_inv FF FF_ff: ∏ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
FF x xx -->[
(# (functor_identity C))%cat f] 
FF y yy → xx -->[ f] yy
disp_nat_trans_axioms ε_ses_ff_data


C: category
D', D: disp_cat C
FF: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D' D
FF_split: disp_functor_disp_ess_split_surj FF
FF_ff: disp_functor_ff FF
FFweq:= λ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
disp_functor_ff_weq FF FF_ff xx yy f: ∏ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
xx -->[ f] yy
≃ FF x xx -->[
  (# (functor_identity C))%cat f] 
  FF y yy
FFinv:= λ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
disp_functor_ff_inv FF FF_ff: ∏ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
FF x xx -->[
(# (functor_identity C))%cat f] 
FF y yy → xx -->[ f] yy
disp_nat_trans_axioms ε_ses_ff_data

  
C: category
D', D: disp_cat C
FF: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D' D
FF_split: disp_functor_disp_ess_split_surj FF
FF_ff: disp_functor_ff FF
FFweq:= λ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
disp_functor_ff_weq FF FF_ff xx yy f: ∏ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
xx -->[ f] yy
≃ FF x xx -->[
  (# (functor_identity C))%cat f] 
  FF y yy
FFinv:= λ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
disp_functor_ff_inv FF FF_ff: ∏ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
FF x xx -->[
(# (functor_identity C))%cat f] 
FF y yy → xx -->[ f] yy
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D x
yy: D y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
♯ (disp_functor_composite GG FF) ff ;; ε_ses_ff_data y
                                         yy =
transportb
  (mor_disp (disp_functor_composite GG FF x xx)
     (disp_functor_identity D y yy))
  (nat_trans_ax
     (nat_trans_id
        (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C)) x y
     f)
  (ε_ses_ff_data x xx ;; ♯ (disp_functor_identity D)
                           ff)
 
C: category
D', D: disp_cat C
FF: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D' D
FF_split: disp_functor_disp_ess_split_surj FF
FF_ff: disp_functor_ff FF
FFweq:= λ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
disp_functor_ff_weq FF FF_ff xx yy f: ∏ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
xx -->[ f] yy
≃ FF x xx -->[
  (# (functor_identity C))%cat f] 
  FF y yy
FFinv:= λ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
disp_functor_ff_inv FF FF_ff: ∏ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
FF x xx -->[
(# (functor_identity C))%cat f] 
FF y yy → xx -->[ f] yy
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D x
yy: D y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
♯ FF
  (FFinv
     (transportf
        (mor_disp (FF x (pr1 (FF_split x xx)))
           (FF y (pr1 (FF_split y yy))))
        (id_right (identity x · f) @ id_left f)
        (pr2 (FF_split x xx) ;; ff ;; inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
                                        (pr2
                                           (FF_split y
                                              yy))))) ;; 
ε_ses_ff_data y yy =
transportb (mor_disp (FF x (pr1 (FF_split x xx))) yy)
  (is_nat_trans_id
     (functor_composite_data (functor_identity_data C)
        (functor_identity_data C)) x y f)
  (ε_ses_ff_data x xx ;; ff)
 
C: category
D', D: disp_cat C
FF: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D' D
FF_split: disp_functor_disp_ess_split_surj FF
FF_ff: disp_functor_ff FF
FFweq:= λ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
disp_functor_ff_weq FF FF_ff xx yy f: ∏ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
xx -->[ f] yy
≃ FF x xx -->[
  (# (functor_identity C))%cat f] 
  FF y yy
FFinv:= λ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
disp_functor_ff_inv FF FF_ff: ∏ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
FF x xx -->[
(# (functor_identity C))%cat f] 
FF y yy → xx -->[ f] yy
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D x
yy: D y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
♯ FF
  (FFinv
     (transportf
        (mor_disp (FF x (pr1 (FF_split x xx)))
           (FF y (pr1 (FF_split y yy))))
        (id_right (identity x · f) @ id_left f)
        (pr2 (FF_split x xx) ;; ff ;; inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
                                        (pr2
                                           (FF_split y
                                              yy))))) ;; 
pr2 (FF_split y yy) =
transportb (mor_disp (FF x (pr1 (FF_split x xx))) yy)
  (is_nat_trans_id
     (functor_composite_data (functor_identity_data C)
        (functor_identity_data C)) x y f)
  (pr2 (FF_split x xx) ;; ff)

  
C: category
D', D: disp_cat C
FF: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D' D
FF_split: disp_functor_disp_ess_split_surj FF
FF_ff: disp_functor_ff FF
FFweq:= λ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
disp_functor_ff_weq FF FF_ff xx yy f: ∏ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
xx -->[ f] yy
≃ FF x xx -->[
  (# (functor_identity C))%cat f] 
  FF y yy
FFinv:= λ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
disp_functor_ff_inv FF FF_ff: ∏ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
FF x xx -->[
(# (functor_identity C))%cat f] 
FF y yy → xx -->[ f] yy
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D x
yy: D y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
♯ FF
  (FFinv
     (transportf
        (mor_disp (FF x (pr1 (FF_split x xx)))
           (FF y (pr1 (FF_split y yy))))
        (id_right (identity x · f) @ id_left f)
        (pr2 (FF_split x xx) ;; ff ;; inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
                                        (pr2
                                           (FF_split y
                                              yy))))) ;; 
pr2 (FF_split y yy) = ?b
C: category
D', D: disp_cat C
FF: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D' D
FF_split: disp_functor_disp_ess_split_surj FF
FF_ff: disp_functor_ff FF
FFweq:= λ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
disp_functor_ff_weq FF FF_ff xx yy f: ∏ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
xx -->[ f] yy
≃ FF x xx -->[
  (# (functor_identity C))%cat f] 
  FF y yy
FFinv:= λ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
disp_functor_ff_inv FF FF_ff: ∏ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
FF x xx -->[
(# (functor_identity C))%cat f] 
FF y yy → xx -->[ f] yy
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D x
yy: D y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
?b =
transportb (mor_disp (FF x (pr1 (FF_split x xx))) yy)
  (is_nat_trans_id
     (functor_composite_data 
        (functor_identity_data C)
        (functor_identity_data C)) x y f)
  (pr2 (FF_split x xx) ;; ff)
 
C: category
D', D: disp_cat C
FF: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D' D
FF_split: disp_functor_disp_ess_split_surj FF
FF_ff: disp_functor_ff FF
FFweq:= λ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
disp_functor_ff_weq FF FF_ff xx yy f: ∏ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
xx -->[ f] yy
≃ FF x xx -->[
  (# (functor_identity C))%cat f] 
  FF y yy
FFinv:= λ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
disp_functor_ff_inv FF FF_ff: ∏ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
FF x xx -->[
(# (functor_identity C))%cat f] 
FF y yy → xx -->[ f] yy
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D x
yy: D y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
transportf
  (mor_disp (FF x (pr1 (FF_split x xx)))
     (FF y (pr1 (FF_split y yy))))
  (id_right (identity x · f) @ id_left f)
  (pr2 (FF_split x xx) ;; ff ;; inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
                                  (pr2 (FF_split y yy))) ;; 
pr2 (FF_split y yy) =
transportb (mor_disp (FF x (pr1 (FF_split x xx))) yy)
  (is_nat_trans_id
     (functor_composite_data (functor_identity_data C)
        (functor_identity_data C)) x y f)
  (pr2 (FF_split x xx) ;; ff)

  
C: category
D', D: disp_cat C
FF: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D' D
FF_split: disp_functor_disp_ess_split_surj FF
FF_ff: disp_functor_ff FF
FFweq:= λ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
disp_functor_ff_weq FF FF_ff xx yy f: ∏ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
xx -->[ f] yy
≃ FF x xx -->[
  (# (functor_identity C))%cat f] 
  FF y yy
FFinv:= λ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
disp_functor_ff_inv FF FF_ff: ∏ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
FF x xx -->[
(# (functor_identity C))%cat f] 
FF y yy → xx -->[ f] yy
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D x
yy: D y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
transportf
  (mor_disp (FF x (pr1 (FF_split x xx)))
     (FF y (pr1 (FF_split y yy))))
  (id_right (identity x · f) @ id_left f)
  (pr2 (FF_split x xx) ;; ff ;; inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
                                  (pr2 (FF_split y yy))) ;; 
pr2 (FF_split y yy) = ?b
C: category
D', D: disp_cat C
FF: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D' D
FF_split: disp_functor_disp_ess_split_surj FF
FF_ff: disp_functor_ff FF
FFweq:= λ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
disp_functor_ff_weq FF FF_ff xx yy f: ∏ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
xx -->[ f] yy
≃ FF x xx -->[
  (# (functor_identity C))%cat f] 
  FF y yy
FFinv:= λ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
disp_functor_ff_inv FF FF_ff: ∏ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
FF x xx -->[
(# (functor_identity C))%cat f] 
FF y yy → xx -->[ f] yy
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D x
yy: D y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
?b =
transportb (mor_disp (FF x (pr1 (FF_split x xx))) yy)
  (is_nat_trans_id
     (functor_composite_data 
        (functor_identity_data C)
        (functor_identity_data C)) x y f)
  (pr2 (FF_split x xx) ;; ff)
 
C: category
D', D: disp_cat C
FF: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D' D
FF_split: disp_functor_disp_ess_split_surj FF
FF_ff: disp_functor_ff FF
FFweq:= λ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
disp_functor_ff_weq FF FF_ff xx yy f: ∏ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
xx -->[ f] yy
≃ FF x xx -->[
  (# (functor_identity C))%cat f] 
  FF y yy

(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
disp_functor_ff_inv FF FF_ff: ∏ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
FF x xx -->[
(# (functor_identity C))%cat f] 
FF y yy → xx -->[ f] yy
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D x
yy: D y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
transportf (mor_disp (FF x (pr1 (FF_split x xx))) yy)
  (cancel_postcomposition
     (identity x · f · identity y) f (identity y)
     (id_right (identity x · f) @ id_left f))
  (pr2 (FF_split x xx) ;; ff ;; inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
                                  (pr2 (FF_split y yy)) ;; 
   pr2 (FF_split y yy)) =
transportb (mor_disp (FF x (pr1 (FF_split x xx))) yy)
  (is_nat_trans_id
     (functor_composite_data (functor_identity_data C)
        (functor_identity_data C)) x y f)

FFweq:= λ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
disp_functor_ff_weq FF FF_ff xx yy f: ∏ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
xx -->[ f] yy
≃ FF x xx -->[
  (# (functor_identity C))%cat f] 
  FF y yy
FFinv:= λ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
disp_functor_ff_inv FF FF_ff: ∏ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
FF x xx -->[
(# (functor_identity C))%cat f] 
FF y yy → xx -->[ f] yy
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D x
yy: D y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
transportf (mor_disp (FF x (pr1 (FF_split x xx))) yy)
  (cancel_postcomposition
     (identity x · f · identity y) f 
     (identity y)
     (id_right (identity x · f) @ id_left f))
  (transportf
     (mor_disp (FF x (pr1 (FF_split x xx))) yy)
     (assoc (identity x · f) (identity y) (identity y))
     ?t2) =
transportb (mor_disp (FF x (pr1 (FF_split x xx))) yy)
  (is_nat_trans_id
     (functor_composite_data 
        (functor_identity_data C)
        (functor_identity_data C)) x y f)
  (pr2 (FF_split x xx) ;; ff)

yy: D y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso (pr2 (FF_split y yy)) ;; pr2
                                                 (FF_split
                                                 y yy) =
?t20

FF_ff: disp_functor_ff FF
FFweq:= λ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
disp_functor_ff_weq FF FF_ff xx yy f: ∏ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
xx -->[ f] yy
≃ FF x xx -->[
  (# (functor_identity C))%cat f] 
  FF y yy
FFinv:= λ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
disp_functor_ff_inv FF FF_ff: ∏ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
FF x xx -->[
(# (functor_identity C))%cat f] 
FF y yy → xx -->[ f] yy
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D x
yy: D y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
transportf (mor_disp (FF x (pr1 (FF_split x xx))) yy)
  (assoc (identity x · f) (identity y) (identity y) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (identity x · f · identity y) f (identity y)
     (id_right (identity x · f) @ id_left f))
  (transportf
     (mor_disp (FF x (pr1 (FF_split x xx))) yy)
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x · f))
        (! z_iso_after_z_iso_inv
             (identity_z_iso (functor_identity C y))))
     (transportb
        (mor_disp (FF x (pr1 (FF_split x xx))) yy)
        (id_right (identity x · f))
        (pr2 (FF_split x xx) ;; ff))) = ?b
C: category
D', D: disp_cat C
FF: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D' D
FF_split: disp_functor_disp_ess_split_surj FF
FF_ff: disp_functor_ff FF
FFweq:= λ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
disp_functor_ff_weq FF FF_ff xx yy f: ∏ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
xx -->[ f] yy
≃ FF x xx -->[
  (# (functor_identity C))%cat f] 
  FF y yy
FFinv:= λ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
disp_functor_ff_inv FF FF_ff: ∏ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
FF x xx -->[
(# (functor_identity C))%cat f] 
FF y yy → xx -->[ f] yy
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D x
yy: D y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
?b =
transportb (mor_disp (FF x (pr1 (FF_split x xx))) yy)
  (is_nat_trans_id
     (functor_composite_data 
        (functor_identity_data C)
        (functor_identity_data C)) x y f)
  (pr2 (FF_split x xx) ;; ff)
 
C: category
D', D: disp_cat C
FF: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D' D
FF_split: disp_functor_disp_ess_split_surj FF
FF_ff: disp_functor_ff FF
FFweq:= λ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
disp_functor_ff_weq FF FF_ff xx yy f: ∏ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
xx -->[ f] yy
≃ FF x xx -->[
  (# (functor_identity C))%cat f] 
  FF y yy

(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
disp_functor_ff_inv FF FF_ff: ∏ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
FF x xx -->[
(# (functor_identity C))%cat f] 
FF y yy → xx -->[ f] yy
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D x
yy: D y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
transportf (mor_disp (FF x (pr1 (FF_split x xx))) yy)
  (maponpaths (compose (identity x · f))
     (! z_iso_after_z_iso_inv
          (identity_z_iso (functor_identity C y))) @
   assoc (identity x · f) (identity y) (identity y) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (identity x · f · identity y) f (identity y)
     (id_right (identity x · f) @ id_left f))
  (transportb
     (mor_disp (FF x (pr1 (FF_split x xx))) yy)
     (id_right (identity x · f))
     (pr2 (FF_split x xx) ;; ff)) =
transportb (mor_disp (FF x (pr1 (FF_split x xx))) yy)
  (is_nat_trans_id
     (functor_composite_data (functor_identity_data C)
        (functor_identity_data C)) x y f)
  (pr2 (FF_split x xx) ;; ff)

D', D: disp_cat C
FF: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D' D
FF_split: disp_functor_disp_ess_split_surj FF
FF_ff: disp_functor_ff FF
FFweq:= λ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
disp_functor_ff_weq FF FF_ff xx yy f: ∏ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
xx -->[ f] yy
≃ FF x xx -->[
  (# (functor_identity C))%cat f] 
  FF y yy
FFinv:= λ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
disp_functor_ff_inv FF FF_ff: ∏ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
FF x xx -->[
(# (functor_identity C))%cat f] 
FF y yy → xx -->[ f] yy
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D x
yy: D y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
transportf (mor_disp (FF x (pr1 (FF_split x xx))) yy)
  (! id_right (identity x · f) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x · f))
     (! z_iso_after_z_iso_inv
          (identity_z_iso (functor_identity C y))) @
   assoc (identity x · f) (identity y) (identity y) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (identity x · f · identity y) f (identity y)
     (id_right (identity x · f) @ id_left f))
  (pr2 (FF_split x xx) ;; ff) =
transportb (mor_disp (FF x (pr1 (FF_split x xx))) yy)
  (is_nat_trans_id
     (functor_composite_data (functor_identity_data C)
        (functor_identity_data C)) x y f)
  (pr2 (FF_split x xx) ;; ff)

  
C: category
D', D: disp_cat C
FF: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D' D
FF_split: disp_functor_disp_ess_split_surj FF
FF_ff: disp_functor_ff FF
FFweq:= λ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
disp_functor_ff_weq FF FF_ff xx yy f: ∏ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
xx -->[ f] yy
≃ FF x xx -->[
  (# (functor_identity C))%cat f] 
  FF y yy
FFinv:= λ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
disp_functor_ff_inv FF FF_ff: ∏ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
FF x xx -->[
(# (functor_identity C))%cat f] 
FF y yy → xx -->[ f] yy
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D x
yy: D y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
transportf (mor_disp (FF x (pr1 (FF_split x xx))) yy)
  (! id_right (identity x · f) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x · f))
     (! z_iso_after_z_iso_inv
          (identity_z_iso (functor_identity C y))) @
   assoc (identity x · f) (identity y) (identity y) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (identity x · f · identity y) f (identity y)
     (id_right (identity x · f) @ id_left f))
  (pr2 (FF_split x xx) ;; ff) =
transportf (mor_disp (FF x (pr1 (FF_split x xx))) yy)
  (! is_nat_trans_id
       (functor_composite_data
          (functor_identity_data C)
          (functor_identity_data C)) x y f)
  (pr2 (FF_split x xx) ;; ff)
 apply maponpaths_2, homset_property.
Qed.

Definition ε_ses_ff
  : disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id _ )
      (disp_functor_composite GG FF) (disp_functor_identity _ )
:= (ε_ses_ff_data,, ε_ses_ff_ax).


C: category
D', D: disp_cat C
FF: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D' D
FF_split: disp_functor_disp_ess_split_surj FF
FF_ff: disp_functor_ff FF
FFweq:= λ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
disp_functor_ff_weq FF FF_ff xx yy f: ∏ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
xx -->[ f] yy
≃ FF x xx -->[
  (# (functor_identity C))%cat f] 
  FF y yy
FFinv:= λ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
disp_functor_ff_inv FF FF_ff: ∏ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
FF x xx -->[
(# (functor_identity C))%cat f] 
FF y yy → xx -->[ f] yy
disp_nat_trans_data
  (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D')
  (disp_functor_composite FF GG)


C: category
D', D: disp_cat C
FF: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D' D
FF_split: disp_functor_disp_ess_split_surj FF
FF_ff: disp_functor_ff FF
FFweq:= λ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
disp_functor_ff_weq FF FF_ff xx yy f: ∏ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
xx -->[ f] yy
≃ FF x xx -->[
  (# (functor_identity C))%cat f] 
  FF y yy
FFinv:= λ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
disp_functor_ff_inv FF FF_ff: ∏ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
FF x xx -->[
(# (functor_identity C))%cat f] 
FF y yy → xx -->[ f] yy
disp_nat_trans_data
  (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D')
  (disp_functor_composite FF GG)

  
C: category
D', D: disp_cat C
FF: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D' D
FF_split: disp_functor_disp_ess_split_surj FF
FF_ff: disp_functor_ff FF
FFweq:= λ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
disp_functor_ff_weq FF FF_ff xx yy f: ∏ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
xx -->[ f] yy
≃ FF x xx -->[
  (# (functor_identity C))%cat f] 
  FF y yy
FFinv:= λ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
disp_functor_ff_inv FF FF_ff: ∏ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
FF x xx -->[
(# (functor_identity C))%cat f] 
FF y yy → xx -->[ f] yy
x: C
xx: D' x
disp_functor_identity D' x xx -->[
nat_trans_id (functor_identity C) x] disp_functor_composite
                                       FF GG x xx
 
C: category
D', D: disp_cat C
FF: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D' D
FF_split: disp_functor_disp_ess_split_surj FF
FF_ff: disp_functor_ff FF
FFweq:= λ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
disp_functor_ff_weq FF FF_ff xx yy f: ∏ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
xx -->[ f] yy
≃ FF x xx -->[
  (# (functor_identity C))%cat f] 
  FF y yy
FFinv:= λ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
disp_functor_ff_inv FF FF_ff: ∏ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
FF x xx -->[
(# (functor_identity C))%cat f] 
FF y yy → xx -->[ f] yy
x: C
xx: D' x
xx -->[ identity x] pr1 (FF_split x (FF x xx))

  
C: category
D', D: disp_cat C
FF: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D' D
FF_split: disp_functor_disp_ess_split_surj FF
FF_ff: disp_functor_ff FF
FFweq:= λ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
disp_functor_ff_weq FF FF_ff xx yy f: ∏ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
xx -->[ f] yy
≃ FF x xx -->[
  (# (functor_identity C))%cat f] 
  FF y yy
FFinv:= λ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
disp_functor_ff_inv FF FF_ff: ∏ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
FF x xx -->[
(# (functor_identity C))%cat f] 
FF y yy → xx -->[ f] yy
x: C
xx: D' x
FF x xx -->[
(# (functor_identity C))%cat (identity x)] FF x
                                             (pr1
                                                (FF_split
                                                 x
                                                 (FF x
                                                 xx)))

  exact (inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso (pr2 (FF_split _ _))).
Defined.


C: category
D', D: disp_cat C
FF: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D' D
FF_split: disp_functor_disp_ess_split_surj FF
FF_ff: disp_functor_ff FF
FFweq:= λ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
disp_functor_ff_weq FF FF_ff xx yy f: ∏ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
xx -->[ f] yy
≃ FF x xx -->[
  (# (functor_identity C))%cat f] 
  FF y yy
FFinv:= λ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
disp_functor_ff_inv FF FF_ff: ∏ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
FF x xx -->[
(# (functor_identity C))%cat f] 
FF y yy → xx -->[ f] yy
disp_nat_trans_axioms η_ses_ff_data


C: category
D', D: disp_cat C
FF: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D' D
FF_split: disp_functor_disp_ess_split_surj FF
FF_ff: disp_functor_ff FF
FFweq:= λ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
disp_functor_ff_weq FF FF_ff xx yy f: ∏ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
xx -->[ f] yy
≃ FF x xx -->[
  (# (functor_identity C))%cat f] 
  FF y yy
FFinv:= λ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
disp_functor_ff_inv FF FF_ff: ∏ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
FF x xx -->[
(# (functor_identity C))%cat f] 
FF y yy → xx -->[ f] yy
disp_nat_trans_axioms η_ses_ff_data

  
C: category
D', D: disp_cat C
FF: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D' D
FF_split: disp_functor_disp_ess_split_surj FF
FF_ff: disp_functor_ff FF
FFweq:= λ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
disp_functor_ff_weq FF FF_ff xx yy f: ∏ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
xx -->[ f] yy
≃ FF x xx -->[
  (# (functor_identity C))%cat f] 
  FF y yy
FFinv:= λ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
disp_functor_ff_inv FF FF_ff: ∏ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
FF x xx -->[
(# (functor_identity C))%cat f] 
FF y yy → xx -->[ f] yy
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D' x
yy: D' y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
♯ (disp_functor_identity D') ff ;; η_ses_ff_data y yy =
transportb
  (mor_disp (disp_functor_identity D' x xx)
     (disp_functor_composite FF GG y yy))
  (nat_trans_ax (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C)) x
     y f)
  (η_ses_ff_data x xx ;; ♯ (disp_functor_composite FF
                              GG) ff)
 
C: category
D', D: disp_cat C
FF: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D' D
FF_split: disp_functor_disp_ess_split_surj FF
FF_ff: disp_functor_ff FF
FFweq:= λ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
disp_functor_ff_weq FF FF_ff xx yy f: ∏ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
xx -->[ f] yy
≃ FF x xx -->[
  (# (functor_identity C))%cat f] 
  FF y yy
FFinv:= λ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
disp_functor_ff_inv FF FF_ff: ∏ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
FF x xx -->[
(# (functor_identity C))%cat f] 
FF y yy → xx -->[ f] yy
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D' x
yy: D' y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
ff ;; η_ses_ff_data y yy =
transportb (mor_disp xx (pr1 (FF_split y (FF y yy))))
  (is_nat_trans_id (functor_identity_data C) x y f)
  (η_ses_ff_data x xx ;; FFinv
                           (transportf
                              (mor_disp
                                 (FF x
                                    (pr1
                                       (FF_split x
                                          (FF x xx))))
                                 (FF y
                                    (pr1
                                       (FF_split y
                                          (FF y yy)))))
                              (id_right
                                 (identity x · f) @
                               id_left f)
                              (pr2
                                 (FF_split x (FF x xx)) ;; 
                               ♯ FF ff ;; inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
                                            (pr2
                                               (FF_split
                                                 y
                                                 (FF y
                                                 yy))))))
 
C: category
D', D: disp_cat C
FF: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D' D
FF_split: disp_functor_disp_ess_split_surj FF
FF_ff: disp_functor_ff FF
FFweq:= λ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
disp_functor_ff_weq FF FF_ff xx yy f: ∏ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
xx -->[ f] yy
≃ FF x xx -->[
  (# (functor_identity C))%cat f] 
  FF y yy
FFinv:= λ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
disp_functor_ff_inv FF FF_ff: ∏ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
FF x xx -->[
(# (functor_identity C))%cat f] 
FF y yy → xx -->[ f] yy
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D' x
yy: D' y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
ff ;; FFinv
        (inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
           (pr2 (FF_split y (FF y yy)))) =
transportb (mor_disp xx (pr1 (FF_split y (FF y yy))))
  (is_nat_trans_id (functor_identity_data C) x y f)
  (FFinv
     (inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
        (pr2 (FF_split x (FF x xx)))) ;; FFinv
                                           (transportf
                                              (mor_disp
                                                 (FF x
                                                 (pr1
                                                 (FF_split
                                                 x
                                                 (FF x
                                                 xx))))
                                                 (FF y
                                                 (pr1
                                                 (FF_split
                                                 y
                                                 (FF y
                                                 yy)))))
                                              (id_right
                                                 (identity
                                                 x · f) @
                                               id_left
                                                 f)
                                              (pr2
                                                 (FF_split
                                                 x
                                                 (FF x
                                                 xx)) ;; 
                                               ♯ FF ff ;; 
                                               inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
                                                 (pr2
                                                 (FF_split
                                                 y
                                                 (FF y
                                                 yy))))))

  (* This feels a bit roundabout.  Can it be simplified? *)

FF_split: disp_functor_disp_ess_split_surj FF
FF_ff: disp_functor_ff FF
FFweq:= λ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
disp_functor_ff_weq FF FF_ff xx yy f: ∏ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
xx -->[ f] yy
≃ FF x xx -->[
  (# (functor_identity C))%cat f] 
  FF y yy
FFinv:= λ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
disp_functor_ff_inv FF FF_ff: ∏ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
FF x xx -->[
(# (functor_identity C))%cat f] 
FF y yy → xx -->[ f] yy
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D' x
yy: D' y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
?b = ?t2
C: category
D', D: disp_cat C
FF: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D' D
FF_split: disp_functor_disp_ess_split_surj FF
FF_ff: disp_functor_ff FF
FFweq:= λ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
disp_functor_ff_weq FF FF_ff xx yy f: ∏ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
xx -->[ f] yy
≃ FF x xx -->[
  (# (functor_identity C))%cat f] 
  FF y yy
FFinv:= λ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
disp_functor_ff_inv FF FF_ff: ∏ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
FF x xx -->[
(# (functor_identity C))%cat f] 
FF y yy → xx -->[ f] yy
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D' x
yy: D' y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
transportb (mor_disp xx (pr1 (FF_split y (FF y yy))))
  (is_nat_trans_id (functor_identity_data C) x y f)
  (disp_functor_ff_inv FF FF_ff ?t2) =
ff ;; FFinv
        (inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
           (pr2 (FF_split y (FF y yy))))
 
C: category
D', D: disp_cat C
FF: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D' D
FF_split: disp_functor_disp_ess_split_surj FF
FF_ff: disp_functor_ff FF
FFweq:= λ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
disp_functor_ff_weq FF FF_ff xx yy f: ∏ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
xx -->[ f] yy
≃ FF x xx -->[
  (# (functor_identity C))%cat f] 
  FF y yy
FFinv:= λ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
disp_functor_ff_inv FF FF_ff: ∏ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
FF x xx -->[
(# (functor_identity C))%cat f] 
FF y yy → xx -->[ f] yy
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D' x
yy: D' y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
transportf
  (mor_disp (FF x xx)
     (FF y (pr1 (FF_split y (FF y yy)))))
  (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (id_right (identity x · f) @ id_left f))
  (inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
     (pr2 (FF_split x (FF x xx))) ;; (pr2
                                        (FF_split x
                                           (FF x xx)) ;; 
                                      ♯ FF ff ;; inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
                                                 (pr2
                                                 (FF_split
                                                 y
                                                 (FF y
                                                 yy))))) =
?t2

FF_ff: disp_functor_ff FF

yy: D' y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy

  (is_nat_trans_id (functor_identity_data C) x y f)
  (disp_functor_ff_inv FF FF_ff ?t2) =
ff ;; FFinv
        (inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
           (pr2 (FF_split y (FF y yy))))

    
C: category
D', D: disp_cat C
FF: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D' D

(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),

(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
FF x xx -->[
(# (functor_identity C))%cat f] 
FF y yy → xx -->[ f] yy
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D' x
yy: D' y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso (pr2 (FF_split x (FF x xx))) ;; 
(pr2 (FF_split x (FF x xx)) ;; ♯ FF ff ;; inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
                                            (pr2
                                               (FF_split
                                                 y

D', D: disp_cat C

xx: D' x
yy: D' y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
transportb (mor_disp xx (pr1 (FF_split y (FF y yy))))
  (is_nat_trans_id (functor_identity_data C) x y f)
  (disp_functor_ff_inv FF FF_ff
     (transportf
        (mor_disp (FF x xx)
           (FF y (pr1 (FF_split y (FF y yy)))))
        (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
           (id_right (identity x · f) @ id_left f))
        ?t2)) =
ff ;; FFinv
        (inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
           (pr2 (FF_split y (FF y yy))))

C: category
D', D: disp_cat C
FF: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D' D
FF_split: disp_functor_disp_ess_split_surj FF
FF_ff: disp_functor_ff FF
FFweq:= λ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
disp_functor_ff_weq FF FF_ff xx yy f: ∏ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
xx -->[ f] yy
≃ FF x xx -->[
  (# (functor_identity C))%cat f] 
  FF y yy

(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
disp_functor_ff_inv FF FF_ff: ∏ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),

FF y yy → xx -->[ f] yy

yy: D' y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
transportb
  (mor_disp (FF x xx)
     (FF y (pr1 (FF_split y (FF y yy)))))
  (assoc (identity x) (identity x · f) (identity y))

     (pr2 (FF_split x (FF x xx))) ;; (pr2
                                        (FF_split x
                                           (FF x xx)) ;; 
                                      ♯ FF ff) ;;

FF_split: disp_functor_disp_ess_split_surj FF
FF_ff: disp_functor_ff FF
FFweq:= λ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
disp_functor_ff_weq FF FF_ff xx yy f: ∏ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
xx -->[ f] yy
≃ FF x xx -->[
  (# (functor_identity C))%cat f] 
  FF y yy
FFinv:= λ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
disp_functor_ff_inv FF FF_ff: ∏ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
FF x xx -->[
(# (functor_identity C))%cat f] 
FF y yy → xx -->[ f] yy
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D' x
yy: D' y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso (pr2 (FF_split x (FF x xx))) ;; 
(pr2 (FF_split x (FF x xx)) ;; ♯ FF ff) = ?y'
C: category
D', D: disp_cat C
FF: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D' D
FF_split: disp_functor_disp_ess_split_surj FF
FF_ff: disp_functor_ff FF
FFweq:= λ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
disp_functor_ff_weq FF FF_ff xx yy f: ∏ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
xx -->[ f] yy
≃ FF x xx -->[
  (# (functor_identity C))%cat f] 
  FF y yy
FFinv:= λ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
disp_functor_ff_inv FF FF_ff: ∏ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
FF x xx -->[
(# (functor_identity C))%cat f] 
FF y yy → xx -->[ f] yy
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D' x
yy: D' y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
?y' ;; inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
         (pr2 (FF_split y (FF y yy))) = 
?t2
C: category
D', D: disp_cat C
FF: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D' D
FF_split: disp_functor_disp_ess_split_surj FF
FF_ff: disp_functor_ff FF
FFweq:= λ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
disp_functor_ff_weq FF FF_ff xx yy f: ∏ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
xx -->[ f] yy
≃ FF x xx -->[
  (# (functor_identity C))%cat f] 
  FF y yy
FFinv:= λ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
disp_functor_ff_inv FF FF_ff: ∏ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
FF x xx -->[
(# (functor_identity C))%cat f] 
FF y yy → xx -->[ f] yy
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D' x
yy: D' y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
transportb (mor_disp xx (pr1 (FF_split y (FF y yy))))
  (is_nat_trans_id (functor_identity_data C) x y f)
  (disp_functor_ff_inv FF FF_ff
     (transportf
        (mor_disp (FF x xx)
           (FF y (pr1 (FF_split y (FF y yy)))))
        (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
           (id_right (identity x · f) @ id_left f))
        (transportb
           (mor_disp (FF x xx)
              (FF y (pr1 (FF_split y (FF y yy)))))
           (assoc (identity x) 
              (identity x · f) 
              (identity y)) 
           ?t2))) =
ff ;; FFinv
        (inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
           (pr2 (FF_split y (FF y yy))))

yy: D' y

inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso (pr2 (FF_split x (FF x xx))) ;; 
(pr2 (FF_split x (FF x xx)) ;; ♯ FF ff) = ?b

     (transportf
        (mor_disp (FF x xx)

        (maponpaths (compose (identity x))

              (FF y (pr1 (FF_split y (FF y yy)))))

C: category
D', D: disp_cat C
FF: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D' D
FF_split: disp_functor_disp_ess_split_surj FF
FF_ff: disp_functor_ff FF
FFweq:= λ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
disp_functor_ff_weq FF FF_ff xx yy f: ∏ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
xx -->[ f] yy
≃ FF x xx -->[
  (# (functor_identity C))%cat f] 
  FF y yy
FFinv:= λ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
disp_functor_ff_inv FF FF_ff: ∏ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
FF x xx -->[
(# (functor_identity C))%cat f] 
FF y yy → xx -->[ f] yy
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D' x
yy: D' y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
transportb (mor_disp (FF x xx) (FF y yy))
  (assoc (identity x) (identity x) f)
  (inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
     (pr2 (FF_split x (FF x xx))) ;; pr2
                                       (FF_split x
                                          (FF x xx)) ;; 
   ♯ FF ff) = ?y'

           (FF y (pr1 (FF_split y (FF y yy)))))
        (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
           (id_right (identity x · f) @ id_left f))
        (transportb
           (mor_disp (FF x xx)
              (FF y (pr1 (FF_split y (FF y yy)))))
           (assoc (identity x) 
              (identity x · f) 
              (identity y)) 
           ?t2))) =
ff ;; FFinv
        (inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
           (pr2 (FF_split y (FF y yy))))

        
C: category
D', D: disp_cat C
FF: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D' D
FF_split: disp_functor_disp_ess_split_surj FF
FF_ff: disp_functor_ff FF
FFweq:= λ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
disp_functor_ff_weq FF FF_ff xx yy f: ∏ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
xx -->[ f] yy
≃ FF x xx -->[
  (# (functor_identity C))%cat f] 
  FF y yy
FFinv:= λ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
disp_functor_ff_inv FF FF_ff: ∏ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
FF x xx -->[
(# (functor_identity C))%cat f] 
FF y yy → xx -->[ f] yy
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D' x
yy: D' y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
transportb (mor_disp (FF x xx) (FF x xx))
  (z_iso_after_z_iso_inv
     (identity_z_iso (functor_identity C x)))
  (id_disp (FF x xx)) ;; ♯ FF ff = ?t20
