D', D: disp_cat C
FF: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D' D
FF_split: disp_functor_disp_ess_split_surj FF
FF_ff: disp_functor_ff FF
FFweq:= λ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
disp_functor_ff_weq FF FF_ff xx yy f: ∏ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
xx -->[ f] yy
≃ FF x xx -->[
  (# (functor_identity C))%cat f] 
  FF y yy
FFinv:= λ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
disp_functor_ff_inv FF FF_ff: ∏ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
FF x xx -->[
(# (functor_identity C))%cat f] 
FF y yy → xx -->[ f] yy
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D' x
yy: D' y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
transportb (mor_disp xx (pr1 (FF_split y (FF y yy))))
  (is_nat_trans_id (functor_identity_data C) x y f)
  (disp_functor_ff_inv FF FF_ff
     (transportf
        (mor_disp (FF x xx)
           (FF y (pr1 (FF_split y (FF y yy)))))
        (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
           (id_right (identity x · f) @ id_left f))
        (transportb
           (mor_disp (FF x xx)
              (FF y (pr1 (FF_split y (FF y yy)))))
           (assoc (identity x) 
              (identity x · f) 
              (identity y)) 
           ?t2))) =
ff ;; FFinv
        (inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
           (pr2 (FF_split y (FF y yy))))

      
C: category
D', D: disp_cat C
FF: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D' D
FF_split: disp_functor_disp_ess_split_surj FF
FF_ff: disp_functor_ff FF
FFweq:= λ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
disp_functor_ff_weq FF FF_ff xx yy f: ∏ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
xx -->[ f] yy
≃ FF x xx -->[
  (# (functor_identity C))%cat f] 
  FF y yy
FFinv:= λ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
disp_functor_ff_inv FF FF_ff: ∏ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
FF x xx -->[
(# (functor_identity C))%cat f] 
FF y yy → xx -->[ f] yy
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D' x
yy: D' y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
transportb (mor_disp (FF x xx) (FF y yy))
  (assoc (identity x) (identity x) f)
  (transportf (mor_disp (FF x xx) (FF y yy))
     (! id_left f @
      cancel_postcomposition
        (identity (functor_identity C x))
        (identity x · identity x) f
        (! z_iso_after_z_iso_inv
             (identity_z_iso (functor_identity C x))))
     (♯ FF ff)) ;; inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
                     (pr2 (FF_split y (FF y yy))) =
?t2

D', D: disp_cat C

(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),

FF y yy → xx -->[ f] yy

xx: D' x
yy: D' y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
transportb (mor_disp xx (pr1 (FF_split y (FF y yy))))
  (is_nat_trans_id (functor_identity_data C) x y f)
  (disp_functor_ff_inv FF FF_ff
     (transportf
        (mor_disp (FF x xx)
           (FF y (pr1 (FF_split y (FF y yy)))))
        (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
           (id_right (identity x · f) @ id_left f))
        (transportb
           (mor_disp (FF x xx)
              (FF y (pr1 (FF_split y (FF y yy)))))
           (assoc (identity x) 
              (identity x · f) 
              (identity y)) 
           ?t2))) =
ff ;; FFinv
        (inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
           (pr2 (FF_split y (FF y yy))))

D', D: disp_cat C

FF_ff: disp_functor_ff FF

D', D: disp_cat C

disp_functor_ff_inv FF FF_ff: ∏ (x y : C) (xx : D' x)

xx: D' x
yy: D' y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy

  (is_nat_trans_id (functor_identity_data C) x y f)
  (disp_functor_ff_inv FF FF_ff
     (transportf
        (mor_disp (FF x xx)
           (FF y (pr1 (FF_split y (FF y yy)))))
        (maponpaths (compose (identity x))

C: category
D', D: disp_cat C
FF: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D' D
FF_split: disp_functor_disp_ess_split_surj FF
FF_ff: disp_functor_ff FF
FFweq:= λ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
disp_functor_ff_weq FF FF_ff xx yy f: ∏ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
xx -->[ f] yy
≃ FF x xx -->[
  (# (functor_identity C))%cat f] 
  FF y yy
FFinv:= λ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
disp_functor_ff_inv FF FF_ff: ∏ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
FF x xx -->[
(# (functor_identity C))%cat f] 
FF y yy → xx -->[ f] yy
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D' x
yy: D' y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
transportf (mor_disp (FF x xx) (FF y yy))
  ((! id_left f @
    cancel_postcomposition
      (identity (functor_identity C x))
      (identity x · identity x) f
      (! z_iso_after_z_iso_inv
           (identity_z_iso (functor_identity C x)))) @
   ! assoc (identity x) (identity x) f) (♯ FF ff) ;; 
inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso (pr2 (FF_split y (FF y yy))) =
?t2

  (is_nat_trans_id (functor_identity_data C) x y f)

        (maponpaths (compose (identity x))

C: category
D', D: disp_cat C
FF: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D' D
FF_split: disp_functor_disp_ess_split_surj FF
FF_ff: disp_functor_ff FF
FFweq:= λ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
disp_functor_ff_weq FF FF_ff xx yy f: ∏ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
xx -->[ f] yy
≃ FF x xx -->[
  (# (functor_identity C))%cat f] 
  FF y yy
FFinv:= λ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
disp_functor_ff_inv FF FF_ff: ∏ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
FF x xx -->[
(# (functor_identity C))%cat f] 
FF y yy → xx -->[ f] yy
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D' x
yy: D' y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
transportb (mor_disp xx (pr1 (FF_split y (FF y yy))))
  (is_nat_trans_id (functor_identity_data C) x y f)
  (disp_functor_ff_inv FF FF_ff
     (transportf
        (mor_disp (FF x xx)
           (FF y (pr1 (FF_split y (FF y yy)))))
        (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
           (id_right (identity x · f) @ id_left f))
        (transportb
           (mor_disp (FF x xx)
              (FF y (pr1 (FF_split y (FF y yy)))))
           (assoc (identity x) (identity x · f)
              (identity y))
           (transportf
              (mor_disp (FF x xx)
                 (FF y (pr1 (FF_split y (FF y yy)))))
              (cancel_postcomposition f
                 (identity x · (identity x · f))
                 (identity y)
                 ((! id_left f @
                   cancel_postcomposition
                     (identity (functor_identity C x))
                     (identity x · identity x) f
                     (! z_iso_after_z_iso_inv
                          (identity_z_iso
                             (functor_identity C x)))) @
                  ! assoc (identity x) (identity x) f))
              (♯ FF ff ;; inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
                            (pr2
                               (FF_split y (FF y yy)))))))) =
ff ;; FFinv
        (inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
           (pr2 (FF_split y (FF y yy))))

xx -->[ f] yy

yy: D' y

  (is_nat_trans_id (functor_identity_data C) x y f)

     (transportf
        (mor_disp (FF x xx)
           (FF y (pr1 (FF_split y (FF y yy)))))
        (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
           (id_right (identity x · f) @ id_left f))
        (transportb
           (mor_disp (FF x xx)
              (FF y (pr1 (FF_split y (FF y yy)))))

           (transportf

                               (FF_split y (FF y yy)))))))) =

D', D: disp_cat C
FF: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D' D
FF_split: disp_functor_disp_ess_split_surj FF
FF_ff: disp_functor_ff FF
FFweq:= λ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
disp_functor_ff_weq FF FF_ff xx yy f: ∏ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
xx -->[ f] yy
≃ FF x xx -->[
  (# (functor_identity C))%cat f] 
  FF y yy
FFinv:= λ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
disp_functor_ff_inv FF FF_ff: ∏ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
FF x xx -->[
(# (functor_identity C))%cat f] 
FF y yy → xx -->[ f] yy
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D' x
yy: D' y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
?b =
ff ;; FFinv
        (inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
           (pr2 (FF_split y (FF y yy))))
 
C: category
D', D: disp_cat C
FF: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D' D
FF_split: disp_functor_disp_ess_split_surj FF
FF_ff: disp_functor_ff FF
FFweq:= λ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
disp_functor_ff_weq FF FF_ff xx yy f: ∏ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
xx -->[ f] yy
≃ FF x xx -->[
  (# (functor_identity C))%cat f] 
  FF y yy
FFinv:= λ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
disp_functor_ff_inv FF FF_ff: ∏ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
FF x xx -->[
(# (functor_identity C))%cat f] 
FF y yy → xx -->[ f] yy
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D' x
yy: D' y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
disp_functor_ff_inv FF FF_ff
  (transportf
     (mor_disp (FF x xx)
        (FF y (pr1 (FF_split y (FF y yy)))))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (id_right (identity x · f) @ id_left f))
     (transportb
        (mor_disp (FF x xx)
           (FF y (pr1 (FF_split y (FF y yy)))))
        (assoc (identity x) (identity x · f)
           (identity y))
        (transportf
           (mor_disp (FF x xx)
              (FF y (pr1 (FF_split y (FF y yy)))))
           (cancel_postcomposition f
              (identity x · (identity x · f))
              (identity y)
              ((! id_left f @
                cancel_postcomposition
                  (identity (functor_identity C x))
                  (identity x · identity x) f
                  (! z_iso_after_z_iso_inv
                       (identity_z_iso
                          (functor_identity C x)))) @
               ! assoc (identity x) (identity x) f))
           (♯ FF ff ;; inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
                         (pr2 (FF_split y (FF y yy))))))) =
?t2

D', D: disp_cat C
FF: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D' D
FF_split: disp_functor_disp_ess_split_surj FF
FF_ff: disp_functor_ff FF
FFweq:= λ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
disp_functor_ff_weq FF FF_ff xx yy f: ∏ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
xx -->[ f] yy
≃ FF x xx -->[
  (# (functor_identity C))%cat f] 
  FF y yy
FFinv:= λ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
disp_functor_ff_inv FF FF_ff: ∏ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
FF x xx -->[
(# (functor_identity C))%cat f] 
FF y yy → xx -->[ f] yy
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D' x
yy: D' y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
disp_functor_ff_inv FF FF_ff
  (transportf
     (mor_disp (FF x xx)
        (FF y (pr1 (FF_split y (FF y yy)))))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (id_right (identity x · f) @ id_left f))
     (transportb
        (mor_disp (FF x xx)
           (FF y (pr1 (FF_split y (FF y yy)))))
        (assoc (identity x) (identity x · f)
           (identity y))
        (transportf
           (mor_disp (FF x xx)
              (FF y (pr1 (FF_split y (FF y yy)))))
           (cancel_postcomposition f
              (identity x · (identity x · f))
              (identity y)
              ((! id_left f @
                cancel_postcomposition
                  (identity (functor_identity C x))
                  (identity x · identity x) f
                  (! z_iso_after_z_iso_inv
                       (identity_z_iso
                          (functor_identity C x)))) @
               ! assoc (identity x) (identity x) f))
           (♯ FF ff ;; inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
                         (pr2 (FF_split y (FF y yy))))))) =
?b
C: category
D', D: disp_cat C
FF: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D' D
FF_split: disp_functor_disp_ess_split_surj FF
FF_ff: disp_functor_ff FF
FFweq:= λ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
disp_functor_ff_weq FF FF_ff xx yy f: ∏ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
xx -->[ f] yy
≃ FF x xx -->[
  (# (functor_identity C))%cat f] 
  FF y yy
FFinv:= λ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
disp_functor_ff_inv FF FF_ff: ∏ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
FF x xx -->[
(# (functor_identity C))%cat f] 
FF y yy → xx -->[ f] yy
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D' x
yy: D' y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
?b = ?t2

        (inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso

        (♯ FF ff ;; inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
                      (pr2 (FF_split y (FF y yy)))))) =
ff ;; FFinv
        (inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
           (pr2 (FF_split y (FF y yy))))

  
C: category
D', D: disp_cat C
FF: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D' D
FF_split: disp_functor_disp_ess_split_surj FF
FF_ff: disp_functor_ff FF
FFweq:= λ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
disp_functor_ff_weq FF FF_ff xx yy f: ∏ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
xx -->[ f] yy
≃ FF x xx -->[
  (# (functor_identity C))%cat f] 
  FF y yy
FFinv:= λ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
disp_functor_ff_inv FF FF_ff: ∏ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
FF x xx -->[
(# (functor_identity C))%cat f] 
FF y yy → xx -->[ f] yy
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D' x
yy: D' y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
transportb (mor_disp xx (pr1 (FF_split y (FF y yy))))
  (is_nat_trans_id (functor_identity_data C) x y f)
  (transportf
     (mor_disp xx (pr1 (FF_split y (FF y yy))))
     (cancel_postcomposition f
        (identity x · (identity x · f)) (identity y)
        ((! id_left f @
          cancel_postcomposition
            (identity (functor_identity C x))
            (identity x · identity x) f
            (! z_iso_after_z_iso_inv
                 (identity_z_iso
                    (functor_identity C x)))) @
         ! assoc (identity x) (identity x) f) @
      ! assoc (identity x) (identity x · f)
          (identity y) @
      maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (id_right (identity x · f) @ id_left f))
     (FFinv
        (♯ FF ff ;; inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
                      (pr2 (FF_split y (FF y yy)))))) =
?b

D', D: disp_cat C

FF_ff: disp_functor_ff FF
FFweq:= λ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
disp_functor_ff_weq FF FF_ff xx yy f: ∏ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
xx -->[ f] yy
≃ FF x xx -->[
  (# (functor_identity C))%cat f] 
  FF y yy
FFinv:= λ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
disp_functor_ff_inv FF FF_ff: ∏ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
FF x xx -->[
(# (functor_identity C))%cat f] 
FF y yy → xx -->[ f] yy
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D' x
yy: D' y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
?b =
ff ;; FFinv
        (inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
           (pr2 (FF_split y (FF y yy))))

ff: xx -->[ f] yy
transportf (mor_disp xx (pr1 (FF_split y (FF y yy))))
  ((cancel_postcomposition f
      (identity x · (identity x · f)) (identity y)
      ((! id_left f @
        cancel_postcomposition
          (identity (functor_identity C x))
          (identity x · identity x) f
          (! z_iso_after_z_iso_inv
               (identity_z_iso (functor_identity C x)))) @
       ! assoc (identity x) (identity x) f) @
    ! assoc (identity x) (identity x · f) (identity y) @

      (id_right (identity x · f) @ id_left f)) @
   ! is_nat_trans_id (functor_identity_data C) x y f)
  (FFinv
     (♯ FF ff ;; inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
                   (pr2 (FF_split y (FF y yy))))) =

C: category
D', D: disp_cat C
FF: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D' D
FF_split: disp_functor_disp_ess_split_surj FF
FF_ff: disp_functor_ff FF
FFweq:= λ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
disp_functor_ff_weq FF FF_ff xx yy f: ∏ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
xx -->[ f] yy
≃ FF x xx -->[
  (# (functor_identity C))%cat f] 
  FF y yy
FFinv:= λ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
disp_functor_ff_inv FF FF_ff: ∏ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
FF x xx -->[
(# (functor_identity C))%cat f] 
FF y yy → xx -->[ f] yy
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D' x
yy: D' y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
disp_functor_ff_inv FF FF_ff (♯ FF ff) ;; disp_functor_ff_inv
                                            FF FF_ff
                                            (inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
                                               (pr2
                                                 (FF_split
                                                 y
                                                 (FF y
                                                 yy)))) =
ff ;; FFinv
        (inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
           (pr2 (FF_split y (FF y yy))))

  apply maponpaths_2, homotinvweqweq.
Qed.

Definition η_ses_ff
  : disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id _)
      (disp_functor_identity _ ) (disp_functor_composite FF GG)
:= (_ ,, η_ses_ff_ax).

Definition GGεη : right_adjoint_over_id_data FF
  := (GG,, (η_ses_ff,, ε_ses_ff)).


C: category
D', D: disp_cat C
FF: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D' D
FF_split: disp_functor_disp_ess_split_surj FF
FF_ff: disp_functor_ff FF
FFweq:= λ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
disp_functor_ff_weq FF FF_ff xx yy f: ∏ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
xx -->[ f] yy
≃ FF x xx -->[
  (# (functor_identity C))%cat f] 
  FF y yy
FFinv:= λ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
disp_functor_ff_inv FF FF_ff: ∏ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
FF x xx -->[
(# (functor_identity C))%cat f] 
FF y yy → xx -->[ f] yy
form_equiv_over_id GGεη

    exact (@is_z_iso_inv_from_z_iso_disp _ _ _ _ (identity_z_iso _) _ _ _).

D', D: disp_cat C
FF: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D' D
FF_split: disp_functor_disp_ess_split_surj FF
FF_ff: disp_functor_ff FF
FFweq:= λ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
disp_functor_ff_weq FF FF_ff xx yy f: ∏ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
xx -->[ f] yy
≃ FF x xx -->[
  (# (functor_identity C))%cat f] 
  FF y yy
FFinv:= λ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
disp_functor_ff_inv FF FF_ff: ∏ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
FF x xx -->[
(# (functor_identity C))%cat f] 
FF y yy → xx -->[ f] yy
x: C
xx: D x
is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso x) (pr2 (FF_split x xx))

    apply is_z_iso_disp_from_z_iso.
Qed.

xx: D' x

transportb (mor_disp (FF x xx) (FF x xx))
  (id_left (identity x)) (id_disp (FF x xx))

  (id_left (identity x)) (id_disp (FF x xx))

FF_ff: disp_functor_ff FF

(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
disp_functor_ff_weq FF FF_ff xx yy f: ∏ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
xx -->[ f] yy

  (# (functor_identity C))%cat f]

(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
disp_functor_ff_inv FF FF_ff: ∏ (x y : C) (xx : D' x)

xx: D' x
transportb (mor_disp (FF x xx) (FF x xx))
  (z_iso_after_z_iso_inv
     (identity_z_iso (functor_identity C x)))
  (id_disp (FF x xx)) =
transportb (mor_disp (FF x xx) (FF x xx))
  (id_left (identity x)) (id_disp (FF x xx))

  apply maponpaths_2, homset_property.
Qed.

FFweq:= λ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
disp_functor_ff_weq FF FF_ff xx yy f: ∏ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
xx -->[ f] yy
≃ FF x xx -->[
  (# (functor_identity C))%cat f] 
  FF y yy
FFinv:= λ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
disp_functor_ff_inv FF FF_ff: ∏ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
FF x xx -->[
(# (functor_identity C))%cat f] 
FF y yy → xx -->[ f] yy
triangle_2_statement_over_id GGεη
C: category
D', D: disp_cat C
FF: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D' D
FF_split: disp_functor_disp_ess_split_surj FF
FF_ff: disp_functor_ff FF
FFweq:= λ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
disp_functor_ff_weq FF FF_ff xx yy f: ∏ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
xx -->[ f] yy
≃ FF x xx -->[
  (# (functor_identity C))%cat f] 
  FF y yy
FFinv:= λ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
disp_functor_ff_inv FF FF_ff: ∏ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
FF x xx -->[
(# (functor_identity C))%cat f] 
FF y yy → xx -->[ f] yy
(λ GG : right_adjoint_over_id FF,
 form_equiv_over_id GG) 
  (GGεη,, ?Goal,, ?Goal0)
 
C: category
D', D: disp_cat C
FF: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D' D
FF_split: disp_functor_disp_ess_split_surj FF
FF_ff: disp_functor_ff FF
FFweq:= λ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
disp_functor_ff_weq FF FF_ff xx yy f: ∏ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
xx -->[ f] yy
≃ FF x xx -->[
  (# (functor_identity C))%cat f] 
  FF y yy
FFinv:= λ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
disp_functor_ff_inv FF FF_ff: ∏ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
FF x xx -->[
(# (functor_identity C))%cat f] 
FF y yy → xx -->[ f] yy
triangle_2_statement_over_id GGεη
C: category
D', D: disp_cat C
FF: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D' D
FF_split: disp_functor_disp_ess_split_surj FF
FF_ff: disp_functor_ff FF
FFweq:= λ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
disp_functor_ff_weq FF FF_ff xx yy f: ∏ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
xx -->[ f] yy
≃ FF x xx -->[
  (# (functor_identity C))%cat f] 
  FF y yy
FFinv:= λ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
disp_functor_ff_inv FF FF_ff: ∏ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
FF x xx -->[
(# (functor_identity C))%cat f] 
FF y yy → xx -->[ f] yy
(λ GG : right_adjoint_over_id FF,
 form_equiv_over_id GG) 
  (GGεη,, tri_1_GGεη,, ?Goal)
 
C: category
D', D: disp_cat C
FF: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D' D
FF_split: disp_functor_disp_ess_split_surj FF
FF_ff: disp_functor_ff FF
FFweq:= λ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
disp_functor_ff_weq FF FF_ff xx yy f: ∏ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
xx -->[ f] yy
≃ FF x xx -->[
  (# (functor_identity C))%cat f] 
  FF y yy
FFinv:= λ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
disp_functor_ff_inv FF FF_ff: ∏ (x y : C) (xx : D' x) 
(yy : D' y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
FF x xx -->[
(# (functor_identity C))%cat f] 
FF y yy → xx -->[ f] yy
(λ GG : right_adjoint_over_id FF,
 form_equiv_over_id GG)
  (GGεη,, tri_1_GGεη,, tri_2_GGεη)

  apply form_equiv_GGεη.
Defined.

End Equiv_from_ff_plus_ess_split.

(** ** Inverses and composition of adjunctions/equivalences *)

Section Nat_Trans_Disp_Inv.

Context {C : category} {D' D : disp_cat C}
        {FF GG : disp_functor (functor_identity _) D' D}
        (alpha : disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id _ ) FF GG)
        (Ha : ∏ x xx, is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso _ ) (alpha x xx)).

(*
Lemma inv_ax : disp_nat_trans_axioms
    (λ (x : C) (xx : D' x), @inv_mor_disp_from_iso _ _ _ _ (identity_iso _ ) _  _ _ (Ha x xx)).
*)


C: category
D', D: disp_cat C
FF, GG: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D' D
alpha: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C)) FF GG
Ha: ∏ (x : C) (xx : D' x),
is_z_iso_disp
  (identity_z_iso (functor_identity C x))
  (alpha x xx)
disp_nat_trans_axioms
  (λ (x : C) (xx : D' x),
   inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso (Ha x xx))


C: category
D', D: disp_cat C
FF, GG: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D' D
alpha: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C)) FF GG
Ha: ∏ (x : C) (xx : D' x),
is_z_iso_disp
  (identity_z_iso (functor_identity C x))
  (alpha x xx)
disp_nat_trans_axioms
  (λ (x : C) (xx : D' x),
   inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso (Ha x xx))

   
C: category
D', D: disp_cat C
FF, GG: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D' D
alpha: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C)) FF GG
Ha: ∏ (x : C) (xx : D' x),
is_z_iso_disp
  (identity_z_iso (functor_identity C x))
  (alpha x xx)
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D' x
yy: D' y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
♯ GG ff ;; inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso (Ha y yy) =
transportb (mor_disp (GG x xx) (FF y yy))
  (nat_trans_ax
     (nat_trans_id (functor_identity_data C)) x y f)
  (inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso (Ha x xx) ;; ♯ FF ff)

    
C: category
D', D: disp_cat C
FF, GG: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D' D
alpha: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C)) FF GG
Ha: ∏ (x : C) (xx : D' x),
is_z_iso_disp
  (identity_z_iso (functor_identity C x))
  (alpha x xx)
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D' x
yy: D' y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
transportb (mor_disp (GG x xx) (FF y yy))
  (nat_trans_ax
     (nat_trans_id (functor_identity_data C)) x y f)
  (inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso (Ha x xx) ;; ♯ FF ff) =
♯ GG ff ;; inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso (Ha y yy)

    
C: category
D', D: disp_cat C
FF, GG: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D' D
alpha: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C)) FF GG
Ha: ∏ (x : C) (xx : D' x),
is_z_iso_disp
  (identity_z_iso (functor_identity C x))
  (alpha x xx)
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D' x
yy: D' y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
transportf (mor_disp (GG x xx) (FF y yy))
  (! (! nat_trans_ax
          (nat_trans_id (functor_identity_data C)) x y
          f))
  (♯ GG ff ;; inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso (Ha y yy)) =
inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso (Ha x xx) ;; ♯ FF ff

    
C: category
D', D: disp_cat C
FF, GG: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D' D
alpha: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C)) FF GG
Ha: ∏ (x : C) (xx : D' x),
is_z_iso_disp
  (identity_z_iso (functor_identity C x))
  (alpha x xx)
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D' x
yy: D' y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso (Ha x xx) ;; ♯ FF ff =
transportf (mor_disp (GG x xx) (FF y yy))
  (! (! nat_trans_ax
          (nat_trans_id (functor_identity_data C)) x y
          f))
  (♯ GG ff ;; inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso (Ha y yy))

    
C: category
D', D: disp_cat C
FF, GG: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D' D
alpha: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C)) FF GG
Ha: ∏ (x : C) (xx : D' x),
is_z_iso_disp
  (identity_z_iso (functor_identity C x))
  (alpha x xx)
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D' x
yy: D' y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
XR:= @z_iso_disp_precomp: ∏ (C : category) (D : disp_cat C) 
(x y : C) (f : z_iso x y) 
(xx : D x) (yy : D y) (ff : z_iso_disp f xx yy)
(y' : C) (f' : C ⟦ y, y' ⟧) 
(yy' : D y'),
isweq (λ ff' : yy -->[ f'] yy', pr1 ff ;; ff')
inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso (Ha x xx) ;; ♯ FF ff =
transportf (mor_disp (GG x xx) (FF y yy))
  (! (! nat_trans_ax
          (nat_trans_id (functor_identity_data C)) x y
          f))
  (♯ GG ff ;; inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso (Ha y yy))

    
C: category
D', D: disp_cat C
FF, GG: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D' D
alpha: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C)) FF GG
Ha: ∏ (x : C) (xx : D' x),
is_z_iso_disp
  (identity_z_iso (functor_identity C x))
  (alpha x xx)
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D' x
yy: D' y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
XR: ∏ (y' : C) (f' : C ⟦ functor_identity C x, y' ⟧)
(yy' : D y'),
isweq
  (λ ff' : GG x xx -->[ f'] yy',
   pr1 (alpha x xx,, Ha x xx) ;; ff')
inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso (Ha x xx) ;; ♯ FF ff =
transportf (mor_disp (GG x xx) (FF y yy))
  (! (! nat_trans_ax
          (nat_trans_id (functor_identity_data C)) x y
          f))
  (♯ GG ff ;; inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso (Ha y yy))

    
C: category
D', D: disp_cat C
FF, GG: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D' D
alpha: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C)) FF GG
Ha: ∏ (x : C) (xx : D' x),
is_z_iso_disp
  (identity_z_iso (functor_identity C x))
  (alpha x xx)
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D' x
yy: D' y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
XR: ∏ (y' : C) (f' : C ⟦ functor_identity C x, y' ⟧)
(yy' : D y'),
isweq
  (λ ff' : GG x xx -->[ f'] yy',
   pr1 (alpha x xx,, Ha x xx) ;; ff')
E:= inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso (Ha x xx) ;; ♯ FF ff: GG x xx -->[
nat_trans_id (functor_identity_data C) x
· (# (functor_identity_data C))%cat f] 
FF y yy
E =
transportf (mor_disp (GG x xx) (FF y yy))
  (! (! nat_trans_ax
          (nat_trans_id (functor_identity_data C)) x y
          f))
  (♯ GG ff ;; inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso (Ha y yy))
 
C: category
D', D: disp_cat C
FF, GG: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D' D
alpha: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C)) FF GG
Ha: ∏ (x : C) (xx : D' x),
is_z_iso_disp
  (identity_z_iso (functor_identity C x))
  (alpha x xx)
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D' x
yy: D' y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
XR: ∏ (y' : C) (f' : C ⟦ functor_identity C x, y' ⟧)
(yy' : D y'),
isweq
  (λ ff' : GG x xx -->[ f'] yy',
   pr1 (alpha x xx,, Ha x xx) ;; ff')
E:= inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso (Ha x xx) ;; ♯ FF ff: GG x xx -->[ identity x · f] FF y yy
E =
transportf (mor_disp (GG x xx) (FF y yy))
  (! (! nat_trans_ax
          (nat_trans_id (functor_identity_data C)) x y
          f))
  (♯ GG ff ;; inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso (Ha y yy))

    
C: category
D', D: disp_cat C
FF, GG: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D' D
alpha: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C)) FF GG
Ha: ∏ (x : C) (xx : D' x),
is_z_iso_disp
  (identity_z_iso (functor_identity C x))
  (alpha x xx)
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D' x
yy: D' y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
XR: isweq
  (λ ff' : GG x xx -->[ identity x · f] FF y yy,
   pr1 (alpha x xx,, Ha x xx) ;; ff')
E:= inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso (Ha x xx) ;; ♯ FF ff: GG x xx -->[ identity x · f] FF y yy
E =
transportf (mor_disp (GG x xx) (FF y yy))
  (! (! nat_trans_ax
          (nat_trans_id (functor_identity_data C)) x y
          f))
  (♯ GG ff ;; inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso (Ha y yy))

    
C: category
D', D: disp_cat C
FF, GG: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D' D
alpha: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C)) FF GG
Ha: ∏ (x : C) (xx : D' x),
is_z_iso_disp
  (identity_z_iso (functor_identity C x))
  (alpha x xx)
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D' x
yy: D' y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
XR: isweq
  (λ ff' : GG x xx -->[ identity x · f] FF y yy,
   pr1 (alpha x xx,, Ha x xx) ;; ff')
E:= inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso (Ha x xx) ;; ♯ FF ff: GG x xx -->[ identity x · f] FF y yy
R:= make_weq
  (λ ff' : GG x xx -->[ identity x · f] FF y yy,
   pr1 (alpha x xx,, Ha x xx) ;; ff') XR: GG x xx -->[ identity x · f] FF y yy
≃ FF x xx -->[
  identity_z_iso (functor_identity C x)
  · (identity x · f)] FF y yy
E =
transportf (mor_disp (GG x xx) (FF y yy))
  (! (! nat_trans_ax
          (nat_trans_id (functor_identity_data C)) x y
          f))
  (♯ GG ff ;; inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso (Ha y yy))

    
C: category
D', D: disp_cat C
FF, GG: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D' D
alpha: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C)) FF GG
Ha: ∏ (x : C) (xx : D' x),
is_z_iso_disp
  (identity_z_iso (functor_identity C x))
  (alpha x xx)
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D' x
yy: D' y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
XR: isweq
  (λ ff' : GG x xx -->[ identity x · f] FF y yy,
   pr1 (alpha x xx,, Ha x xx) ;; ff')
E:= inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso (Ha x xx) ;; ♯ FF ff: GG x xx -->[ identity x · f] FF y yy
R:= make_weq
  (λ ff' : GG x xx -->[ identity x · f] FF y yy,
   pr1 (alpha x xx,, Ha x xx) ;; ff') XR: GG x xx -->[ identity x · f] FF y yy
≃ FF x xx -->[
  identity_z_iso (functor_identity C x)
  · (identity x · f)] FF y yy
R E =
R
  (transportf (mor_disp (GG x xx) (FF y yy))
     (! (! nat_trans_ax
             (nat_trans_id (functor_identity_data C))
             x y f))
     (♯ GG ff ;; inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso (Ha y yy)))

    
C: category
D', D: disp_cat C
FF, GG: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D' D
alpha: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C)) FF GG
Ha: ∏ (x : C) (xx : D' x),
is_z_iso_disp
  (identity_z_iso (functor_identity C x))
  (alpha x xx)
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D' x
yy: D' y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
XR: isweq
  (λ ff' : GG x xx -->[ identity x · f] FF y yy,
   pr1 (alpha x xx,, Ha x xx) ;; ff')
E:= inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso (Ha x xx) ;; ♯ FF ff: GG x xx -->[ identity x · f] FF y yy
R:= make_weq
  (λ ff' : GG x xx -->[ identity x · f] FF y yy,
   pr1 (alpha x xx,, Ha x xx) ;; ff') XR: GG x xx -->[ identity x · f] FF y yy
≃ FF x xx -->[
  identity_z_iso (functor_identity C x)
  · (identity x · f)] FF y yy
make_weq
  (λ ff' : GG x xx -->[ identity x · f] FF y yy,
   pr1 (alpha x xx,, Ha x xx) ;; ff') XR E =
make_weq
  (λ ff' : GG x xx -->[ identity x · f] FF y yy,
   pr1 (alpha x xx,, Ha x xx) ;; ff') XR
  (transportf (mor_disp (GG x xx) (FF y yy))
     (! (! nat_trans_ax
             (nat_trans_id (functor_identity_data C))
             x y f))
     (♯ GG ff ;; inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso (Ha y yy)))
 
C: category
D', D: disp_cat C
FF, GG: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D' D
alpha: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C)) FF GG
Ha: ∏ (x : C) (xx : D' x),
is_z_iso_disp
  (identity_z_iso (functor_identity C x))
  (alpha x xx)
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D' x
yy: D' y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
XR: isweq
  (λ ff' : GG x xx -->[ identity x · f] FF y yy,
   pr1 (alpha x xx,, Ha x xx) ;; ff')
E:= inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso (Ha x xx) ;; ♯ FF ff: GG x xx -->[ identity x · f] FF y yy
R:= make_weq
  (λ ff' : GG x xx -->[ identity x · f] FF y yy,
   pr1 (alpha x xx,, Ha x xx) ;; ff') XR: GG x xx -->[ identity x · f] FF y yy
≃ FF x xx -->[
  identity_z_iso (functor_identity C x)
  · (identity x · f)] FF y yy
make_weq
  (λ ff' : GG x xx -->[ identity x · f] FF y yy,
   pr1 (alpha x xx,, Ha x xx) ;; ff') XR
  (inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso (Ha x xx) ;; ♯ FF ff) =
make_weq
  (λ ff' : GG x xx -->[ identity x · f] FF y yy,
   pr1 (alpha x xx,, Ha x xx) ;; ff') XR
  (transportf (mor_disp (GG x xx) (FF y yy))
     (! (! nat_trans_ax
             (nat_trans_id (functor_identity_data C))
             x y f))
     (♯ GG ff ;; inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso (Ha y yy)))
 
C: category
D', D: disp_cat C
FF, GG: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D' D
alpha: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C)) FF GG
Ha: ∏ (x : C) (xx : D' x),
is_z_iso_disp
  (identity_z_iso (functor_identity C x))
  (alpha x xx)
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D' x
yy: D' y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
XR: isweq
  (λ ff' : GG x xx -->[ identity x · f] FF y yy,
   pr1 (alpha x xx,, Ha x xx) ;; ff')
E:= inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso (Ha x xx) ;; ♯ FF ff: GG x xx -->[ identity x · f] FF y yy
R:= make_weq
  (λ ff' : GG x xx -->[ identity x · f] FF y yy,
   pr1 (alpha x xx,, Ha x xx) ;; ff') XR: GG x xx -->[ identity x · f] FF y yy
≃ FF x xx -->[
  identity_z_iso (functor_identity C x)
  · (identity x · f)] FF y yy
alpha x xx ;; (inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso (Ha x xx) ;; 
               ♯ FF ff) =
alpha x xx ;; transportf
                (mor_disp (GG x xx) (FF y yy))
                (! (! is_nat_trans_id
                        (functor_identity_data C) x y
                        f))
                (♯ GG ff ;; inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
                              (Ha y yy))

    
C: category
D', D: disp_cat C
FF, GG: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D' D
alpha: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C)) FF GG
Ha: ∏ (x : C) (xx : D' x),
is_z_iso_disp
  (identity_z_iso (functor_identity C x))
  (alpha x xx)
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D' x
yy: D' y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
XR: isweq
  (λ ff' : GG x xx -->[ identity x · f] FF y yy,
   pr1 (alpha x xx,, Ha x xx) ;; ff')
E:= inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso (Ha x xx) ;; ♯ FF ff: GG x xx -->[ identity x · f] FF y yy
R:= make_weq
  (λ ff' : GG x xx -->[ identity x · f] FF y yy,
   pr1 (alpha x xx,, Ha x xx) ;; ff') XR: GG x xx -->[ identity x · f] FF y yy
≃ FF x xx -->[
  identity_z_iso (functor_identity C x)
  · (identity x · f)] FF y yy
alpha x xx ;; (inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso (Ha x xx) ;; 
               ♯ FF ff) = ?b
C: category
D', D: disp_cat C
FF, GG: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D' D
alpha: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C)) FF GG
Ha: ∏ (x : C) (xx : D' x),
is_z_iso_disp
  (identity_z_iso (functor_identity C x))
  (alpha x xx)
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D' x
yy: D' y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
XR: isweq
  (λ ff' : GG x xx -->[ identity x · f] FF y yy,
   pr1 (alpha x xx,, Ha x xx) ;; ff')
E:= inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso (Ha x xx) ;; ♯ FF ff: GG x xx -->[ identity x · f] FF y yy
R:= make_weq
  (λ ff' : GG x xx -->[ identity x · f] FF y yy,
   pr1 (alpha x xx,, Ha x xx) ;; ff') XR: GG x xx -->[ identity x · f] FF y yy
≃ FF x xx -->[
  identity_z_iso (functor_identity C x)
  · (identity x · f)] FF y yy
?b =
alpha x xx ;; transportf
                (mor_disp (GG x xx) (FF y yy))
                (! (! is_nat_trans_id
                       (functor_identity_data C) x y f))
                (♯ GG ff ;; 
                 inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso 
                   (Ha y yy))
 
C: category
D', D: disp_cat C
FF, GG: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D' D
alpha: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C)) FF GG
Ha: ∏ (x : C) (xx : D' x),
is_z_iso_disp
  (identity_z_iso (functor_identity C x))
  (alpha x xx)
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D' x
yy: D' y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
XR: isweq
  (λ ff' : GG x xx -->[ identity x · f] FF y yy,
   pr1 (alpha x xx,, Ha x xx) ;; ff')
E:= inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso (Ha x xx) ;; ♯ FF ff: GG x xx -->[ identity x · f] FF y yy
R:= make_weq
  (λ ff' : GG x xx -->[ identity x · f] FF y yy,
   pr1 (alpha x xx,, Ha x xx) ;; ff') XR: GG x xx -->[ identity x · f] FF y yy
≃ FF x xx -->[
  identity_z_iso (functor_identity C x)
  · (identity x · f)] FF y yy
transportb (mor_disp (FF x xx) (FF y yy))
  (assoc (identity x) (identity x) f)
  (alpha x xx ;; inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso (Ha x xx) ;; 
   ♯ FF ff) =
alpha x xx ;; transportf
                (mor_disp (GG x xx) (FF y yy))
                (! (! is_nat_trans_id
                        (functor_identity_data C) x y
                        f))
                (♯ GG ff ;; inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
                              (Ha y yy))

  (assoc (identity x) (identity x) f)
  (alpha x xx ;; inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso (Ha x xx) ;; 
   ♯ FF ff) = ?b

C: category
D', D: disp_cat C
FF, GG: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D' D
alpha: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C)) FF GG
Ha: ∏ (x : C) (xx : D' x),
is_z_iso_disp
  (identity_z_iso (functor_identity C x))
  (alpha x xx)
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D' x
yy: D' y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
XR: isweq
  (λ ff' : GG x xx -->[ identity x · f] FF y yy,
   pr1 (alpha x xx,, Ha x xx) ;; ff')
E:= inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso (Ha x xx) ;; ♯ FF ff: GG x xx -->[ identity x · f] FF y yy
R:= make_weq
  (λ ff' : GG x xx -->[ identity x · f] FF y yy,
   pr1 (alpha x xx,, Ha x xx) ;; ff') XR: GG x xx -->[ identity x · f] FF y yy
≃ FF x xx -->[
  identity_z_iso (functor_identity C x)
  · (identity x · f)] FF y yy
transportb (mor_disp (FF x xx) (FF y yy))
  (assoc (identity x) (identity x) f) 
  (?y' ;; ♯ FF ff) =
alpha x xx ;; transportf
                (mor_disp (GG x xx) (FF y yy))
                (! (! is_nat_trans_id
                       (functor_identity_data C) x y f))
                (♯ GG ff ;; 
                 inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso 
                   (Ha y yy))

            
C: category
D', D: disp_cat C
FF, GG: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D' D
alpha: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C)) FF GG
Ha: ∏ (x : C) (xx : D' x),
is_z_iso_disp
  (identity_z_iso (functor_identity C x))
  (alpha x xx)
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D' x
yy: D' y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
XR: isweq
  (λ ff' : GG x xx -->[ identity x · f] FF y yy,
   pr1 (alpha x xx,, Ha x xx) ;; ff')
E:= inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso (Ha x xx) ;; ♯ FF ff: GG x xx -->[ identity x · f] FF y yy
R:= make_weq
  (λ ff' : GG x xx -->[ identity x · f] FF y yy,
   pr1 (alpha x xx,, Ha x xx) ;; ff') XR: GG x xx -->[ identity x · f] FF y yy
≃ FF x xx -->[
  identity_z_iso (functor_identity C x)
  · (identity x · f)] FF y yy
transportb (mor_disp (FF x xx) (FF y yy))
  (assoc (identity x) (identity x) f)
  (transportb (mor_disp (FF x xx) (FF x xx))
     (z_iso_inv_after_z_iso
        (identity_z_iso (functor_identity C x)))
     (id_disp (FF x xx)) ;; ♯ FF ff) =
alpha x xx ;; transportf
                (mor_disp (GG x xx) (FF y yy))
                (! (! is_nat_trans_id
                        (functor_identity_data C) x y
                        f))
                (♯ GG ff ;; inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
                              (Ha y yy))

     (z_iso_inv_after_z_iso
        (identity_z_iso (functor_identity C x)))
     (id_disp (FF x xx)) ;; ♯ FF ff) = ?b

D', D: disp_cat C
FF, GG: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D' D
alpha: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C)) FF GG
Ha: ∏ (x : C) (xx : D' x),
is_z_iso_disp
  (identity_z_iso (functor_identity C x))
  (alpha x xx)
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D' x
yy: D' y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
XR: isweq
  (λ ff' : GG x xx -->[ identity x · f] FF y yy,
   pr1 (alpha x xx,, Ha x xx) ;; ff')
E:= inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso (Ha x xx) ;; ♯ FF ff: GG x xx -->[ identity x · f] FF y yy
R:= make_weq
  (λ ff' : GG x xx -->[ identity x · f] FF y yy,
   pr1 (alpha x xx,, Ha x xx) ;; ff') XR: GG x xx -->[ identity x · f] FF y yy
≃ FF x xx -->[
  identity_z_iso (functor_identity C x)
  · (identity x · f)] FF y yy
transportb (mor_disp (FF x xx) (FF y yy))
  (assoc (identity x) (identity x) f) 
  ?t2 =
alpha x xx ;; transportf
                (mor_disp (GG x xx) (FF y yy))

                       (functor_identity_data C) x y f))
                (♯ GG ff ;;

C: category
D', D: disp_cat C
FF, GG: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D' D
alpha: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C)) FF GG
Ha: ∏ (x : C) (xx : D' x),
is_z_iso_disp
  (identity_z_iso (functor_identity C x))
  (alpha x xx)
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D' x
yy: D' y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
XR: isweq
  (λ ff' : GG x xx -->[ identity x · f] FF y yy,
   pr1 (alpha x xx,, Ha x xx) ;; ff')
E:= inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso (Ha x xx) ;; ♯ FF ff: GG x xx -->[ identity x · f] FF y yy
R:= make_weq
  (λ ff' : GG x xx -->[ identity x · f] FF y yy,
   pr1 (alpha x xx,, Ha x xx) ;; ff') XR: GG x xx -->[ identity x · f] FF y yy
≃ FF x xx -->[
  identity_z_iso (functor_identity C x)
  · (identity x · f)] FF y yy
transportb (mor_disp (FF x xx) (FF y yy))
  (assoc (identity x) (identity x) f)
  (transportf (mor_disp (FF x xx) (FF y yy))
     (cancel_postcomposition
        (identity (functor_identity C x))
        (identity x · identity x) f
        (! z_iso_inv_after_z_iso
             (identity_z_iso (functor_identity C x))))
     (id_disp (FF x xx) ;; ♯ FF ff)) =
alpha x xx ;; transportf
                (mor_disp (GG x xx) (FF y yy))
                (! (! is_nat_trans_id
                        (functor_identity_data C) x y
                        f))
                (♯ GG ff ;; inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
                              (Ha y yy))

  (transportf (mor_disp (FF x xx) (FF y yy))

        (identity x · identity x) f

D', D: disp_cat C
FF, GG: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D' D

  (λ ff' : GG x xx -->[ identity x · f] FF y yy,

D', D: disp_cat C

alpha: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C)) FF GG
Ha: ∏ (x : C) (xx : D' x),
is_z_iso_disp
  (identity_z_iso (functor_identity C x))
  (alpha x xx)
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D' x
yy: D' y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
XR: isweq
  (λ ff' : GG x xx -->[ identity x · f] FF y yy,
   pr1 (alpha x xx,, Ha x xx) ;; ff')
E:= inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso (Ha x xx) ;; ♯ FF ff: GG x xx -->[ identity x · f] FF y yy
R:= make_weq
  (λ ff' : GG x xx -->[ identity x · f] FF y yy,
   pr1 (alpha x xx,, Ha x xx) ;; ff') XR: GG x xx -->[ identity x · f] FF y yy
≃ FF x xx -->[
  identity_z_iso (functor_identity C x)
  · (identity x · f)] FF y yy
transportf (mor_disp (FF x xx) (FF y yy))
  (cancel_postcomposition
     (identity (functor_identity C x))
     (identity x · identity x) f
     (! z_iso_inv_after_z_iso
          (identity_z_iso (functor_identity C x))) @
   ! assoc (identity x) (identity x) f)
  (id_disp (FF x xx) ;; ♯ FF ff) = ?b
C: category
D', D: disp_cat C
FF, GG: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D' D
alpha: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C)) FF GG
Ha: ∏ (x : C) (xx : D' x),
is_z_iso_disp
  (identity_z_iso (functor_identity C x))
  (alpha x xx)
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D' x
yy: D' y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
XR: isweq
  (λ ff' : GG x xx -->[ identity x · f] FF y yy,
   pr1 (alpha x xx,, Ha x xx) ;; ff')
E:= inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso (Ha x xx) ;; ♯ FF ff: GG x xx -->[ identity x · f] FF y yy
R:= make_weq
  (λ ff' : GG x xx -->[ identity x · f] FF y yy,
   pr1 (alpha x xx,, Ha x xx) ;; ff') XR: GG x xx -->[ identity x · f] FF y yy
≃ FF x xx -->[
  identity_z_iso (functor_identity C x)
  · (identity x · f)] FF y yy
?b =
alpha x xx ;; transportf
                (mor_disp (GG x xx) (FF y yy))
                (! (! is_nat_trans_id
                       (functor_identity_data C) x y f))
                (♯ GG ff ;; 
                 inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso 
                   (Ha y yy))

≃ FF x xx -->[
  identity_z_iso (functor_identity C x)
  · (identity x · f)] FF y yy
id_disp (FF x xx) ;; ♯ FF ff = ?t2
C: category
D', D: disp_cat C
FF, GG: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D' D
alpha: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C)) FF GG
Ha: ∏ (x : C) (xx : D' x),
is_z_iso_disp
  (identity_z_iso (functor_identity C x))
  (alpha x xx)
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D' x
yy: D' y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
XR: isweq
  (λ ff' : GG x xx -->[ identity x · f] FF y yy,
   pr1 (alpha x xx,, Ha x xx) ;; ff')
E:= inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso (Ha x xx) ;; ♯ FF ff: GG x xx -->[ identity x · f] FF y yy
R:= make_weq
  (λ ff' : GG x xx -->[ identity x · f] FF y yy,
   pr1 (alpha x xx,, Ha x xx) ;; ff') XR: GG x xx -->[ identity x · f] FF y yy
≃ FF x xx -->[
  identity_z_iso (functor_identity C x)
  · (identity x · f)] FF y yy
transportf (mor_disp (FF x xx) (FF y yy))
  (cancel_postcomposition
     (identity (functor_identity C x))
     (identity x · identity x) f
     (! z_iso_inv_after_z_iso
          (identity_z_iso (functor_identity C x))) @
   ! assoc (identity x) (identity x) f) 
  ?t2 =
alpha x xx ;; transportf
                (mor_disp (GG x xx) (FF y yy))
                (! (! is_nat_trans_id
                       (functor_identity_data C) x y f))
                (♯ GG ff ;; 
                 inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso 
                   (Ha y yy))
 
C: category
D', D: disp_cat C
FF, GG: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D' D
alpha: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C)) FF GG
Ha: ∏ (x : C) (xx : D' x),
is_z_iso_disp
  (identity_z_iso (functor_identity C x))
  (alpha x xx)
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D' x
yy: D' y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
XR: isweq
  (λ ff' : GG x xx -->[ identity x · f] FF y yy,
   pr1 (alpha x xx,, Ha x xx) ;; ff')
E:= inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso (Ha x xx) ;; ♯ FF ff: GG x xx -->[ identity x · f] FF y yy
R:= make_weq
  (λ ff' : GG x xx -->[ identity x · f] FF y yy,
   pr1 (alpha x xx,, Ha x xx) ;; ff') XR: GG x xx -->[ identity x · f] FF y yy
≃ FF x xx -->[
  identity_z_iso (functor_identity C x)
  · (identity x · f)] FF y yy
transportf (mor_disp (FF x xx) (FF y yy))
  (cancel_postcomposition
     (identity (functor_identity C x))
     (identity x · identity x) f
     (! z_iso_inv_after_z_iso
          (identity_z_iso (functor_identity C x))) @
   ! assoc (identity x) (identity x) f)
  (transportb (mor_disp (FF x xx) (FF y yy))
     (id_left f) (♯ FF ff)) =
alpha x xx ;; transportf
                (mor_disp (GG x xx) (FF y yy))
                (! (! is_nat_trans_id
                        (functor_identity_data C) x y
                        f))
                (♯ GG ff ;; inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
                              (Ha y yy))

yy: D' y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
XR: isweq
  (λ ff' : GG x xx -->[ identity x · f] FF y yy,
   pr1 (alpha x xx,, Ha x xx) ;; ff')

  · (identity x · f)] FF y yy

   cancel_postcomposition
     (identity (functor_identity C x))

C: category
D', D: disp_cat C
FF, GG: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D' D
alpha: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C)) FF GG
Ha: ∏ (x : C) (xx : D' x),
is_z_iso_disp
  (identity_z_iso (functor_identity C x))
  (alpha x xx)
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D' x
yy: D' y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
XR: isweq
  (λ ff' : GG x xx -->[ identity x · f] FF y yy,
   pr1 (alpha x xx,, Ha x xx) ;; ff')
E:= inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso (Ha x xx) ;; ♯ FF ff: GG x xx -->[ identity x · f] FF y yy
R:= make_weq
  (λ ff' : GG x xx -->[ identity x · f] FF y yy,
   pr1 (alpha x xx,, Ha x xx) ;; ff') XR: GG x xx -->[ identity x · f] FF y yy
≃ FF x xx -->[
  identity_z_iso (functor_identity C x)
  · (identity x · f)] FF y yy
transportf (mor_disp (FF x xx) (FF y yy))
  (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (! (! is_nat_trans_id (functor_identity_data C) x
             y f)))
  (alpha x xx ;; (♯ GG ff ;; inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
                               (Ha y yy))) =
transportf (mor_disp (FF x xx) (FF y yy))
  (! id_left f @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (identity (functor_identity C x))
     (identity x · identity x) f
     (! z_iso_inv_after_z_iso
          (identity_z_iso (functor_identity C x))) @
   ! assoc (identity x) (identity x) f) (♯ FF ff)

C: category
D', D: disp_cat C
FF, GG: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D' D
alpha: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C)) FF GG
Ha: ∏ (x : C) (xx : D' x),
is_z_iso_disp
  (identity_z_iso (functor_identity C x))
  (alpha x xx)
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D' x
yy: D' y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
XR: isweq
  (λ ff' : GG x xx -->[ identity x · f] FF y yy,
   pr1 (alpha x xx,, Ha x xx) ;; ff')
E:= inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso (Ha x xx) ;; ♯ FF ff: GG x xx -->[ identity x · f] FF y yy
R:= make_weq
  (λ ff' : GG x xx -->[ identity x · f] FF y yy,
   pr1 (alpha x xx,, Ha x xx) ;; ff') XR: GG x xx -->[ identity x · f] FF y yy
≃ FF x xx -->[
  identity_z_iso (functor_identity C x)
  · (identity x · f)] FF y yy
transportf (mor_disp (FF x xx) (FF y yy))
  (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (! (! is_nat_trans_id (functor_identity_data C) x
             y f)))
  (transportb (mor_disp (FF x xx) (FF y yy))
     (assoc (identity x) f (identity y))
     (alpha x xx ;; ♯ GG ff ;; inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
                                 (Ha y yy))) =
transportf (mor_disp (FF x xx) (FF y yy))
  (! id_left f @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (identity (functor_identity C x))
     (identity x · identity x) f
     (! z_iso_inv_after_z_iso
          (identity_z_iso (functor_identity C x))) @
   ! assoc (identity x) (identity x) f) (♯ FF ff)

    
C: category
D', D: disp_cat C
FF, GG: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D' D
alpha: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C)) FF GG
Ha: ∏ (x : C) (xx : D' x),
is_z_iso_disp
  (identity_z_iso (functor_identity C x))
  (alpha x xx)
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D' x
yy: D' y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
XR: isweq
  (λ ff' : GG x xx -->[ identity x · f] FF y yy,
   pr1 (alpha x xx,, Ha x xx) ;; ff')
E:= inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso (Ha x xx) ;; ♯ FF ff: GG x xx -->[ identity x · f] FF y yy
R:= make_weq
  (λ ff' : GG x xx -->[ identity x · f] FF y yy,
   pr1 (alpha x xx,, Ha x xx) ;; ff') XR: GG x xx -->[ identity x · f] FF y yy
≃ FF x xx -->[
  identity_z_iso (functor_identity C x)
  · (identity x · f)] FF y yy
transportf (mor_disp (FF x xx) (FF y yy))
  (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (! (! is_nat_trans_id (functor_identity_data C) x
             y f)))
  (transportb (mor_disp (FF x xx) (FF y yy))
     (assoc (identity x) f (identity y))
     (alpha x xx ;; ♯ GG ff ;; inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
                                 (Ha y yy))) = ?b
C: category
D', D: disp_cat C
FF, GG: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D' D
alpha: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C)) FF GG
Ha: ∏ (x : C) (xx : D' x),
is_z_iso_disp
  (identity_z_iso (functor_identity C x))
  (alpha x xx)
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D' x
yy: D' y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
XR: isweq
  (λ ff' : GG x xx -->[ identity x · f] FF y yy,
   pr1 (alpha x xx,, Ha x xx) ;; ff')
E:= inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso (Ha x xx) ;; ♯ FF ff: GG x xx -->[ identity x · f] FF y yy
R:= make_weq
  (λ ff' : GG x xx -->[ identity x · f] FF y yy,
   pr1 (alpha x xx,, Ha x xx) ;; ff') XR: GG x xx -->[ identity x · f] FF y yy
≃ FF x xx -->[
  identity_z_iso (functor_identity C x)
  · (identity x · f)] FF y yy
?b =
transportf (mor_disp (FF x xx) (FF y yy))
  (! id_left f @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (identity (functor_identity C x))
     (identity x · identity x) f
     (! z_iso_inv_after_z_iso
          (identity_z_iso (functor_identity C x))) @
   ! assoc (identity x) (identity x) f) 
  (♯ FF ff)

  · (identity x · f)] FF y yy
transportf (mor_disp (FF x xx) (FF y yy))
  (! assoc (identity x) f (identity y) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (! (! is_nat_trans_id (functor_identity_data C) x
             y f)))
  (alpha x xx ;; ♯ GG ff ;; inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
                              (Ha y yy)) =
transportf (mor_disp (FF x xx) (FF y yy))
  (! id_left f @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (identity (functor_identity C x))
     (identity x · identity x) f
     (! z_iso_inv_after_z_iso
          (identity_z_iso (functor_identity C x))) @
   ! assoc (identity x) (identity x) f) (♯ FF ff)

ff: xx -->[ f] yy
XR: isweq
  (λ ff' : GG x xx -->[ identity x · f] FF y yy,
   pr1 (alpha x xx,, Ha x xx) ;; ff')
E:= inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso (Ha x xx) ;; ♯ FF ff: GG x xx -->[ identity x · f] FF y yy
R:= make_weq
  (λ ff' : GG x xx -->[ identity x · f] FF y yy,

  (λ ff' : GG x xx -->[ identity x · f] FF y yy,

  (λ ff' : GG x xx -->[ identity x · f] FF y yy,
   pr1 (alpha x xx,, Ha x xx) ;; ff') XR: GG x xx -->[ identity x · f] FF y yy

C: category
D', D: disp_cat C
FF, GG: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D' D
alpha: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C)) FF GG
Ha: ∏ (x : C) (xx : D' x),
is_z_iso_disp
  (identity_z_iso (functor_identity C x))
  (alpha x xx)
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D' x
yy: D' y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
XR: isweq
  (λ ff' : GG x xx -->[ identity x · f] FF y yy,
   pr1 (alpha x xx,, Ha x xx) ;; ff')
E:= inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso (Ha x xx) ;; ♯ FF ff: GG x xx -->[ identity x · f] FF y yy
R:= make_weq
  (λ ff' : GG x xx -->[ identity x · f] FF y yy,
   pr1 (alpha x xx,, Ha x xx) ;; ff') XR: GG x xx -->[ identity x · f] FF y yy
≃ FF x xx -->[
  identity_z_iso (functor_identity C x)
  · (identity x · f)] FF y yy
transportf (mor_disp (FF x xx) (FF y yy))
  (! assoc (identity x) f (identity y) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (! (! is_nat_trans_id (functor_identity_data C) x
             y f)))
  (transportf (mor_disp (FF x xx) (FF y yy))
     (cancel_postcomposition
        ((# (functor_identity C))%cat f
         · nat_trans_id (functor_identity C) y)
        (identity x · f) (identity y)
        (nat_trans_ax
           (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C)) x y f))
     (♯ FF ff ;; alpha y yy ;; inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
                                 (Ha y yy))) =
transportf (mor_disp (FF x xx) (FF y yy))
  (! id_left f @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (identity (functor_identity C x))
     (identity x · identity x) f
     (! z_iso_inv_after_z_iso
          (identity_z_iso (functor_identity C x))) @
   ! assoc (identity x) (identity x) f) (♯ FF ff)

  (λ ff' : GG x xx -->[ identity x · f] FF y yy,

         · nat_trans_id (functor_identity C) y)

        (nat_trans_ax
           (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C)) x y f))
     (♯ FF ff ;; alpha y yy ;; inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
                                 (Ha y yy))) = ?b
C: category
D', D: disp_cat C
FF, GG: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D' D
alpha: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C)) FF GG
Ha: ∏ (x : C) (xx : D' x),
is_z_iso_disp
  (identity_z_iso (functor_identity C x))
  (alpha x xx)
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D' x
yy: D' y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
XR: isweq
  (λ ff' : GG x xx -->[ identity x · f] FF y yy,
   pr1 (alpha x xx,, Ha x xx) ;; ff')
E:= inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso (Ha x xx) ;; ♯ FF ff: GG x xx -->[ identity x · f] FF y yy
R:= make_weq
  (λ ff' : GG x xx -->[ identity x · f] FF y yy,
   pr1 (alpha x xx,, Ha x xx) ;; ff') XR: GG x xx -->[ identity x · f] FF y yy
≃ FF x xx -->[
  identity_z_iso (functor_identity C x)
  · (identity x · f)] FF y yy
?b =
transportf (mor_disp (FF x xx) (FF y yy))
  (! id_left f @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (identity (functor_identity C x))
     (identity x · identity x) f
     (! z_iso_inv_after_z_iso
          (identity_z_iso (functor_identity C x))) @
   ! assoc (identity x) (identity x) f) 
  (♯ FF ff)
 
C: category
D', D: disp_cat C
FF, GG: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D' D
alpha: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C)) FF GG
Ha: ∏ (x : C) (xx : D' x),
is_z_iso_disp
  (identity_z_iso (functor_identity C x))
  (alpha x xx)
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D' x
yy: D' y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
XR: isweq
  (λ ff' : GG x xx -->[ identity x · f] FF y yy,
   pr1 (alpha x xx,, Ha x xx) ;; ff')
E:= inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso (Ha x xx) ;; ♯ FF ff: GG x xx -->[ identity x · f] FF y yy
R:= make_weq
  (λ ff' : GG x xx -->[ identity x · f] FF y yy,
   pr1 (alpha x xx,, Ha x xx) ;; ff') XR: GG x xx -->[ identity x · f] FF y yy
≃ FF x xx -->[
  identity_z_iso (functor_identity C x)
  · (identity x · f)] FF y yy
transportf (mor_disp (FF x xx) (FF y yy))
  (cancel_postcomposition
     ((# (functor_identity C))%cat f
      · nat_trans_id (functor_identity C) y)
     (identity x · f) (identity y)
     (nat_trans_ax (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
        x y f) @
   ! assoc (identity x) f (identity y) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (! (! is_nat_trans_id (functor_identity_data C) x
             y f)))
  (♯ FF ff ;; alpha y yy ;; inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
                              (Ha y yy)) =
transportf (mor_disp (FF x xx) (FF y yy))
  (! id_left f @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (identity (functor_identity C x))
     (identity x · identity x) f
     (! z_iso_inv_after_z_iso
          (identity_z_iso (functor_identity C x))) @
   ! assoc (identity x) (identity x) f) (♯ FF ff)

   ! assoc (identity x) f (identity y) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (! (! is_nat_trans_id (functor_identity_data C) x
             y f)))
  (♯ FF ff ;; alpha y yy ;; inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso

  identity_z_iso (functor_identity C x)
  · (identity x · f)] FF y yy
alpha y yy ;; inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso (Ha y yy) = ?t2
C: category
D', D: disp_cat C
FF, GG: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D' D
alpha: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C)) FF GG
Ha: ∏ (x : C) (xx : D' x),
is_z_iso_disp
  (identity_z_iso (functor_identity C x))
  (alpha x xx)
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D' x
yy: D' y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
XR: isweq
  (λ ff' : GG x xx -->[ identity x · f] FF y yy,
   pr1 (alpha x xx,, Ha x xx) ;; ff')
E:= inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso (Ha x xx) ;; ♯ FF ff: GG x xx -->[ identity x · f] FF y yy
R:= make_weq
  (λ ff' : GG x xx -->[ identity x · f] FF y yy,
   pr1 (alpha x xx,, Ha x xx) ;; ff') XR: GG x xx -->[ identity x · f] FF y yy
≃ FF x xx -->[
  identity_z_iso (functor_identity C x)
  · (identity x · f)] FF y yy
transportf (mor_disp (FF x xx) (FF y yy))
  (assoc ((# (functor_identity C))%cat f)
     (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C) y)
     (identity y) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     ((# (functor_identity C))%cat f
      · nat_trans_id (functor_identity C) y)
     (identity x · f) (identity y)
     (nat_trans_ax (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
        x y f) @
   ! assoc (identity x) f (identity y) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (! (! is_nat_trans_id 
             (functor_identity_data C) x y f)))
  (♯ FF ff ;; ?t2) =
transportf (mor_disp (FF x xx) (FF y yy))
  (! id_left f @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (identity (functor_identity C x))
     (identity x · identity x) f
     (! z_iso_inv_after_z_iso
          (identity_z_iso (functor_identity C x))) @
   ! assoc (identity x) (identity x) f) 
  (♯ FF ff)

            
C: category
D', D: disp_cat C
FF, GG: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D' D
alpha: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C)) FF GG
Ha: ∏ (x : C) (xx : D' x),
is_z_iso_disp
  (identity_z_iso (functor_identity C x))
  (alpha x xx)
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D' x
yy: D' y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
XR: isweq
  (λ ff' : GG x xx -->[ identity x · f] FF y yy,
   pr1 (alpha x xx,, Ha x xx) ;; ff')
E:= inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso (Ha x xx) ;; ♯ FF ff: GG x xx -->[ identity x · f] FF y yy
R:= make_weq
  (λ ff' : GG x xx -->[ identity x · f] FF y yy,
   pr1 (alpha x xx,, Ha x xx) ;; ff') XR: GG x xx -->[ identity x · f] FF y yy
≃ FF x xx -->[
  identity_z_iso (functor_identity C x)
  · (identity x · f)] FF y yy
transportf (mor_disp (FF x xx) (FF y yy))
  (assoc ((# (functor_identity C))%cat f)
     (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C) y)
     (identity y) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     ((# (functor_identity C))%cat f
      · nat_trans_id (functor_identity C) y)
     (identity x · f) (identity y)
     (nat_trans_ax (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
        x y f) @
   ! assoc (identity x) f (identity y) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (! (! is_nat_trans_id (functor_identity_data C) x
             y f)))
  (♯ FF ff ;; transportb
                (mor_disp (FF y yy) (FF y yy))
                (z_iso_inv_after_z_iso
                   (identity_z_iso
                      (functor_identity C y)))
                (id_disp (FF y yy))) =
transportf (mor_disp (FF x xx) (FF y yy))
  (! id_left f @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (identity (functor_identity C x))
     (identity x · identity x) f
     (! z_iso_inv_after_z_iso
          (identity_z_iso (functor_identity C x))) @
   ! assoc (identity x) (identity x) f) (♯ FF ff)

  identity_z_iso (functor_identity C x)
  · (identity x · f)] FF y yy
transportf (mor_disp (FF x xx) (FF y yy))
  (maponpaths
     (compose ((# (functor_identity C))%cat f))
     (! z_iso_inv_after_z_iso
          (identity_z_iso (functor_identity C y))) @
   assoc ((# (functor_identity C))%cat f)
     (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C) y)
     (identity y) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     ((# (functor_identity C))%cat f
      · nat_trans_id (functor_identity C) y)
     (identity x · f) (identity y)
     (nat_trans_ax (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
        x y f) @
   ! assoc (identity x) f (identity y) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (! (! is_nat_trans_id 
             (functor_identity_data C) x y f))) 
  ?t2 =
transportf (mor_disp (FF x xx) (FF y yy))
  (! id_left f @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (identity (functor_identity C x))
     (identity x · identity x) f
     (! z_iso_inv_after_z_iso
          (identity_z_iso (functor_identity C x))) @
   ! assoc (identity x) (identity x) f) 
  (♯ FF ff)
 
C: category
D', D: disp_cat C
FF, GG: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D' D
alpha: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C)) FF GG
Ha: ∏ (x : C) (xx : D' x),
is_z_iso_disp
  (identity_z_iso (functor_identity C x))
  (alpha x xx)
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D' x
yy: D' y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
XR: isweq
  (λ ff' : GG x xx -->[ identity x · f] FF y yy,
   pr1 (alpha x xx,, Ha x xx) ;; ff')
E:= inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso (Ha x xx) ;; ♯ FF ff: GG x xx -->[ identity x · f] FF y yy
R:= make_weq
  (λ ff' : GG x xx -->[ identity x · f] FF y yy,
   pr1 (alpha x xx,, Ha x xx) ;; ff') XR: GG x xx -->[ identity x · f] FF y yy
≃ FF x xx -->[
  identity_z_iso (functor_identity C x)
  · (identity x · f)] FF y yy
transportf (mor_disp (FF x xx) (FF y yy))
  (maponpaths
     (compose ((# (functor_identity C))%cat f))
     (! z_iso_inv_after_z_iso
          (identity_z_iso (functor_identity C y))) @
   assoc ((# (functor_identity C))%cat f)
     (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C) y)
     (identity y) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     ((# (functor_identity C))%cat f
      · nat_trans_id (functor_identity C) y)
     (identity x · f) (identity y)
     (nat_trans_ax (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
        x y f) @
   ! assoc (identity x) f (identity y) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (! (! is_nat_trans_id (functor_identity_data C) x
             y f)))
  (transportb (mor_disp (FF x xx) (FF y yy))
     (id_right ((# (functor_identity C))%cat f))
     (♯ FF ff)) =
transportf (mor_disp (FF x xx) (FF y yy))
  (! id_left f @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (identity (functor_identity C x))
     (identity x · identity x) f
     (! z_iso_inv_after_z_iso
          (identity_z_iso (functor_identity C x))) @
   ! assoc (identity x) (identity x) f) (♯ FF ff)

    
C: category
D', D: disp_cat C
FF, GG: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D' D
alpha: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C)) FF GG
Ha: ∏ (x : C) (xx : D' x),
is_z_iso_disp
  (identity_z_iso (functor_identity C x))
  (alpha x xx)
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D' x
yy: D' y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
XR: isweq
  (λ ff' : GG x xx -->[ identity x · f] FF y yy,
   pr1 (alpha x xx,, Ha x xx) ;; ff')
E:= inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso (Ha x xx) ;; ♯ FF ff: GG x xx -->[ identity x · f] FF y yy
R:= make_weq
  (λ ff' : GG x xx -->[ identity x · f] FF y yy,
   pr1 (alpha x xx,, Ha x xx) ;; ff') XR: GG x xx -->[ identity x · f] FF y yy
≃ FF x xx -->[
  identity_z_iso (functor_identity C x)
  · (identity x · f)] FF y yy
transportf (mor_disp (FF x xx) (FF y yy))
  (maponpaths
     (compose ((# (functor_identity C))%cat f))
     (! z_iso_inv_after_z_iso
          (identity_z_iso (functor_identity C y))) @
   assoc ((# (functor_identity C))%cat f)
     (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C) y)
     (identity y) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     ((# (functor_identity C))%cat f
      · nat_trans_id (functor_identity C) y)
     (identity x · f) (identity y)
     (nat_trans_ax (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
        x y f) @
   ! assoc (identity x) f (identity y) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (! (! is_nat_trans_id (functor_identity_data C) x
             y f)))
  (transportb (mor_disp (FF x xx) (FF y yy))
     (id_right ((# (functor_identity C))%cat f))
     (♯ FF ff)) = ?b
C: category
D', D: disp_cat C
FF, GG: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D' D
alpha: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C)) FF GG
Ha: ∏ (x : C) (xx : D' x),
is_z_iso_disp
  (identity_z_iso (functor_identity C x))
  (alpha x xx)
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D' x
yy: D' y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
XR: isweq
  (λ ff' : GG x xx -->[ identity x · f] FF y yy,
   pr1 (alpha x xx,, Ha x xx) ;; ff')
E:= inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso (Ha x xx) ;; ♯ FF ff: GG x xx -->[ identity x · f] FF y yy
R:= make_weq
  (λ ff' : GG x xx -->[ identity x · f] FF y yy,
   pr1 (alpha x xx,, Ha x xx) ;; ff') XR: GG x xx -->[ identity x · f] FF y yy
≃ FF x xx -->[
  identity_z_iso (functor_identity C x)
  · (identity x · f)] FF y yy
?b =
transportf (mor_disp (FF x xx) (FF y yy))
  (! id_left f @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (identity (functor_identity C x))
     (identity x · identity x) f
     (! z_iso_inv_after_z_iso
          (identity_z_iso (functor_identity C x))) @
   ! assoc (identity x) (identity x) f) 
  (♯ FF ff)
 
C: category
D', D: disp_cat C
FF, GG: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D' D
alpha: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C)) FF GG
Ha: ∏ (x : C) (xx : D' x),
is_z_iso_disp
  (identity_z_iso (functor_identity C x))
  (alpha x xx)
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D' x
yy: D' y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
XR: isweq
  (λ ff' : GG x xx -->[ identity x · f] FF y yy,
   pr1 (alpha x xx,, Ha x xx) ;; ff')
E:= inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso (Ha x xx) ;; ♯ FF ff: GG x xx -->[ identity x · f] FF y yy
R:= make_weq
  (λ ff' : GG x xx -->[ identity x · f] FF y yy,
   pr1 (alpha x xx,, Ha x xx) ;; ff') XR: GG x xx -->[ identity x · f] FF y yy
≃ FF x xx -->[
  identity_z_iso (functor_identity C x)
  · (identity x · f)] FF y yy
transportf (mor_disp (FF x xx) (FF y yy))
  (! id_right ((# (functor_identity C))%cat f) @
   maponpaths
     (compose ((# (functor_identity C))%cat f))
     (! z_iso_inv_after_z_iso
          (identity_z_iso (functor_identity C y))) @
   assoc ((# (functor_identity C))%cat f)
     (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C) y)
     (identity y) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     ((# (functor_identity C))%cat f
      · nat_trans_id (functor_identity C) y)
     (identity x · f) (identity y)
     (nat_trans_ax (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
        x y f) @
   ! assoc (identity x) f (identity y) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (! (! is_nat_trans_id (functor_identity_data C) x
             y f))) (♯ FF ff) =
transportf (mor_disp (FF x xx) (FF y yy))
  (! id_left f @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (identity (functor_identity C x))
     (identity x · identity x) f
     (! z_iso_inv_after_z_iso
          (identity_z_iso (functor_identity C x))) @
   ! assoc (identity x) (identity x) f) (♯ FF ff)

    
C: category
D', D: disp_cat C
FF, GG: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D' D
alpha: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C)) FF GG
Ha: ∏ (x : C) (xx : D' x),
is_z_iso_disp
  (identity_z_iso (functor_identity C x))
  (alpha x xx)
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D' x
yy: D' y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
XR: isweq
  (λ ff' : GG x xx -->[ identity x · f] FF y yy,
   pr1 (alpha x xx,, Ha x xx) ;; ff')
E:= inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso (Ha x xx) ;; ♯ FF ff: GG x xx -->[ identity x · f] FF y yy
R:= make_weq
  (λ ff' : GG x xx -->[ identity x · f] FF y yy,
   pr1 (alpha x xx,, Ha x xx) ;; ff') XR: GG x xx -->[ identity x · f] FF y yy
≃ FF x xx -->[
  identity_z_iso (functor_identity C x)
  · (identity x · f)] FF y yy
! id_right ((# (functor_identity C))%cat f) @
maponpaths (compose ((# (functor_identity C))%cat f))
  (! z_iso_inv_after_z_iso
       (identity_z_iso (functor_identity C y))) @
assoc ((# (functor_identity C))%cat f)
  (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C) y) (identity y) @
cancel_postcomposition
  ((# (functor_identity C))%cat f
   · nat_trans_id (functor_identity C) y)
  (identity x · f) (identity y)
  (nat_trans_ax (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C)) x
     y f) @
! assoc (identity x) f (identity y) @
maponpaths (compose (identity x))
  (! (! is_nat_trans_id (functor_identity_data C) x y
          f)) =
! id_left f @
cancel_postcomposition
  (identity (functor_identity C x))
  (identity x · identity x) f
  (! z_iso_inv_after_z_iso
       (identity_z_iso (functor_identity C x))) @
! assoc (identity x) (identity x) f

    apply homset_property.
Qed.


C: category
D', D: disp_cat C
FF, GG: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D' D
alpha: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C)) FF GG
Ha: ∏ (x : C) (xx : D' x),
is_z_iso_disp
  (identity_z_iso (functor_identity C x))
  (alpha x xx)
disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C)) GG
  FF


C: category
D', D: disp_cat C
FF, GG: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D' D
alpha: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C)) FF GG
Ha: ∏ (x : C) (xx : D' x),
is_z_iso_disp
  (identity_z_iso (functor_identity C x))
  (alpha x xx)
disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C)) GG
  FF

  
C: category
D', D: disp_cat C
FF, GG: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D' D
alpha: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C)) FF GG
Ha: ∏ (x : C) (xx : D' x),
is_z_iso_disp
  (identity_z_iso (functor_identity C x))
  (alpha x xx)
disp_nat_trans_data
  (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C)) GG FF
C: category
D', D: disp_cat C
FF, GG: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D' D
alpha: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C)) FF GG
Ha: ∏ (x : C) (xx : D' x),
is_z_iso_disp
  (identity_z_iso (functor_identity C x))
  (alpha x xx)
(λ b : disp_nat_trans_data
         (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C)) GG FF,
 disp_nat_trans_axioms b) 
  ?pr1

  
C: category
D', D: disp_cat C
FF, GG: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D' D
alpha: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C)) FF GG
Ha: ∏ (x : C) (xx : D' x),
is_z_iso_disp
  (identity_z_iso (functor_identity C x))
  (alpha x xx)
disp_nat_trans_data
  (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C)) GG FF
 
C: category
D', D: disp_cat C
FF, GG: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D' D
alpha: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C)) FF GG
Ha: ∏ (x : C) (xx : D' x),
is_z_iso_disp
  (identity_z_iso (functor_identity C x))
  (alpha x xx)
x: C
xx: D' x
GG x xx -->[
nat_trans_id (functor_identity C) x] FF x xx

    apply (inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso (Ha _ _ )).
  
C: category
D', D: disp_cat C
FF, GG: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D' D
alpha: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C)) FF GG
Ha: ∏ (x : C) (xx : D' x),
is_z_iso_disp
  (identity_z_iso (functor_identity C x))
  (alpha x xx)
(λ b : disp_nat_trans_data
         (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C)) GG FF,
 disp_nat_trans_axioms b)
  ((λ (x : C) (xx : D' x),
    inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso (Ha x xx))
   :
   disp_nat_trans_data
     (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C)) GG FF)
 apply inv_ax.
Defined.

End Nat_Trans_Disp_Inv.

Section Displayed_Equiv_Inv.

Context {C : category} {D' D : disp_cat C}
        (FF : disp_functor (functor_identity _) D' D)
        (isEquiv : is_equiv_over_id FF).

Let GG : disp_functor _ D D' := right_adjoint_of_is_equiv_over_id isEquiv.
Let η : disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
                       (disp_functor_identity D')
                       (disp_functor_composite FF GG)
  := unit_over_id isEquiv.

Let ε :  disp_nat_trans
           (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
           (disp_functor_composite GG FF)
           (disp_functor_identity D)
  := counit_over_id isEquiv.


C: category
D', D: disp_cat C
FF: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D' D
isEquiv: is_equiv_over_id FF
GG:= isEquiv: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D D'
η:= unit_over_id isEquiv: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D')
  (disp_functor_composite FF GG)
ε:= counit_over_id isEquiv: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite GG FF)
  (disp_functor_identity D)
disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D)
  (disp_functor_composite GG FF)


C: category
D', D: disp_cat C
FF: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D' D
isEquiv: is_equiv_over_id FF
GG:= isEquiv: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D D'
η:= unit_over_id isEquiv: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D')
  (disp_functor_composite FF GG)
ε:= counit_over_id isEquiv: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite GG FF)
  (disp_functor_identity D)
disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D)
  (disp_functor_composite GG FF)

  
C: category
D', D: disp_cat C
FF: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D' D
isEquiv: is_equiv_over_id FF
GG:= isEquiv: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D D'
η:= unit_over_id isEquiv: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D')
  (disp_functor_composite FF GG)
ε:= counit_over_id isEquiv: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite GG FF)
  (disp_functor_identity D)
∏ (x : C) (xx : D x),
is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso (functor_identity C x))
  (ε x xx)

  apply (is_z_iso_counit_over_id isEquiv).
Defined.


C: category
D', D: disp_cat C
FF: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D' D
isEquiv: is_equiv_over_id FF
GG:= isEquiv: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D D'
η:= unit_over_id isEquiv: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D')
  (disp_functor_composite FF GG)
ε:= counit_over_id isEquiv: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite GG FF)
  (disp_functor_identity D)
disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite FF GG)
  (disp_functor_identity D')


C: category
D', D: disp_cat C
FF: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D' D
isEquiv: is_equiv_over_id FF
GG:= isEquiv: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D D'
η:= unit_over_id isEquiv: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D')
  (disp_functor_composite FF GG)
ε:= counit_over_id isEquiv: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite GG FF)
  (disp_functor_identity D)
disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite FF GG)
  (disp_functor_identity D')

  
C: category
D', D: disp_cat C
FF: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D' D
isEquiv: is_equiv_over_id FF
GG:= isEquiv: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D D'
η:= unit_over_id isEquiv: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D')
  (disp_functor_composite FF GG)
ε:= counit_over_id isEquiv: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite GG FF)
  (disp_functor_identity D)
∏ (x : C) (xx : D' x),
is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso (functor_identity C x))
  (η x xx)
 
C: category
D', D: disp_cat C
FF: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D' D
isEquiv: is_equiv_over_id FF
GG:= isEquiv: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D D'
η:= unit_over_id isEquiv: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D')
  (disp_functor_composite FF GG)
ε:= counit_over_id isEquiv: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite GG FF)
  (disp_functor_identity D)
∏ (x : C) (xx : D' x),
is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso x) (η x xx)

  apply (is_z_iso_unit_over_id isEquiv).
Defined.


C: category
D', D: disp_cat C
FF: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D' D
isEquiv: is_equiv_over_id FF
GG:= isEquiv: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D D'
η:= unit_over_id isEquiv: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D')
  (disp_functor_composite FF GG)
ε:= counit_over_id isEquiv: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite GG FF)
  (disp_functor_identity D)
disp_adjunction_id_data D D'


C: category
D', D: disp_cat C
FF: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D' D
isEquiv: is_equiv_over_id FF
GG:= isEquiv: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D D'
η:= unit_over_id isEquiv: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D')
  (disp_functor_composite FF GG)
ε:= counit_over_id isEquiv: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite GG FF)
  (disp_functor_identity D)
disp_adjunction_id_data D D'

  
C: category
D', D: disp_cat C
FF: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D' D
isEquiv: is_equiv_over_id FF
GG:= isEquiv: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D D'
η:= unit_over_id isEquiv: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D')
  (disp_functor_composite FF GG)
ε:= counit_over_id isEquiv: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite GG FF)
  (disp_functor_identity D)
∑ GG0 : disp_functor (functor_identity C) D' D,
disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D)
  (disp_functor_composite GG GG0)
× disp_nat_trans
    (nat_trans_id
       (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C))
    (disp_functor_composite GG0 GG)
    (disp_functor_identity D')

  
C: category
D', D: disp_cat C
FF: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D' D
isEquiv: is_equiv_over_id FF
GG:= isEquiv: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D D'
η:= unit_over_id isEquiv: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D')
  (disp_functor_composite FF GG)
ε:= counit_over_id isEquiv: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite GG FF)
  (disp_functor_identity D)
disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D)
  (disp_functor_composite GG FF)
× disp_nat_trans
    (nat_trans_id
       (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C))
    (disp_functor_composite FF GG)
    (disp_functor_identity D')

  
C: category
D', D: disp_cat C
FF: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D' D
isEquiv: is_equiv_over_id FF
GG:= isEquiv: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D D'
η:= unit_over_id isEquiv: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D')
  (disp_functor_composite FF GG)
ε:= counit_over_id isEquiv: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite GG FF)
  (disp_functor_identity D)
disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite FF GG)
  (disp_functor_identity D')

  exact ε_inv.
Defined.


C: category
D', D: disp_cat C
FF: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D' D
isEquiv: is_equiv_over_id FF
GG:= isEquiv: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D D'
η:= unit_over_id isEquiv: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D')
  (disp_functor_composite FF GG)
ε:= counit_over_id isEquiv: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite GG FF)
  (disp_functor_identity D)
form_equiv_over_id inv_adjunction_data

  (disp_functor_identity D')

ε:= counit_over_id isEquiv: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite GG FF)
  (disp_functor_identity D)
form_equiv_over_id inv_adjunction_data

  (disp_functor_composite GG FF)

         (unit_over_id inv_adjunction_data x xx),
 ∏ (x : C) (xx : D' x),
 is_z_iso_disp
   (identity_z_iso
      ((functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C) x))
   (counit_over_id inv_adjunction_data x xx)) 
  ?pr1
