XR:= @is_z_iso_inv_from_is_z_iso_disp: ∏ (C : category) (D : disp_cat_data C) 
(x y : C) (f : z_iso x y) 
(xx : D x) (yy : D y) (ff : xx -->[ f] yy)
(i : is_z_iso_disp f ff),
is_z_iso_disp (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso f)
  (inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso i)
is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso x)
  (inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
     (is_z_iso_counit_over_id (pr2 isEquiv) x xx))

  (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso
     (identity_z_iso
        ((functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C)
           x)))
  (inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
     (is_z_iso_counit_over_id (pr2 isEquiv) x xx))

  (inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso

  (disp_functor_composite FF GG)

D', D: disp_cat C
FF: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D' D
isEquiv: is_equiv_over_id FF
GG:= isEquiv: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D D'
η:= unit_over_id isEquiv: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D')
  (disp_functor_composite FF GG)
ε:= counit_over_id isEquiv: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite GG FF)
  (disp_functor_identity D)
x: C
xx: D x
XR: is_z_iso_disp
  (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso (identity_z_iso x))
  (inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
     (is_z_iso_counit_over_id (pr2 isEquiv) x xx))
is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso x,, ?H'f)
  (inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
     (is_z_iso_counit_over_id (pr2 isEquiv) x xx))

      apply XR.
    
C: category
D', D: disp_cat C
FF: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D' D
isEquiv: is_equiv_over_id FF
GG:= isEquiv: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D D'
η:= unit_over_id isEquiv: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D')
  (disp_functor_composite FF GG)
ε:= counit_over_id isEquiv: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite GG FF)
  (disp_functor_identity D)
(λ _ : ∏ (x : C) (xx : D x),
       is_z_iso_disp
         (identity_z_iso (functor_identity C x))
         (unit_over_id inv_adjunction_data x xx),
 ∏ (x : C) (xx : D' x),
 is_z_iso_disp
   (identity_z_iso
      ((functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C) x))
   (counit_over_id inv_adjunction_data x xx))
  (λ (x : C) (xx : D x),
   (let XR := @is_z_iso_inv_from_is_z_iso_disp in
    let XR0 :=
      XR C D
        ((functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C) x)
        ((functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C) x)
        (identity_z_iso
           ((functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C)
              x))
        (disp_functor_composite
           (pr1 (pr2 (pr1 isEquiv)))
           (pr1 (pr1 isEquiv)) x xx)
        (disp_functor_identity D x xx)
        (counit_over_id (pr1 isEquiv) x xx)
        (is_z_iso_counit_over_id (pr2 isEquiv) x xx)
      in
    is_z_iso_disp_independent_of_is_z_iso
      (identity_z_iso x)
      (inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
         (is_z_iso_counit_over_id (pr2 isEquiv) x xx))
      XR0)
   :
   is_z_iso_disp
     (identity_z_iso (functor_identity C x))
     (unit_over_id inv_adjunction_data x xx))

  (disp_functor_identity D')
  (disp_functor_composite FF GG)
ε:= counit_over_id isEquiv: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite GG FF)
  (disp_functor_identity D)
∏ (x : C) (xx : D' x),
is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso x)
  (inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
     (is_z_iso_unit_over_id (pr2 isEquiv) x xx))

C: category
D', D: disp_cat C
FF: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D' D
isEquiv: is_equiv_over_id FF
GG:= isEquiv: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D D'
η:= unit_over_id isEquiv: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D')
  (disp_functor_composite FF GG)
ε:= counit_over_id isEquiv: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite GG FF)
  (disp_functor_identity D)
triangle_1_statement_over_id inv_adjunction_data


C: category
D', D: disp_cat C
FF: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D' D
isEquiv: is_equiv_over_id FF
GG:= isEquiv: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D D'
η:= unit_over_id isEquiv: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D')
  (disp_functor_composite FF GG)
ε:= counit_over_id isEquiv: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite GG FF)
  (disp_functor_identity D)
triangle_1_statement_over_id inv_adjunction_data

  
C: category
D', D: disp_cat C
FF: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D' D
isEquiv: is_equiv_over_id FF
GG:= isEquiv: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D D'
η:= unit_over_id isEquiv: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D')
  (disp_functor_composite FF GG)
ε:= counit_over_id isEquiv: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite GG FF)
  (disp_functor_identity D)
x: C
xx: D x
♯ inv_adjunction_data
  (unit_over_id inv_adjunction_data x xx) ;; counit_over_id
                                               inv_adjunction_data
                                               (functor_identity
                                                 C x)
                                               (inv_adjunction_data
                                                 x xx) =
transportb
  (mor_disp
     (inv_adjunction_data (functor_identity C x)
        (disp_functor_identity D x xx))
     (inv_adjunction_data (functor_identity C x)
        (disp_functor_identity D x xx)))
  (id_left
     (identity
        (functor_identity C (functor_identity C x))))
  (id_disp
     (inv_adjunction_data (functor_identity C x)
        (disp_functor_identity D x xx)))
 
C: category
D', D: disp_cat C
FF: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D' D
isEquiv: is_equiv_over_id FF
GG:= isEquiv: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D D'
η:= unit_over_id isEquiv: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D')
  (disp_functor_composite FF GG)
ε:= counit_over_id isEquiv: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite GG FF)
  (disp_functor_identity D)
x: C
xx: D x
♯ GG
  (inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
     (is_z_iso_counit_over_id (pr2 isEquiv) x xx)) ;; 
inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
  (is_z_iso_unit_over_id (pr2 isEquiv) x (GG x xx)) =
transportb (mor_disp (GG x xx) (GG x xx))
  (id_left (identity x)) (id_disp (GG x xx))

        
C: category
D', D: disp_cat C
FF: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D' D
isEquiv: is_equiv_over_id FF
GG:= isEquiv: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D D'
η:= unit_over_id isEquiv: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D')
  (disp_functor_composite FF GG)
ε:= counit_over_id isEquiv: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite GG FF)
  (disp_functor_identity D)
x: C
xx: D x
XR:= @z_iso_disp_precomp: ∏ (C : category) (D : disp_cat C) 
(x y : C) (f : z_iso x y) 
(xx : D x) (yy : D y) (ff : z_iso_disp f xx yy)
(y' : C) (f' : C ⟦ y, y' ⟧) 
(yy' : D y'),
isweq (λ ff' : yy -->[ f'] yy', pr1 ff ;; ff')
♯ GG
  (inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
     (is_z_iso_counit_over_id (pr2 isEquiv) x xx)) ;; 
inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
  (is_z_iso_unit_over_id (pr2 isEquiv) x (GG x xx)) =
transportb (mor_disp (GG x xx) (GG x xx))
  (id_left (identity x)) (id_disp (GG x xx))

        
C: category
D', D: disp_cat C
FF: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D' D
isEquiv: is_equiv_over_id FF
GG:= isEquiv: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D D'
η:= unit_over_id isEquiv: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D')
  (disp_functor_composite FF GG)
ε:= counit_over_id isEquiv: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite GG FF)
  (disp_functor_identity D)
x: C
xx: D x
XR:= @z_iso_disp_precomp: ∏ (C : category) (D : disp_cat C) 
(x y : C) (f : z_iso x y) 
(xx : D x) (yy : D y) (ff : z_iso_disp f xx yy)
(y' : C) (f' : C ⟦ y, y' ⟧) 
(yy' : D y'),
isweq (λ ff' : yy -->[ f'] yy', pr1 ff ;; ff')
Gepsxxx:= ♯ GG (ε x xx): GG (functor_identity C x)
  (disp_functor_composite GG FF x xx) -->[
(# (functor_identity C))%cat
  (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C) x)] 
GG (functor_identity C x)
  (disp_functor_identity D x xx)
♯ GG
  (inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
     (is_z_iso_counit_over_id (pr2 isEquiv) x xx)) ;; 
inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
  (is_z_iso_unit_over_id (pr2 isEquiv) x (GG x xx)) =
transportb (mor_disp (GG x xx) (GG x xx))
  (id_left (identity x)) (id_disp (GG x xx))

        
C: category
D', D: disp_cat C
FF: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D' D
isEquiv: is_equiv_over_id FF
GG:= isEquiv: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D D'
η:= unit_over_id isEquiv: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D')
  (disp_functor_composite FF GG)
ε:= counit_over_id isEquiv: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite GG FF)
  (disp_functor_identity D)
x: C
xx: D x
XR:= @z_iso_disp_precomp: ∏ (C : category) (D : disp_cat C) 
(x y : C) (f : z_iso x y) 
(xx : D x) (yy : D y) (ff : z_iso_disp f xx yy)
(y' : C) (f' : C ⟦ y, y' ⟧) 
(yy' : D y'),
isweq (λ ff' : yy -->[ f'] yy', pr1 ff ;; ff')
Gepsxxx:= ♯ GG (ε x xx): GG (functor_identity C x)
  (disp_functor_composite GG FF x xx) -->[
(# (functor_identity C))%cat
  (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C) x)] 
GG (functor_identity C x)
  (disp_functor_identity D x xx)
RG:= @disp_functor_on_is_z_iso_disp C C
  (functor_identity C): ∏ (D D' : disp_cat C)
(FF : disp_functor (functor_identity C) D D')
(x y : C) (xx : D x) (yy : pr1 D y)
(f : z_iso x y) (ff : xx -->[ f] yy),
is_z_iso_disp f ff
→ is_z_iso_disp
    (functor_on_z_iso (functor_identity C) f)
    (♯ FF ff)
♯ GG
  (inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
     (is_z_iso_counit_over_id (pr2 isEquiv) x xx)) ;; 
inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
  (is_z_iso_unit_over_id (pr2 isEquiv) x (GG x xx)) =
transportb (mor_disp (GG x xx) (GG x xx))
  (id_left (identity x)) (id_disp (GG x xx))

        
C: category
D', D: disp_cat C
FF: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D' D
isEquiv: is_equiv_over_id FF
GG:= isEquiv: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D D'
η:= unit_over_id isEquiv: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D')
  (disp_functor_composite FF GG)
ε:= counit_over_id isEquiv: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite GG FF)
  (disp_functor_identity D)
x: C
xx: D x

(y' : C) (f' : C ⟦ y, y' ⟧) 
(yy' : D y'),
isweq (λ ff' : yy -->[ f'] yy', pr1 ff ;; ff')

  (disp_functor_composite GG FF x xx) -->[
(# (functor_identity C))%cat
  (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C) x)] 
GG (functor_identity C x)
  (disp_functor_identity D x xx)
RG: ∏ (x y : C) (xx : D x) 
(yy : pr1 D y) (f : z_iso x y)
(ff : xx -->[ f] yy),
is_z_iso_disp f ff
→ is_z_iso_disp
    (functor_on_z_iso (functor_identity C) f)
    (♯ GG ff)
♯ GG
  (inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
     (is_z_iso_counit_over_id (pr2 isEquiv) x xx)) ;; 
inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
  (is_z_iso_unit_over_id (pr2 isEquiv) x (GG x xx)) =
transportb (mor_disp (GG x xx) (GG x xx))
  (id_left (identity x)) (id_disp (GG x xx))

D', D: disp_cat C

  (disp_functor_identity D')
  (disp_functor_composite FF GG)

  (disp_functor_composite GG FF)

xx: D x

     (identity_z_iso (functor_identity C x)))

inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
  (is_z_iso_unit_over_id (pr2 isEquiv) x (GG x xx)) =
transportb (mor_disp (GG x xx) (GG x xx))
  (id_left (identity x)) (id_disp (GG x xx))

D', D: disp_cat C

isEquiv: is_equiv_over_id FF

η:= unit_over_id isEquiv: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D')
  (disp_functor_composite FF GG)
ε:= counit_over_id isEquiv: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite GG FF)
  (disp_functor_identity D)
x: C
xx: D x

(x y : C) (f : z_iso x y)

(y' : C) (f' : C ⟦ y, y' ⟧) 
(yy' : D y'),
isweq (λ ff' : yy -->[ f'] yy', pr1 ff ;; ff')

  (disp_functor_composite GG FF x xx) -->[

     (is_z_iso_counit_over_id (pr2 isEquiv) x xx)) ;; 
inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
  (is_z_iso_unit_over_id (pr2 isEquiv) x (GG x xx)): GG x xx -->[ identity x · identity x] GG x xx
E =
transportb (mor_disp (GG x xx) (GG x xx))
  (id_left (identity x)) (id_disp (GG x xx))

C: category
D', D: disp_cat C
FF: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D' D
isEquiv: is_equiv_over_id FF
GG:= isEquiv: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D D'
η:= unit_over_id isEquiv: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D')
  (disp_functor_composite FF GG)
ε:= counit_over_id isEquiv: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite GG FF)
  (disp_functor_identity D)
x: C
xx: D x
Gepsxxx:= ♯ GG (ε x xx): GG (functor_identity C x)
  (disp_functor_composite GG FF x xx) -->[
(# (functor_identity C))%cat
  (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C) x)] 
GG (functor_identity C x)
  (disp_functor_identity D x xx)
RG: is_z_iso_disp
  (functor_on_z_iso (functor_identity C)
     (identity_z_iso (functor_identity C x)))
  (♯ GG (ε x xx))
Ge:= make_z_iso_disp Gepsxxx
  (is_z_iso_disp_independent_of_is_z_iso
     (identity_z_iso
        (functor_identity C (functor_identity C x)))
     Gepsxxx RG): z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso x)
  (GG (functor_identity C (functor_identity C x))
     (FF (functor_identity C x) (GG x xx)))
  (GG x xx)
XR: ∏ (y' : C) (f' : C ⟦ x, y' ⟧) 
(yy' : D' y'),
isweq
  (λ ff' : GG x xx -->[ f'] yy', pr1 Ge ;; ff')
E:= ♯ GG
  (inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
     (is_z_iso_counit_over_id (pr2 isEquiv) x xx)) ;; 
inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
  (is_z_iso_unit_over_id (pr2 isEquiv) x (GG x xx)): GG x xx -->[ identity x · identity x] GG x xx
E =
transportb (mor_disp (GG x xx) (GG x xx))
  (id_left (identity x)) (id_disp (GG x xx))

        
C: category
D', D: disp_cat C
FF: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D' D
isEquiv: is_equiv_over_id FF
GG:= isEquiv: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D D'
η:= unit_over_id isEquiv: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D')
  (disp_functor_composite FF GG)
ε:= counit_over_id isEquiv: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite GG FF)
  (disp_functor_identity D)
x: C
xx: D x
Gepsxxx:= ♯ GG (ε x xx): GG (functor_identity C x)
  (disp_functor_composite GG FF x xx) -->[
(# (functor_identity C))%cat
  (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C) x)] 
GG (functor_identity C x)
  (disp_functor_identity D x xx)
RG: is_z_iso_disp
  (functor_on_z_iso (functor_identity C)
     (identity_z_iso (functor_identity C x)))
  (♯ GG (ε x xx))
Ge:= make_z_iso_disp Gepsxxx
  (is_z_iso_disp_independent_of_is_z_iso
     (identity_z_iso
        (functor_identity C (functor_identity C x)))
     Gepsxxx RG): z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso x)
  (GG (functor_identity C (functor_identity C x))
     (FF (functor_identity C x) (GG x xx)))
  (GG x xx)
XR: isweq
  (λ ff' : GG x xx -->[
           identity x · identity x] 
           GG x xx, pr1 Ge ;; ff')
E:= ♯ GG
  (inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
     (is_z_iso_counit_over_id (pr2 isEquiv) x xx)) ;; 
inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
  (is_z_iso_unit_over_id (pr2 isEquiv) x (GG x xx)): GG x xx -->[ identity x · identity x] GG x xx
E =
transportb (mor_disp (GG x xx) (GG x xx))
  (id_left (identity x)) (id_disp (GG x xx))

D', D: disp_cat C

η:= unit_over_id isEquiv: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D')
  (disp_functor_composite FF GG)
ε:= counit_over_id isEquiv: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))

x: C
xx: D x
Gepsxxx:= ♯ GG (ε x xx): GG (functor_identity C x)
  (disp_functor_composite GG FF x xx) -->[
(# (functor_identity C))%cat
  (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C) x)] 
GG (functor_identity C x)
  (disp_functor_identity D x xx)
RG: is_z_iso_disp
  (functor_on_z_iso (functor_identity C)
     (identity_z_iso (functor_identity C x)))

Ge:= make_z_iso_disp Gepsxxx
  (is_z_iso_disp_independent_of_is_z_iso
     (identity_z_iso
        (functor_identity C (functor_identity C x)))
     Gepsxxx RG): z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso x)
  (GG (functor_identity C (functor_identity C x))

  (GG x xx)
XR: isweq
  (λ ff' : GG x xx -->[
           identity x · identity x] 
           GG x xx, pr1 Ge ;; ff')
E:= ♯ GG
  (inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
     (is_z_iso_counit_over_id (pr2 isEquiv) x xx)) ;; 
inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
  (is_z_iso_unit_over_id (pr2 isEquiv) x (GG x xx)): GG x xx -->[ identity x · identity x] GG x xx
make_weq
  (λ ff' : GG x xx -->[
           identity x · identity x] GG x xx,
   pr1 Ge ;; ff') XR E =
make_weq
  (λ ff' : GG x xx -->[
           identity x · identity x] GG x xx,
   pr1 Ge ;; ff') XR
  (transportb (mor_disp (GG x xx) (GG x xx))
     (id_left (identity x)) (id_disp (GG x xx)))

D', D: disp_cat C

η:= unit_over_id isEquiv: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D')

                 (is_z_iso_unit_over_id 
                    (pr2 isEquiv) x 
                    (GG x xx))) =
♯ GG (ε x xx) ;; transportb
                   (mor_disp (GG x xx) (GG x xx))
                   (id_left (identity x))
                   (id_disp (GG x xx))

                
C: category
D', D: disp_cat C
FF: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D' D
isEquiv: is_equiv_over_id FF
GG:= isEquiv: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D D'
η:= unit_over_id isEquiv: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D')
  (disp_functor_composite FF GG)
ε:= counit_over_id isEquiv: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite GG FF)
  (disp_functor_identity D)
x: C
xx: D x
Gepsxxx:= ♯ GG (ε x xx): GG (functor_identity C x)
  (disp_functor_composite GG FF x xx) -->[
(# (functor_identity C))%cat
  (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C) x)] 
GG (functor_identity C x)
  (disp_functor_identity D x xx)
transportf
  (mor_disp (GG x (FF x (GG x xx))) (GG x xx))
  (cancel_postcomposition
     ((# (functor_identity C))%cat
        (pr1 (pr2 C) x · pr1 (pr2 C) x))
     (identity x · identity x) (identity x)
     (functor_comp (functor_identity C)
        (pr1 (pr2 C) x) (pr1 (pr2 C) x)) @
   ! assoc (identity x) (identity x) (identity x))
  (♯ GG
     (transportb
        (mor_disp
           (disp_functor_composite
              (pr1 (pr2 (pr1 isEquiv)))
              (pr1 (pr1 isEquiv)) x xx)
           (disp_functor_composite
              (pr1 (pr2 (pr1 isEquiv)))
              (pr1 (pr1 isEquiv)) x xx))
        (z_iso_inv_after_z_iso
           (identity_z_iso
              ((functor_identity C
                ∙ functor_identity C) x)))
        (id_disp
           (disp_functor_composite
              (pr1 (pr2 (pr1 isEquiv)))
              (pr1 (pr1 isEquiv)) x xx))) ;; inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
                                               (is_z_iso_unit_over_id
                                                 (pr2
                                                 isEquiv)
                                                 x
                                                 (GG x
                                                 xx))) =
♯ GG (ε x xx) ;; transportb
                   (mor_disp (GG x xx) (GG x xx))
                   (id_left (identity x))
                   (id_disp (GG x xx))

  (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C) x)] 
GG (functor_identity C x)
  (disp_functor_identity D x xx)
transportf
  (mor_disp (GG x (FF x (GG x xx))) (GG x xx))
  (cancel_postcomposition
     ((# (functor_identity C))%cat
        (pr1 (pr2 C) x · pr1 (pr2 C) x))
     (identity x · identity x) (identity x)
     (functor_comp (functor_identity C)
        (pr1 (pr2 C) x) (pr1 (pr2 C) x)) @
   ! assoc (identity x) (identity x) (identity x))
  (transportf
     (mor_disp
        (GG
           ((functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C)
              x)
           (disp_functor_composite
              (pr1 (pr2 (pr1 isEquiv)))
              (pr1 (pr1 isEquiv)) x xx)) (GG x xx))
     (cancel_postcomposition
        ((# (functor_identity C))%cat
           (identity
              ((functor_identity C
                ∙ functor_identity C) x)))
        ((# (functor_identity C))%cat
           (pr1 (pr2 C) x · pr1 (pr2 C) x))
        (identity x)
        (maponpaths (# (functor_identity C))%cat
           (! z_iso_inv_after_z_iso
                (identity_z_iso
                   ((functor_identity C
                     ∙ functor_identity C) x)))))
     (♯ GG
        (id_disp
           (disp_functor_composite
              (pr1 (pr2 (pr1 isEquiv)))
              (pr1 (pr1 isEquiv)) x xx)) ;; inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
                                              (is_z_iso_unit_over_id
                                                 (pr2
                                                 isEquiv)
                                                 x
                                                 (GG x
                                                 xx)))) =
?b

isEquiv: is_equiv_over_id FF
GG:= isEquiv: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D D'
η:= unit_over_id isEquiv: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D')
  (disp_functor_composite FF GG)
ε:= counit_over_id isEquiv: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite GG FF)
  (disp_functor_identity D)

xx: D x

  (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C) x)] 
GG (functor_identity C x)

                   (mor_disp (GG x xx) (GG x xx))
                   (id_left (identity x))

isEquiv: is_equiv_over_id FF
GG:= isEquiv: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D D'
η:= unit_over_id isEquiv: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D')
  (disp_functor_composite FF GG)
ε:= counit_over_id isEquiv: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite GG FF)
  (disp_functor_identity D)
x: C
xx: D x
Gepsxxx:= ♯ GG (ε x xx): GG (functor_identity C x)
  (disp_functor_composite GG FF x xx) -->[
(# (functor_identity C))%cat
  (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C) x)] 
GG (functor_identity C x)
  (disp_functor_identity D x xx)
transportf
  (mor_disp (GG x (FF x (GG x xx))) (GG x xx))
  (cancel_postcomposition
     ((# (functor_identity C))%cat
        (identity
           ((functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C)
              x)))
     ((# (functor_identity C))%cat
        (pr1 (pr2 C) x · pr1 (pr2 C) x)) (identity x)
     (maponpaths (# (functor_identity C))%cat
        (! z_iso_inv_after_z_iso
             (identity_z_iso
                ((functor_identity C
                  ∙ functor_identity C) x)))) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     ((# (functor_identity C))%cat
        (pr1 (pr2 C) x · pr1 (pr2 C) x))
     (identity x · identity x) (identity x)
     (functor_comp (functor_identity C)
        (pr1 (pr2 C) x) (pr1 (pr2 C) x)) @
   ! assoc (identity x) (identity x) (identity x))
  (transportf
     (mor_disp
        (GG x
           (disp_functor_composite
              (pr1 (pr2 (pr1 isEquiv)))
              (pr1 (pr1 isEquiv)) x xx)) (GG x xx))
     (cancel_postcomposition
        (identity (functor_identity C x))
        ((# (functor_identity C))%cat
           (identity
              ((functor_identity C
                ∙ functor_identity C) x)))
        (identity x)
        (! functor_id (functor_identity C) x))
     (id_disp
        (GG x
           (disp_functor_composite
              (pr1 (pr2 (pr1 isEquiv)))
              (pr1 (pr1 isEquiv)) x xx)) ;; inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
                                              (is_z_iso_unit_over_id
                                                 (pr2
                                                 isEquiv)
                                                 x
                                                 (GG x
                                                 xx)))) =
♯ GG (ε x xx) ;; transportb
                   (mor_disp (GG x xx) (GG x xx))
                   (id_left (identity x))
                   (id_disp (GG x xx))

        
C: category
D', D: disp_cat C
FF: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D' D
isEquiv: is_equiv_over_id FF
GG:= isEquiv: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D D'
η:= unit_over_id isEquiv: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D')
  (disp_functor_composite FF GG)
ε:= counit_over_id isEquiv: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite GG FF)
  (disp_functor_identity D)
x: C
xx: D x
Gepsxxx:= ♯ GG (ε x xx): GG (functor_identity C x)
  (disp_functor_composite GG FF x xx) -->[
(# (functor_identity C))%cat
  (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C) x)] 
GG (functor_identity C x)
  (disp_functor_identity D x xx)
transportf
  (mor_disp (GG x (FF x (GG x xx))) (GG x xx))
  (cancel_postcomposition
     ((# (functor_identity C))%cat
        (identity
           ((functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C)
              x)))
     ((# (functor_identity C))%cat
        (pr1 (pr2 C) x · pr1 (pr2 C) x)) (identity x)
     (maponpaths (# (functor_identity C))%cat
        (! z_iso_inv_after_z_iso
             (identity_z_iso
                ((functor_identity C
                  ∙ functor_identity C) x)))) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     ((# (functor_identity C))%cat
        (pr1 (pr2 C) x · pr1 (pr2 C) x))
     (identity x · identity x) (identity x)
     (functor_comp (functor_identity C)
        (pr1 (pr2 C) x) (pr1 (pr2 C) x)) @
   ! assoc (identity x) (identity x) (identity x))
  (transportf
     (mor_disp
        (GG x
           (disp_functor_composite
              (pr1 (pr2 (pr1 isEquiv)))
              (pr1 (pr1 isEquiv)) x xx)) (GG x xx))
     (cancel_postcomposition
        (identity (functor_identity C x))
        ((# (functor_identity C))%cat
           (identity
              ((functor_identity C
                ∙ functor_identity C) x)))
        (identity x)
        (! functor_id (functor_identity C) x))
     (id_disp
        (GG x
           (disp_functor_composite
              (pr1 (pr2 (pr1 isEquiv)))
              (pr1 (pr1 isEquiv)) x xx)) ;; inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
                                              (is_z_iso_unit_over_id
                                                 (pr2
                                                 isEquiv)
                                                 x
                                                 (GG x
                                                 xx)))) =
?b

η:= unit_over_id isEquiv: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))

D', D: disp_cat C

  (disp_functor_identity D')
  (disp_functor_composite FF GG)

  (disp_functor_composite GG FF)
  (disp_functor_identity D)
x: C
xx: D x
Gepsxxx:= ♯ GG (ε x xx): GG (functor_identity C x)
  (disp_functor_composite GG FF x xx) -->[
(# (functor_identity C))%cat
  (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C) x)] 
GG (functor_identity C x)
  (disp_functor_identity D x xx)
transportf
  (mor_disp
     (GG x
        (disp_functor_composite
           (pr1 (pr2 (pr1 isEquiv)))
           (pr1 (pr1 isEquiv)) x xx)) 
     (GG x xx))
  (cancel_postcomposition
     (identity (functor_identity C x))
     ((# (functor_identity C))%cat
        (identity
           ((functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C)
              x))) (identity x)
     (! functor_id (functor_identity C) x) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     ((# (functor_identity C))%cat
        (identity
           ((functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C)
              x)))
     ((# (functor_identity C))%cat
        (pr1 (pr2 C) x · pr1 (pr2 C) x)) 
     (identity x)
     (maponpaths (# (functor_identity C))%cat
        (! z_iso_inv_after_z_iso
             (identity_z_iso
                ((functor_identity C
                  ∙ functor_identity C) x)))) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     ((# (functor_identity C))%cat
        (pr1 (pr2 C) x · pr1 (pr2 C) x))
     (identity x · identity x) 
     (identity x)
     (functor_comp (functor_identity C)
        (pr1 (pr2 C) x) 
        (pr1 (pr2 C) x)) @
   ! assoc (identity x) (identity x) (identity x)) 
  ?t2 =
♯ GG (ε x xx) ;; transportb
                   (mor_disp (GG x xx) (GG x xx))
                   (id_left (identity x))

C: category
D', D: disp_cat C
FF: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D' D
isEquiv: is_equiv_over_id FF
GG:= isEquiv: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D D'
η:= unit_over_id isEquiv: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D')
  (disp_functor_composite FF GG)
ε:= counit_over_id isEquiv: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite GG FF)
  (disp_functor_identity D)
x: C
xx: D x
Gepsxxx:= ♯ GG (ε x xx): GG (functor_identity C x)
  (disp_functor_composite GG FF x xx) -->[
(# (functor_identity C))%cat
  (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C) x)] 
GG (functor_identity C x)
  (disp_functor_identity D x xx)
∏
p : identity x =
    identity x · (identity x · identity x),
transportf
  (mor_disp
     (GG x
        (disp_functor_composite
           (pr1 (pr2 (pr1 isEquiv)))
           (pr1 (pr1 isEquiv)) x xx)) (GG x xx)) p
  (inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
     (is_z_iso_unit_over_id (pr2 isEquiv) x (GG x xx))) =
♯ GG (ε x xx) ;; transportb
                   (mor_disp (GG x xx) (GG x xx))
                   (id_left (identity x))
                   (id_disp (GG x xx))

        
C: category
D', D: disp_cat C
FF: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D' D
isEquiv: is_equiv_over_id FF
GG:= isEquiv: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D D'
η:= unit_over_id isEquiv: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D')
  (disp_functor_composite FF GG)
ε:= counit_over_id isEquiv: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite GG FF)
  (disp_functor_identity D)
x: C
xx: D x
Gepsxxx:= ♯ GG (ε x xx): GG (functor_identity C x)
  (disp_functor_composite GG FF x xx) -->[
(# (functor_identity C))%cat
  (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C) x)] 
GG (functor_identity C x)
  (disp_functor_identity D x xx)
EE: identity x =
identity x · (identity x · identity x)
transportf
  (mor_disp
     (GG x
        (disp_functor_composite
           (pr1 (pr2 (pr1 isEquiv)))
           (pr1 (pr1 isEquiv)) x xx)) (GG x xx)) EE
  (inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
     (is_z_iso_unit_over_id (pr2 isEquiv) x (GG x xx))) =
♯ GG (ε x xx) ;; transportb
                   (mor_disp (GG x xx) (GG x xx))
                   (id_left (identity x))
                   (id_disp (GG x xx))


        
C: category
D', D: disp_cat C
FF: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D' D
isEquiv: is_equiv_over_id FF
GG:= isEquiv: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D D'
η:= unit_over_id isEquiv: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D')
  (disp_functor_composite FF GG)
ε:= counit_over_id isEquiv: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite GG FF)
  (disp_functor_identity D)
x: C
xx: D x
Gepsxxx:= ♯ GG (ε x xx): GG (functor_identity C x)
  (disp_functor_composite GG FF x xx) -->[
(# (functor_identity C))%cat
  (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C) x)] 
GG (functor_identity C x)
  (disp_functor_identity D x xx)
EE: identity x =
identity x · (identity x · identity x)
XR:= @z_iso_disp_precomp: ∏ (C : category) (D : disp_cat C) 
(x y : C) (f : z_iso x y) 
(xx : D x) (yy : D y) (ff : z_iso_disp f xx yy)
(y' : C) (f' : C ⟦ y, y' ⟧) 
(yy' : D y'),
isweq (λ ff' : yy -->[ f'] yy', pr1 ff ;; ff')
transportf
  (mor_disp
     (GG x
        (disp_functor_composite
           (pr1 (pr2 (pr1 isEquiv)))
           (pr1 (pr1 isEquiv)) x xx)) (GG x xx)) EE
  (inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
     (is_z_iso_unit_over_id (pr2 isEquiv) x (GG x xx))) =
♯ GG (ε x xx) ;; transportb
                   (mor_disp (GG x xx) (GG x xx))
                   (id_left (identity x))
                   (id_disp (GG x xx))

        
C: category
D', D: disp_cat C
FF: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D' D
isEquiv: is_equiv_over_id FF
GG:= isEquiv: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D D'
η:= unit_over_id isEquiv: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D')
  (disp_functor_composite FF GG)
ε:= counit_over_id isEquiv: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite GG FF)
  (disp_functor_identity D)
x: C
xx: D x
Gepsxxx:= ♯ GG (ε x xx): GG (functor_identity C x)
  (disp_functor_composite GG FF x xx) -->[
(# (functor_identity C))%cat
  (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C) x)] 
GG (functor_identity C x)
  (disp_functor_identity D x xx)
EE: identity x =
identity x · (identity x · identity x)
XR:= @z_iso_disp_precomp: ∏ (C : category) (D : disp_cat C) 
(x y : C) (f : z_iso x y) 
(xx : D x) (yy : D y) (ff : z_iso_disp f xx yy)
(y' : C) (f' : C ⟦ y, y' ⟧) 
(yy' : D y'),
isweq (λ ff' : yy -->[ f'] yy', pr1 ff ;; ff')
etaGxxx:= η (functor_identity C x) (GG x xx): disp_functor_identity D'
  (functor_identity C x) 
  (GG x xx) -->[
nat_trans_id (functor_identity C)
  (functor_identity C x)] 
disp_functor_composite FF GG
  (functor_identity C x) 
  (GG x xx)
transportf
  (mor_disp
     (GG x
        (disp_functor_composite
           (pr1 (pr2 (pr1 isEquiv)))
           (pr1 (pr1 isEquiv)) x xx)) (GG x xx)) EE
  (inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
     (is_z_iso_unit_over_id (pr2 isEquiv) x (GG x xx))) =
♯ GG (ε x xx) ;; transportb
                   (mor_disp (GG x xx) (GG x xx))
                   (id_left (identity x))
                   (id_disp (GG x xx))

        
C: category
D', D: disp_cat C
FF: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D' D
isEquiv: is_equiv_over_id FF
GG:= isEquiv: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D D'
η:= unit_over_id isEquiv: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D')
  (disp_functor_composite FF GG)
ε:= counit_over_id isEquiv: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite GG FF)
  (disp_functor_identity D)
x: C
xx: D x
Gepsxxx:= ♯ GG (ε x xx): GG (functor_identity C x)
  (disp_functor_composite GG FF x xx) -->[
(# (functor_identity C))%cat
  (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C) x)] 
GG (functor_identity C x)
  (disp_functor_identity D x xx)
EE: identity x =
identity x · (identity x · identity x)
XR:= @z_iso_disp_precomp: ∏ (C : category) (D : disp_cat C) 
(x y : C) (f : z_iso x y) 
(xx : D x) (yy : D y) (ff : z_iso_disp f xx yy)
(y' : C) (f' : C ⟦ y, y' ⟧) 
(yy' : D y'),
isweq (λ ff' : yy -->[ f'] yy', pr1 ff ;; ff')
etaGxxx:= η (functor_identity C x) (GG x xx): disp_functor_identity D'
  (functor_identity C x) 
  (GG x xx) -->[
nat_trans_id (functor_identity C)
  (functor_identity C x)] 
disp_functor_composite FF GG
  (functor_identity C x) 
  (GG x xx)
z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso x) (GG x xx)
  (GG (functor_identity C (functor_identity C x))
     (FF (functor_identity C x) (GG x xx)))
C: category
D', D: disp_cat C
FF: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D' D
isEquiv: is_equiv_over_id FF
GG:= isEquiv: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D D'
η:= unit_over_id isEquiv: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D')
  (disp_functor_composite FF GG)
ε:= counit_over_id isEquiv: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite GG FF)
  (disp_functor_identity D)
x: C
xx: D x
Gepsxxx:= ♯ GG (ε x xx): GG (functor_identity C x)
  (disp_functor_composite GG FF x xx) -->[
(# (functor_identity C))%cat
  (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C) x)] 
GG (functor_identity C x)
  (disp_functor_identity D x xx)
EE: identity x =
identity x · (identity x · identity x)
XR:= @z_iso_disp_precomp: ∏ (C : category) (D : disp_cat C) 
(x y : C) (f : z_iso x y) 
(xx : D x) (yy : D y) (ff : z_iso_disp f xx yy)
(y' : C) (f' : C ⟦ y, y' ⟧) 
(yy' : D y'),
isweq (λ ff' : yy -->[ f'] yy', pr1 ff ;; ff')
etaGxxx:= η (functor_identity C x) (GG x xx): disp_functor_identity D'
  (functor_identity C x) 
  (GG x xx) -->[
nat_trans_id (functor_identity C)
  (functor_identity C x)] 
disp_functor_composite FF GG
  (functor_identity C x) 
  (GG x xx)
Ge:= ?Goal: z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso x) 
  (GG x xx)
  (GG (functor_identity C (functor_identity C x))
     (FF (functor_identity C x) (GG x xx)))
transportf
  (mor_disp
     (GG x
        (disp_functor_composite
           (pr1 (pr2 (pr1 isEquiv)))
           (pr1 (pr1 isEquiv)) x xx)) 
     (GG x xx)) EE
  (inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
     (is_z_iso_unit_over_id (pr2 isEquiv) x (GG x xx))) =
♯ GG (ε x xx) ;; transportb
                   (mor_disp (GG x xx) (GG x xx))
                   (id_left (identity x))
                   (id_disp (GG x xx))

D', D: disp_cat C
FF: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D' D
isEquiv: is_equiv_over_id FF
GG:= isEquiv: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D D'
η:= unit_over_id isEquiv: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D')
  (disp_functor_composite FF GG)
ε:= counit_over_id isEquiv: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite GG FF)
  (disp_functor_identity D)
x: C
xx: D x
Gepsxxx:= ♯ GG (ε x xx): GG (functor_identity C x)
  (disp_functor_composite GG FF x xx) -->[
(# (functor_identity C))%cat
  (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C) x)] 
GG (functor_identity C x)
  (disp_functor_identity D x xx)
EE: identity x =
identity x · (identity x · identity x)
XR:= @z_iso_disp_precomp: ∏ (C : category) (D : disp_cat C) 
(x y : C) (f : z_iso x y) 
(xx : D x) (yy : D y) (ff : z_iso_disp f xx yy)
(y' : C) (f' : C ⟦ y, y' ⟧) 
(yy' : D y'),
isweq (λ ff' : yy -->[ f'] yy', pr1 ff ;; ff')
etaGxxx:= η (functor_identity C x) (GG x xx): disp_functor_identity D'
  (functor_identity C x) 
  (GG x xx) -->[
nat_trans_id (functor_identity C)
  (functor_identity C x)] 
disp_functor_composite FF GG
  (functor_identity C x) 
  (GG x xx)
z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso x) (GG x xx)
  (GG (functor_identity C (functor_identity C x))
     (FF (functor_identity C x) (GG x xx)))
 
C: category
D', D: disp_cat C
FF: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D' D
isEquiv: is_equiv_over_id FF
GG:= isEquiv: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D D'
η:= unit_over_id isEquiv: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D')
  (disp_functor_composite FF GG)
ε:= counit_over_id isEquiv: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite GG FF)
  (disp_functor_identity D)
x: C
xx: D x
Gepsxxx:= ♯ GG (ε x xx): GG (functor_identity C x)
  (disp_functor_composite GG FF x xx) -->[
(# (functor_identity C))%cat
  (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C) x)] 
GG (functor_identity C x)
  (disp_functor_identity D x xx)
EE: identity x =
identity x · (identity x · identity x)

(x y : C) (f : z_iso x y) 
(xx : D x) (yy : D y) (ff : z_iso_disp f xx yy)
(y' : C) (f' : C ⟦ y, y' ⟧) 
(yy' : D y'),
isweq (λ ff' : yy -->[ f'] yy', pr1 ff ;; ff')
etaGxxx:= η (functor_identity C x) (GG x xx): disp_functor_identity D'
  (functor_identity C x) 
  (GG x xx) -->[
nat_trans_id (functor_identity C)
  (functor_identity C x)] 
disp_functor_composite FF GG
  (functor_identity C x) 
  (GG x xx)
is_z_iso_disp
  (identity_z_iso
     (functor_identity C (functor_identity C x)))
  etaGxxx

          
C: category
D', D: disp_cat C
FF: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D' D
isEquiv: is_equiv_over_id FF
GG:= isEquiv: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D D'
η:= unit_over_id isEquiv: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D')
  (disp_functor_composite FF GG)
ε:= counit_over_id isEquiv: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite GG FF)
  (disp_functor_identity D)
x: C
xx: D x
Gepsxxx:= ♯ GG (ε x xx): GG (functor_identity C x)
  (disp_functor_composite GG FF x xx) -->[
(# (functor_identity C))%cat
  (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C) x)] 
GG (functor_identity C x)
  (disp_functor_identity D x xx)
EE: identity x =
identity x · (identity x · identity x)
XR:= @z_iso_disp_precomp: ∏ (C : category) (D : disp_cat C) 
(x y : C) (f : z_iso x y) 
(xx : D x) (yy : D y) (ff : z_iso_disp f xx yy)
(y' : C) (f' : C ⟦ y, y' ⟧) 
(yy' : D y'),
isweq (λ ff' : yy -->[ f'] yy', pr1 ff ;; ff')
etaGxxx:= η (functor_identity C x) (GG x xx): disp_functor_identity D'
  (functor_identity C x) 
  (GG x xx) -->[
nat_trans_id (functor_identity C)
  (functor_identity C x)] 
disp_functor_composite FF GG
  (functor_identity C x) 
  (GG x xx)
is_z_iso_disp
  (identity_z_iso
     (functor_identity C (functor_identity C x)),,
   ?H'f) etaGxxx

          apply (is_z_iso_unit_over_id (pr2 isEquiv) ).
        
C: category
D', D: disp_cat C
FF: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D' D
isEquiv: is_equiv_over_id FF
GG:= isEquiv: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D D'
η:= unit_over_id isEquiv: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D')
  (disp_functor_composite FF GG)
ε:= counit_over_id isEquiv: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite GG FF)
  (disp_functor_identity D)
x: C
xx: D x
Gepsxxx:= ♯ GG (ε x xx): GG (functor_identity C x)
  (disp_functor_composite GG FF x xx) -->[
(# (functor_identity C))%cat
  (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C) x)] 
GG (functor_identity C x)
  (disp_functor_identity D x xx)
EE: identity x =
identity x · (identity x · identity x)
XR:= @z_iso_disp_precomp: ∏ (C : category) (D : disp_cat C) 
(x y : C) (f : z_iso x y) 
(xx : D x) (yy : D y) (ff : z_iso_disp f xx yy)
(y' : C) (f' : C ⟦ y, y' ⟧) 
(yy' : D y'),
isweq (λ ff' : yy -->[ f'] yy', pr1 ff ;; ff')
etaGxxx:= η (functor_identity C x) (GG x xx): disp_functor_identity D'
  (functor_identity C x) 
  (GG x xx) -->[
nat_trans_id (functor_identity C)
  (functor_identity C x)] 
disp_functor_composite FF GG
  (functor_identity C x) 
  (GG x xx)
Ge:= make_z_iso_disp etaGxxx
  (is_z_iso_disp_independent_of_is_z_iso
     (identity_z_iso
        (functor_identity C (functor_identity C x)))
     etaGxxx
     (is_z_iso_unit_over_id 
        (pr2 isEquiv) (functor_identity C x)
        (GG x xx))): z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso x) 
  (GG x xx)
  (GG (functor_identity C (functor_identity C x))
     (FF (functor_identity C x) (GG x xx)))
transportf
  (mor_disp
     (GG x
        (disp_functor_composite
           (pr1 (pr2 (pr1 isEquiv)))
           (pr1 (pr1 isEquiv)) x xx)) (GG x xx)) EE
  (inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
     (is_z_iso_unit_over_id (pr2 isEquiv) x (GG x xx))) =
♯ GG (ε x xx) ;; transportb
                   (mor_disp (GG x xx) (GG x xx))
                   (id_left (identity x))
                   (id_disp (GG x xx))


        
C: category
D', D: disp_cat C
FF: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D' D
isEquiv: is_equiv_over_id FF
GG:= isEquiv: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D D'
η:= unit_over_id isEquiv: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D')
  (disp_functor_composite FF GG)
ε:= counit_over_id isEquiv: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite GG FF)
  (disp_functor_identity D)
x: C
xx: D x
Gepsxxx:= ♯ GG (ε x xx): GG (functor_identity C x)
  (disp_functor_composite GG FF x xx) -->[
(# (functor_identity C))%cat
  (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C) x)] 
GG (functor_identity C x)
  (disp_functor_identity D x xx)
EE: identity x =
identity x · (identity x · identity x)
XR:= @z_iso_disp_precomp: ∏ (C : category) (D : disp_cat C) 
(x y : C) (f : z_iso x y) 
(xx : D x) (yy : D y) (ff : z_iso_disp f xx yy)
(y' : C) (f' : C ⟦ y, y' ⟧) 
(yy' : D y'),
isweq (λ ff' : yy -->[ f'] yy', pr1 ff ;; ff')
etaGxxx:= η (functor_identity C x) (GG x xx): disp_functor_identity D'
  (functor_identity C x) 
  (GG x xx) -->[
nat_trans_id (functor_identity C)
  (functor_identity C x)] 
disp_functor_composite FF GG
  (functor_identity C x) 
  (GG x xx)
Ge:= make_z_iso_disp etaGxxx
  (is_z_iso_disp_independent_of_is_z_iso
     (identity_z_iso
        (functor_identity C (functor_identity C x)))
     etaGxxx
     (is_z_iso_unit_over_id 
        (pr2 isEquiv) (functor_identity C x)
        (GG x xx))): z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso x) 
  (GG x xx)
  (GG (functor_identity C (functor_identity C x))
     (FF (functor_identity C x) (GG x xx)))
E:= transportf
  (mor_disp
     (GG x
        (disp_functor_composite
           (pr1 (pr2 (pr1 isEquiv)))
           (pr1 (pr1 isEquiv)) x xx)) 
     (GG x xx)) EE
  (inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
     (is_z_iso_unit_over_id 
        (pr2 isEquiv) x 
        (GG x xx))): GG x
  (disp_functor_composite
     (pr1 (pr2 (pr1 isEquiv))) 
     (pr1 (pr1 isEquiv)) x xx) -->[
identity x · (identity x · identity x)] 
GG x xx
E =
♯ GG (ε x xx) ;; transportb
                   (mor_disp (GG x xx) (GG x xx))
                   (id_left (identity x))
                   (id_disp (GG x xx))
 
C: category
D', D: disp_cat C
FF: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D' D
isEquiv: is_equiv_over_id FF
GG:= isEquiv: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D D'
η:= unit_over_id isEquiv: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D')
  (disp_functor_composite FF GG)
ε:= counit_over_id isEquiv: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite GG FF)
  (disp_functor_identity D)
x: C
xx: D x
Gepsxxx:= ♯ GG (ε x xx): GG (functor_identity C x)
  (disp_functor_composite GG FF x xx) -->[
(# (functor_identity C))%cat
  (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C) x)] 
GG (functor_identity C x)
  (disp_functor_identity D x xx)
EE: identity x =
identity x · (identity x · identity x)
XR:= @z_iso_disp_precomp: ∏ (C : category) (D : disp_cat C) 
(x y : C) (f : z_iso x y) 
(xx : D x) (yy : D y) (ff : z_iso_disp f xx yy)
(y' : C) (f' : C ⟦ y, y' ⟧) 
(yy' : D y'),
isweq (λ ff' : yy -->[ f'] yy', pr1 ff ;; ff')
etaGxxx:= η (functor_identity C x) (GG x xx): disp_functor_identity D'
  (functor_identity C x) 
  (GG x xx) -->[
nat_trans_id (functor_identity C)
  (functor_identity C x)] 
disp_functor_composite FF GG
  (functor_identity C x) 
  (GG x xx)
Ge:= make_z_iso_disp etaGxxx
  (is_z_iso_disp_independent_of_is_z_iso
     (identity_z_iso
        (functor_identity C (functor_identity C x)))
     etaGxxx
     (is_z_iso_unit_over_id 
        (pr2 isEquiv) (functor_identity C x)
        (GG x xx))): z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso x) 
  (GG x xx)
  (GG (functor_identity C (functor_identity C x))
     (FF (functor_identity C x) (GG x xx)))
E:= transportf
  (mor_disp (GG x (FF x (pr1 (pr1 isEquiv) x xx)))
     (GG x xx)) EE
  (inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
     (is_z_iso_unit_over_id 
        (pr2 isEquiv) x 
        (GG x xx))): GG x (FF x (pr1 (pr1 isEquiv) x xx)) -->[
identity x · (identity x · identity x)] 
GG x xx
E =
♯ GG (ε x xx) ;; transportb
                   (mor_disp (GG x xx) (GG x xx))
                   (id_left (identity x))
                   (id_disp (GG x xx))

        
C: category
D', D: disp_cat C
FF: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D' D
isEquiv: is_equiv_over_id FF
GG:= isEquiv: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D D'
η:= unit_over_id isEquiv: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D')
  (disp_functor_composite FF GG)
ε:= counit_over_id isEquiv: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite GG FF)
  (disp_functor_identity D)
x: C
xx: D x
Gepsxxx:= ♯ GG (ε x xx): GG (functor_identity C x)
  (disp_functor_composite GG FF x xx) -->[
(# (functor_identity C))%cat
  (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C) x)] 
GG (functor_identity C x)
  (disp_functor_identity D x xx)
EE: identity x =
identity x · (identity x · identity x)
etaGxxx:= η (functor_identity C x) (GG x xx): disp_functor_identity D'
  (functor_identity C x) 
  (GG x xx) -->[
nat_trans_id (functor_identity C)
  (functor_identity C x)] 
disp_functor_composite FF GG
  (functor_identity C x) 
  (GG x xx)
Ge:= make_z_iso_disp etaGxxx
  (is_z_iso_disp_independent_of_is_z_iso
     (identity_z_iso
        (functor_identity C (functor_identity C x)))
     etaGxxx
     (is_z_iso_unit_over_id 
        (pr2 isEquiv) (functor_identity C x)
        (GG x xx))): z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso x) 
  (GG x xx)
  (GG (functor_identity C (functor_identity C x))
     (FF (functor_identity C x) (GG x xx)))
XR: ∏ (y' : C) (f' : C ⟦ x, y' ⟧) 
(yy' : D' y'),
isweq
  (λ ff' : GG
             (functor_identity C
                (functor_identity C x))
             (FF (functor_identity C x) (GG x xx)) -->[
           f'] yy', pr1 Ge ;; ff')
E:= transportf
  (mor_disp (GG x (FF x (pr1 (pr1 isEquiv) x xx)))
     (GG x xx)) EE
  (inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
     (is_z_iso_unit_over_id 
        (pr2 isEquiv) x 
        (GG x xx))): GG x (FF x (pr1 (pr1 isEquiv) x xx)) -->[
identity x · (identity x · identity x)] 
GG x xx
E =
♯ GG (ε x xx) ;; transportb
                   (mor_disp (GG x xx) (GG x xx))
                   (id_left (identity x))
                   (id_disp (GG x xx))

  (disp_functor_identity D')
  (disp_functor_composite FF GG)
ε:= counit_over_id isEquiv: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite GG FF)
  (disp_functor_identity D)
x: C
xx: D x

identity x · (identity x · identity x)
η (functor_identity C x) (GG x xx) ;; transportf
                                        (mor_disp
                                           (GG x
                                              (FF x
                                                 (pr1
                                                 (pr1
                                                 isEquiv)
                                                 x xx)))
                                           (GG x xx))
                                        EE
                                        (inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
                                           (is_z_iso_unit_over_id
                                              (pr2
                                                 isEquiv)
                                              x
                                              (GG x xx))) =
?b
C: category
D', D: disp_cat C
FF: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D' D
isEquiv: is_equiv_over_id FF
GG:= isEquiv: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D D'
η:= unit_over_id isEquiv: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D')
  (disp_functor_composite FF GG)
ε:= counit_over_id isEquiv: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite GG FF)
  (disp_functor_identity D)
x: C
xx: D x
EE: identity x =
identity x · (identity x · identity x)
?b =
η (functor_identity C x) (GG x xx) ;; 
(♯ GG (ε x xx) ;; transportb
                    (mor_disp (GG x xx) (GG x xx))
                    (id_left (identity x))
                    (id_disp (GG x xx)))
 
C: category
D', D: disp_cat C
FF: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D' D
isEquiv: is_equiv_over_id FF
GG:= isEquiv: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D D'
η:= unit_over_id isEquiv: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D')
  (disp_functor_composite FF GG)
ε:= counit_over_id isEquiv: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite GG FF)
  (disp_functor_identity D)
x: C
xx: D x
EE: identity x =
identity x · (identity x · identity x)
transportf (mor_disp (GG x xx) (GG x xx))
  (maponpaths (compose (identity x)) EE)
  (η (functor_identity C x) (GG x xx) ;; inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
                                           (is_z_iso_unit_over_id
                                              (pr2
                                                 isEquiv)
                                              x
                                              (GG x xx))) =
η (functor_identity C x) (GG x xx) ;; (♯ GG (ε x xx) ;; 
                                       transportb
                                         (mor_disp
                                            (GG x xx)
                                            (GG x xx))
                                         (id_left
                                            (identity
                                               x))
                                         (id_disp
                                            (GG x xx)))

        
C: category
D', D: disp_cat C
FF: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D' D
isEquiv: is_equiv_over_id FF
GG:= isEquiv: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D D'
η:= unit_over_id isEquiv: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D')
  (disp_functor_composite FF GG)
ε:= counit_over_id isEquiv: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite GG FF)
  (disp_functor_identity D)
x: C
xx: D x
EE: identity x =
identity x · (identity x · identity x)
transportf (mor_disp (GG x xx) (GG x xx))
  (maponpaths (compose (identity x)) EE)
  (η (functor_identity C x) (GG x xx) ;; inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
                                           (is_z_iso_unit_over_id
                                              (pr2
                                                 isEquiv)
                                              x
                                              (GG x xx))) =
?b
C: category
D', D: disp_cat C
FF: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D' D
isEquiv: is_equiv_over_id FF
GG:= isEquiv: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D D'
η:= unit_over_id isEquiv: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D')
  (disp_functor_composite FF GG)
ε:= counit_over_id isEquiv: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite GG FF)
  (disp_functor_identity D)
x: C
xx: D x
EE: identity x =
identity x · (identity x · identity x)
?b =
η (functor_identity C x) (GG x xx) ;; 
(♯ GG (ε x xx) ;; transportb
                    (mor_disp (GG x xx) (GG x xx))
                    (id_left (identity x))
                    (id_disp (GG x xx)))
 
C: category
D', D: disp_cat C
FF: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D' D
isEquiv: is_equiv_over_id FF
GG:= isEquiv: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D D'
η:= unit_over_id isEquiv: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D')
  (disp_functor_composite FF GG)
ε:= counit_over_id isEquiv: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite GG FF)
  (disp_functor_identity D)
x: C
xx: D x
EE: identity x =
identity x · (identity x · identity x)
η (functor_identity C x) (GG x xx) ;; inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
                                        (is_z_iso_unit_over_id
                                           (pr2
                                              isEquiv)
                                           x (GG x xx)) =
?t2
C: category
D', D: disp_cat C
FF: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D' D
isEquiv: is_equiv_over_id FF
GG:= isEquiv: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D D'
η:= unit_over_id isEquiv: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D')
  (disp_functor_composite FF GG)
ε:= counit_over_id isEquiv: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite GG FF)
  (disp_functor_identity D)
x: C
xx: D x
EE: identity x =
identity x · (identity x · identity x)
transportf (mor_disp (GG x xx) (GG x xx))
  (maponpaths (compose (identity x)) EE) 
  ?t2 =
η (functor_identity C x) (GG x xx) ;; 
(♯ GG (ε x xx) ;; transportb
                    (mor_disp (GG x xx) (GG x xx))
                    (id_left (identity x))
                    (id_disp (GG x xx)))

           
C: category
D', D: disp_cat C
FF: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D' D
isEquiv: is_equiv_over_id FF
GG:= isEquiv: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D D'
η:= unit_over_id isEquiv: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D')
  (disp_functor_composite FF GG)
ε:= counit_over_id isEquiv: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite GG FF)
  (disp_functor_identity D)
x: C
xx: D x
EE: identity x =
identity x · (identity x · identity x)
transportf (mor_disp (GG x xx) (GG x xx))
  (maponpaths (compose (identity x)) EE)
  (transportb
     (mor_disp
        (disp_functor_identity D' x (pr1 GG x xx))
        (disp_functor_identity D' x (pr1 GG x xx)))
     (z_iso_inv_after_z_iso
        (identity_z_iso (functor_identity C x)))
     (id_disp
        (disp_functor_identity D' x (pr1 GG x xx)))) =
η (functor_identity C x) (GG x xx) ;; (♯ GG (ε x xx) ;; 
                                       transportb
                                         (mor_disp
                                            (GG x xx)
                                            (GG x xx))
                                         (id_left
                                            (identity
                                               x))
                                         (id_disp
                                            (GG x xx)))

C: category
D', D: disp_cat C
FF: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D' D
isEquiv: is_equiv_over_id FF
GG:= isEquiv: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D D'
η:= unit_over_id isEquiv: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D')
  (disp_functor_composite FF GG)
ε:= counit_over_id isEquiv: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite GG FF)
  (disp_functor_identity D)
x: C
xx: D x
EE: identity x =
identity x · (identity x · identity x)
transportf
  (mor_disp (disp_functor_identity D' x (pr1 GG x xx))
     (disp_functor_identity D' x (pr1 GG x xx)))
  (! z_iso_inv_after_z_iso
       (identity_z_iso (functor_identity C x)) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x)) EE)
  (id_disp (disp_functor_identity D' x (pr1 GG x xx))) =
η (functor_identity C x) (GG x xx) ;; (♯ GG (ε x xx) ;; 
                                       transportb
                                         (mor_disp
                                            (GG x xx)
                                            (GG x xx))
                                         (id_left
                                            (identity
                                               x))
                                         (id_disp
                                            (GG x xx)))

   maponpaths (compose (identity x)) EE)
  (id_disp (disp_functor_identity D' x (pr1 GG x xx)))

xx: D x

η (functor_identity C x) (GG x xx) ;; 
?t2 =

     (disp_functor_identity D' x (pr1 GG x xx)))
  (! z_iso_inv_after_z_iso

C: category
D', D: disp_cat C
FF: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D' D
isEquiv: is_equiv_over_id FF
GG:= isEquiv: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D D'
η:= unit_over_id isEquiv: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D')
  (disp_functor_composite FF GG)
ε:= counit_over_id isEquiv: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite GG FF)
  (disp_functor_identity D)
x: C
xx: D x
EE: identity x =
identity x · (identity x · identity x)
η (functor_identity C x) (GG x xx) ;; transportf
                                        (mor_disp
                                           (GG x
                                              (FF x
                                                 (GG x
                                                 xx)))
                                           (GG x xx))
                                        (maponpaths
                                           (compose
                                              (identity
                                                 x))
                                           (! id_left
                                                (identity
                                                 x)))
                                        (♯ GG (ε x xx) ;; 
                                         id_disp
                                           (GG x xx)) =
transportf
  (mor_disp (disp_functor_identity D' x (pr1 GG x xx))
     (disp_functor_identity D' x (pr1 GG x xx)))
  (! z_iso_inv_after_z_iso
       (identity_z_iso (functor_identity C x)) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x)) EE)
  (id_disp (disp_functor_identity D' x (pr1 GG x xx)))

C: category
D', D: disp_cat C
FF: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D' D
isEquiv: is_equiv_over_id FF
GG:= isEquiv: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D D'
η:= unit_over_id isEquiv: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D')
  (disp_functor_composite FF GG)
ε:= counit_over_id isEquiv: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite GG FF)
  (disp_functor_identity D)
x: C
xx: D x
EE: identity x =
identity x · (identity x · identity x)
transportf (mor_disp (GG x xx) (GG x xx))
  (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (! id_left (identity x))))
  (η (functor_identity C x) (GG x xx) ;; (♯ GG
                                            (ε x xx) ;; 
                                          id_disp
                                            (GG x xx))) =
transportf
  (mor_disp (disp_functor_identity D' x (pr1 GG x xx))
     (disp_functor_identity D' x (pr1 GG x xx)))
  (! z_iso_inv_after_z_iso
       (identity_z_iso (functor_identity C x)) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x)) EE)
  (id_disp (disp_functor_identity D' x (pr1 GG x xx)))

C: category
D', D: disp_cat C
FF: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D' D
isEquiv: is_equiv_over_id FF
GG:= isEquiv: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D D'
η:= unit_over_id isEquiv: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D')
  (disp_functor_composite FF GG)
ε:= counit_over_id isEquiv: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite GG FF)
  (disp_functor_identity D)
x: C
xx: D x
EE: identity x =
identity x · (identity x · identity x)
transportf (mor_disp (GG x xx) (GG x xx))
  (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (! id_left (identity x))))
  (η (functor_identity C x) (GG x xx) ;; ?t2) =
transportf
  (mor_disp (disp_functor_identity D' x (pr1 GG x xx))
     (disp_functor_identity D' x (pr1 GG x xx)))
  (! z_iso_inv_after_z_iso
       (identity_z_iso (functor_identity C x)) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x)) EE)
  (id_disp (disp_functor_identity D' x (pr1 GG x xx)))
 
C: category
D', D: disp_cat C
FF: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D' D
isEquiv: is_equiv_over_id FF
GG:= isEquiv: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D D'
η:= unit_over_id isEquiv: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D')
  (disp_functor_composite FF GG)
ε:= counit_over_id isEquiv: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite GG FF)
  (disp_functor_identity D)
x: C
xx: D x
EE: identity x =
identity x · (identity x · identity x)
transportf (mor_disp (GG x xx) (GG x xx))
  (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (! id_left (identity x))))
  (η (functor_identity C x) (GG x xx) ;; transportb
                                           (mor_disp
                                              (GG x
                                                 (FF x
                                                 (GG x
                                                 xx)))
                                              (GG x xx))
                                           (id_right
                                              (identity
                                                 x))
                                           (♯ GG
                                              (ε x xx))) =
transportf
  (mor_disp (disp_functor_identity D' x (pr1 GG x xx))
     (disp_functor_identity D' x (pr1 GG x xx)))
  (! z_iso_inv_after_z_iso
       (identity_z_iso (functor_identity C x)) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x)) EE)
  (id_disp (disp_functor_identity D' x (pr1 GG x xx)))

  (disp_functor_identity D')

transportf (mor_disp (GG x xx) (GG x xx))
  (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (! id_right (identity x)) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (! id_left (identity x))))
  (transportb
     (mor_disp
        (disp_functor_identity D'
           (functor_identity C x)
           (right_adj_over_id isEquiv x xx))
        (disp_functor_identity D'
           (functor_identity C x)
           (right_adj_over_id isEquiv x xx)))
     (id_left
        (identity

           (functor_identity C x)
           (right_adj_over_id isEquiv x xx)))) =
transportf
  (mor_disp (disp_functor_identity D' x (pr1 GG x xx))
     (disp_functor_identity D' x (pr1 GG x xx)))
  (! z_iso_inv_after_z_iso

  (disp_functor_identity D')
  (disp_functor_composite FF GG)
ε:= counit_over_id isEquiv: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite GG FF)
  (disp_functor_identity D)
x: C
xx: D x
EE: identity x =
identity x · (identity x · identity x)
XR:= triangle_2_over_id
  (adjunction_of_right_adjoint_over_id isEquiv): triangle_2_statement_over_id isEquiv
?b =
transportf
  (mor_disp (disp_functor_identity D' x (pr1 GG x xx))
     (disp_functor_identity D' x (pr1 GG x xx)))
  (! z_iso_inv_after_z_iso
       (identity_z_iso (functor_identity C x)) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x)) EE)
  (id_disp (disp_functor_identity D' x (pr1 GG x xx)))
 
C: category
D', D: disp_cat C
FF: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D' D
isEquiv: is_equiv_over_id FF
GG:= isEquiv: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D D'
η:= unit_over_id isEquiv: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D')
  (disp_functor_composite FF GG)
ε:= counit_over_id isEquiv: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite GG FF)
  (disp_functor_identity D)
x: C
xx: D x
EE: identity x =
identity x · (identity x · identity x)
XR:= triangle_2_over_id
  (adjunction_of_right_adjoint_over_id isEquiv): triangle_2_statement_over_id isEquiv
transportf
  (mor_disp
     (disp_functor_identity D' (functor_identity C x)
        (right_adj_over_id isEquiv x xx))
     (disp_functor_identity D' (functor_identity C x)
        (right_adj_over_id isEquiv x xx)))
  (! id_left
       (identity
          (functor_identity C (functor_identity C x))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (! id_right (identity x)) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (! id_left (identity x))))
  (id_disp
     (disp_functor_identity D' (functor_identity C x)
        (right_adj_over_id isEquiv x xx))) =
transportf
  (mor_disp (disp_functor_identity D' x (pr1 GG x xx))
     (disp_functor_identity D' x (pr1 GG x xx)))
  (! z_iso_inv_after_z_iso
       (identity_z_iso (functor_identity C x)) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x)) EE)
  (id_disp (disp_functor_identity D' x (pr1 GG x xx)))

        
C: category
D', D: disp_cat C
FF: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D' D
isEquiv: is_equiv_over_id FF
GG:= isEquiv: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D D'
η:= unit_over_id isEquiv: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D')
  (disp_functor_composite FF GG)
ε:= counit_over_id isEquiv: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite GG FF)
  (disp_functor_identity D)
x: C
xx: D x
EE: identity x =
identity x · (identity x · identity x)
XR:= triangle_2_over_id
  (adjunction_of_right_adjoint_over_id isEquiv): triangle_2_statement_over_id isEquiv
! id_left
    (identity
       (functor_identity C (functor_identity C x))) @
maponpaths (compose (identity x))
  (! id_right (identity x)) @
maponpaths (compose (identity x))
  (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (! id_left (identity x))) =
! z_iso_inv_after_z_iso
    (identity_z_iso (functor_identity C x)) @
maponpaths (compose (identity x)) EE

        apply homset_property.
Qed.


C: category
D', D: disp_cat C
FF: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D' D
isEquiv: is_equiv_over_id FF
GG:= isEquiv: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D D'
η:= unit_over_id isEquiv: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D')
  (disp_functor_composite FF GG)
ε:= counit_over_id isEquiv: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite GG FF)
  (disp_functor_identity D)
triangle_2_statement_over_id inv_adjunction_data


C: category
D', D: disp_cat C
FF: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D' D
isEquiv: is_equiv_over_id FF
GG:= isEquiv: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D D'
η:= unit_over_id isEquiv: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D')
  (disp_functor_composite FF GG)
ε:= counit_over_id isEquiv: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite GG FF)
  (disp_functor_identity D)
triangle_2_statement_over_id inv_adjunction_data

  
C: category
D', D: disp_cat C
FF: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D' D
isEquiv: is_equiv_over_id FF
GG:= isEquiv: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D D'
η:= unit_over_id isEquiv: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D')
  (disp_functor_composite FF GG)
ε:= counit_over_id isEquiv: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite GG FF)
  (disp_functor_identity D)
form_equiv_over_id inv_adjunction_data
C: category
D', D: disp_cat C
FF: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D' D
isEquiv: is_equiv_over_id FF
GG:= isEquiv: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D D'
η:= unit_over_id isEquiv: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D')
  (disp_functor_composite FF GG)
ε:= counit_over_id isEquiv: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite GG FF)
  (disp_functor_identity D)
triangle_1_statement_over_id inv_adjunction_data

  
C: category
D', D: disp_cat C
FF: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D' D
isEquiv: is_equiv_over_id FF
GG:= isEquiv: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D D'
η:= unit_over_id isEquiv: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D')
  (disp_functor_composite FF GG)
ε:= counit_over_id isEquiv: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite GG FF)
  (disp_functor_identity D)
form_equiv_over_id inv_adjunction_data
 apply form_equiv_inv_adjunction_data.
  
C: category
D', D: disp_cat C
FF: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D' D
isEquiv: is_equiv_over_id FF
GG:= isEquiv: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D D'
η:= unit_over_id isEquiv: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D')
  (disp_functor_composite FF GG)
ε:= counit_over_id isEquiv: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite GG FF)
  (disp_functor_identity D)
triangle_1_statement_over_id inv_adjunction_data
 apply inv_triangle_1_statement_over_id.
Qed.



C: category
D', D: disp_cat C
FF: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D' D
isEquiv: is_equiv_over_id FF
GG:= isEquiv: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D D'
η:= unit_over_id isEquiv: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D')
  (disp_functor_composite FF GG)
ε:= counit_over_id isEquiv: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite GG FF)
  (disp_functor_identity D)
is_equiv_over_id GG


C: category
D', D: disp_cat C
FF: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D' D
isEquiv: is_equiv_over_id FF
GG:= isEquiv: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D D'

  (disp_functor_identity D')
  (disp_functor_composite FF GG)

  (disp_functor_composite GG FF)

C: category

isEquiv: is_equiv_over_id FF
GG:= isEquiv: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D D'
η:= unit_over_id isEquiv: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D')
  (disp_functor_composite FF GG)
ε:= counit_over_id isEquiv: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite GG FF)
  (disp_functor_identity D)
right_adjoint_over_id GG
C: category
D', D: disp_cat C
FF: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D' D
isEquiv: is_equiv_over_id FF
GG:= isEquiv: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D D'
η:= unit_over_id isEquiv: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D')
  (disp_functor_composite FF GG)
ε:= counit_over_id isEquiv: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite GG FF)
  (disp_functor_identity D)
(λ GG0 : right_adjoint_over_id GG,
 form_equiv_over_id GG0) 
  ?pr1

  
C: category
D', D: disp_cat C
FF: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D' D
isEquiv: is_equiv_over_id FF
GG:= isEquiv: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D D'

  (disp_functor_identity D')
  (disp_functor_composite FF GG)
ε:= counit_over_id isEquiv: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite GG FF)

right_adjoint_over_id GG
 
C: category
D', D: disp_cat C
FF: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D' D

  (disp_functor_identity D')
