ε:= counit_over_id isEquiv: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite GG FF)
  (disp_functor_identity D)
right_adjoint_over_id_data GG
C: category
D', D: disp_cat C
FF: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D' D
isEquiv: is_equiv_over_id FF
GG:= isEquiv: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D D'
η:= unit_over_id isEquiv: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D')
  (disp_functor_composite FF GG)
ε:= counit_over_id isEquiv: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite GG FF)
  (disp_functor_identity D)
(λ GG0 : right_adjoint_over_id_data GG,
 form_disp_adjunction_id GG0) 
  ?pr1

    
C: category
D', D: disp_cat C
FF: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D' D
isEquiv: is_equiv_over_id FF
GG:= isEquiv: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D D'
η:= unit_over_id isEquiv: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D')
  (disp_functor_composite FF GG)
ε:= counit_over_id isEquiv: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite GG FF)
  (disp_functor_identity D)
right_adjoint_over_id_data GG
 exact (FF,, (η_inv,, ε_inv)).
    
C: category
D', D: disp_cat C
FF: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D' D
isEquiv: is_equiv_over_id FF
GG:= isEquiv: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D D'
η:= unit_over_id isEquiv: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D')
  (disp_functor_composite FF GG)
ε:= counit_over_id isEquiv: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite GG FF)
  (disp_functor_identity D)
(λ GG0 : right_adjoint_over_id_data GG,
 form_disp_adjunction_id GG0) (FF,, η_inv,, ε_inv)
 
C: category
D', D: disp_cat C
FF: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D' D
isEquiv: is_equiv_over_id FF
GG:= isEquiv: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D D'
η:= unit_over_id isEquiv: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D')
  (disp_functor_composite FF GG)
ε:= counit_over_id isEquiv: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite GG FF)
  (disp_functor_identity D)
triangle_1_statement_over_id (FF,, η_inv,, ε_inv)
C: category
D', D: disp_cat C
FF: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D' D
isEquiv: is_equiv_over_id FF
GG:= isEquiv: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D D'
η:= unit_over_id isEquiv: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D')
  (disp_functor_composite FF GG)
ε:= counit_over_id isEquiv: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite GG FF)
  (disp_functor_identity D)
(λ _ : triangle_1_statement_over_id
         (FF,, η_inv,, ε_inv),
 triangle_2_statement_over_id (FF,, η_inv,, ε_inv))
  ?pr1
 
C: category
D', D: disp_cat C
FF: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D' D
isEquiv: is_equiv_over_id FF
GG:= isEquiv: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D D'
η:= unit_over_id isEquiv: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D')
  (disp_functor_composite FF GG)
ε:= counit_over_id isEquiv: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite GG FF)
  (disp_functor_identity D)
triangle_1_statement_over_id (FF,, η_inv,, ε_inv)
C: category
D', D: disp_cat C
FF: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D' D
isEquiv: is_equiv_over_id FF
GG:= isEquiv: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D D'
η:= unit_over_id isEquiv: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D')
  (disp_functor_composite FF GG)
ε:= counit_over_id isEquiv: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite GG FF)
  (disp_functor_identity D)
(λ _ : triangle_1_statement_over_id
         (FF,, η_inv,, ε_inv),
 triangle_2_statement_over_id (FF,, η_inv,, ε_inv))
  (?Goal
   :
   triangle_1_statement_over_id (FF,, η_inv,, ε_inv))
 
C: category
D', D: disp_cat C
FF: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D' D
isEquiv: is_equiv_over_id FF
GG:= isEquiv: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D D'
η:= unit_over_id isEquiv: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D')
  (disp_functor_composite FF GG)
ε:= counit_over_id isEquiv: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite GG FF)
  (disp_functor_identity D)
(λ _ : triangle_1_statement_over_id
         (FF,, η_inv,, ε_inv),
 triangle_2_statement_over_id (FF,, η_inv,, ε_inv))
  (inv_triangle_1_statement_over_id
   :
   triangle_1_statement_over_id (FF,, η_inv,, ε_inv))

      apply inv_triangle_2_statement_over_id.
  
C: category
D', D: disp_cat C
FF: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D' D
isEquiv: is_equiv_over_id FF
GG:= isEquiv: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D D'
η:= unit_over_id isEquiv: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D')
  (disp_functor_composite FF GG)
ε:= counit_over_id isEquiv: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite GG FF)
  (disp_functor_identity D)
(λ GG0 : right_adjoint_over_id GG,
 form_equiv_over_id GG0)
  ((FF,, η_inv,, ε_inv),,
   (inv_triangle_1_statement_over_id
    :
    triangle_1_statement_over_id (FF,, η_inv,, ε_inv)),,
   inv_triangle_2_statement_over_id)
 apply form_equiv_inv_adjunction_data.
Defined.

End Displayed_Equiv_Inv.

Section Displayed_Equiv_Compose.

(* TODO: give composites of displayed equivalences. *)

End Displayed_Equiv_Compose.

(** ** Induced adjunctions/equivalences of fiber precats *)
Section Equiv_Fibers.

Context {C : category}.


C: category
D, D': disp_cat C
FF: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D D'
EFF: right_adjoint_over_id FF
c: C
is_left_adjoint (fiber_functor FF c)


C: category
D, D': disp_cat C
FF: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D D'
EFF: right_adjoint_over_id FF
c: C
is_left_adjoint (fiber_functor FF c)

  
C: category
D, D': disp_cat C
FF: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D D'
GG: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D' D
η: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D)
  (disp_functor_composite FF GG)
ε: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite GG FF)
  (disp_functor_identity D')
axs: form_disp_adjunction_id (GG,, η,, ε)
c: C
is_left_adjoint (fiber_functor FF c)

  
C: category
D, D': disp_cat C
FF: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D D'
GG: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D' D
η: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D)
  (disp_functor_composite FF GG)
ε: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite GG FF)
  (disp_functor_identity D')
axs: form_disp_adjunction_id (GG,, η,, ε)
c: C
are_adjoints (fiber_functor FF c)
  (fiber_functor GG (functor_identity C c))

  
C: category
D, D': disp_cat C
FF: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D D'
GG: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D' D
η: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D)
  (disp_functor_composite FF GG)
ε: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite GG FF)
  (disp_functor_identity D')
axs: form_disp_adjunction_id (GG,, η,, ε)
c: C
form_adjunction (fiber_functor FF c)
  (fiber_functor GG (functor_identity C c))
  (pr1
     (fiber_nat_trans η c,,
      fiber_nat_trans ε (functor_identity C c)))
  (pr2
     (fiber_nat_trans η c,,
      fiber_nat_trans ε (functor_identity C c)))

  
C: category
D, D': disp_cat C
FF: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D D'
GG: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D' D
η: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D)
  (disp_functor_composite FF GG)
ε: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite GG FF)
  (disp_functor_identity D')
axs: form_disp_adjunction_id (GG,, η,, ε)
c: C
triangle_1_statement
  (fiber_functor FF c,,
   fiber_functor GG c,,
   fiber_nat_trans η c,, fiber_nat_trans ε c)
C: category
D, D': disp_cat C
FF: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D D'
GG: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D' D
η: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D)
  (disp_functor_composite FF GG)
ε: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite GG FF)
  (disp_functor_identity D')
axs: form_disp_adjunction_id (GG,, η,, ε)
c: C
triangle_2_statement
  (fiber_functor FF c,,
   fiber_functor GG c,,
   fiber_nat_trans η c,, fiber_nat_trans ε c)

  
C: category
D, D': disp_cat C
FF: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D D'
GG: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D' D
η: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D)
  (disp_functor_composite FF GG)
ε: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite GG FF)
  (disp_functor_identity D')
axs: form_disp_adjunction_id (GG,, η,, ε)
c: C
triangle_1_statement
  (fiber_functor FF c,,
   fiber_functor GG c,,
   fiber_nat_trans η c,, fiber_nat_trans ε c)
 
C: category
D, D': disp_cat C
FF: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D D'
GG: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D' D
η: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D)
  (disp_functor_composite FF GG)
ε: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite GG FF)
  (disp_functor_identity D')
axs: form_disp_adjunction_id (GG,, η,, ε)
c: C
∏ a : D[{c}],
(# (left_functor
      (fiber_functor FF c,,
       fiber_functor GG c,,
       fiber_nat_trans η c,, fiber_nat_trans ε c)))%cat
  (adjunit
     (fiber_functor FF c,,
      fiber_functor GG c,,
      fiber_nat_trans η c,, fiber_nat_trans ε c) a)
· adjcounit
    (fiber_functor FF c,,
     fiber_functor GG c,,
     fiber_nat_trans η c,, fiber_nat_trans ε c)
    (left_functor
       (fiber_functor FF c,,
        fiber_functor GG c,,
        fiber_nat_trans η c,, fiber_nat_trans ε c) a) =
identity
  (left_functor
     (fiber_functor FF c,,
      fiber_functor GG c,,
      fiber_nat_trans η c,, fiber_nat_trans ε c) a)

    
C: category
D, D': disp_cat C
FF: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D D'
GG: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D' D
η: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D)
  (disp_functor_composite FF GG)
ε: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite GG FF)
  (disp_functor_identity D')
axs: form_disp_adjunction_id (GG,, η,, ε)
c: C
d: D[{c}]
transportf (mor_disp (FF c d) (FF c d))
  (id_right (identity c))
  (♯ FF (η c d) ;; ε c (FF c d)) = id_disp (FF c d)

    
C: category
D, D': disp_cat C
FF: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D D'
GG: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D' D
η: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D)
  (disp_functor_composite FF GG)
ε: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite GG FF)
  (disp_functor_identity D')
c: C
d: D[{c}]
thisax: ♯ (GG,, η,, ε)
  (unit_over_id (GG,, η,, ε) c d) ;; 
counit_over_id (GG,, η,, ε)
  (functor_identity C c) 
  ((GG,, η,, ε) c d) =
transportb
  (mor_disp
     ((GG,, η,, ε) (functor_identity C c)
        (disp_functor_identity D c d))
     ((GG,, η,, ε) (functor_identity C c)
        (disp_functor_identity D c d)))
  (id_left
     (identity
        (functor_identity C
           (functor_identity C c))))
  (id_disp
     ((GG,, η,, ε) (functor_identity C c)
        (disp_functor_identity D c d)))
transportf (mor_disp (FF c d) (FF c d))
  (id_right (identity c))
  (♯ FF (η c d) ;; ε c (FF c d)) = id_disp (FF c d)

C: category
D, D': disp_cat C
FF: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D D'

  (disp_functor_composite GG FF)
  (disp_functor_identity D')
c: C
d: D[{c}]
thisax: ♯ (GG,, η,, ε)
  (unit_over_id (GG,, η,, ε) c d) ;; 
counit_over_id (GG,, η,, ε)
  (functor_identity C c) 
  ((GG,, η,, ε) c d) =
transportb
  (mor_disp
     ((GG,, η,, ε) (functor_identity C c)
        (disp_functor_identity D c d))
     ((GG,, η,, ε) (functor_identity C c)
        (disp_functor_identity D c d)))
  (id_left

  (id_disp
     ((GG,, η,, ε) (functor_identity C c)
        (disp_functor_identity D c d)))

        (disp_functor_identity D c d))
     ((GG,, η,, ε) (functor_identity C c)
        (disp_functor_identity D c d)))
  (! id_left
       (identity
          (functor_identity C (functor_identity C c))) @
   id_right (identity c))
  (id_disp
     ((GG,, η,, ε) (functor_identity C c)
        (disp_functor_identity D c d))) =
id_disp (FF c d)

d: D[{c}]
thisax: ♯ (GG,, η,, ε)
  (unit_over_id (GG,, η,, ε) c d) ;;

  (functor_identity C c)

        (disp_functor_identity D c d)))
! id_left
    (identity
       (functor_identity C (functor_identity C c))) @
id_right (identity c) =

     (functor_identity C (functor_identity C c)))

    apply homset_property.
  
C: category
D, D': disp_cat C
FF: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D D'
GG: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D' D

  (disp_functor_identity D')
axs: form_disp_adjunction_id (GG,, η,, ε)

triangle_2_statement
  (fiber_functor FF c,,
   fiber_functor GG c,,
   fiber_nat_trans η c,, fiber_nat_trans ε c)
 
C: category
D, D': disp_cat C
FF: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D D'
GG: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D' D
η: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D)
  (disp_functor_composite FF GG)
ε: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite GG FF)
  (disp_functor_identity D')
axs: form_disp_adjunction_id (GG,, η,, ε)
c: C
∏ b : D'[{c}],
adjunit
  (fiber_functor FF c,,
   fiber_functor GG c,,
   fiber_nat_trans η c,, fiber_nat_trans ε c)
  (right_functor
     (fiber_functor FF c,,
      fiber_functor GG c,,
      fiber_nat_trans η c,, fiber_nat_trans ε c) b)
· (# (right_functor
        (fiber_functor FF c,,
         fiber_functor GG c,,
         fiber_nat_trans η c,, fiber_nat_trans ε c)))%cat
    (adjcounit
       (fiber_functor FF c,,
        fiber_functor GG c,,
        fiber_nat_trans η c,, fiber_nat_trans ε c) b) =
identity
  (right_functor
     (fiber_functor FF c,,
      fiber_functor GG c,,
      fiber_nat_trans η c,, fiber_nat_trans ε c) b)

D, D': disp_cat C
FF: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D D'
GG: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D' D
η: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D)
  (disp_functor_composite FF GG)
ε: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite GG FF)
  (disp_functor_identity D')
c: C
d: D'[{c}]
thisax: unit_over_id (GG,, η,, ε)
  (functor_identity C c)
  (right_adj_over_id (GG,, η,, ε) c d) ;; 
♯ (right_adj_over_id (GG,, η,, ε))
  (counit_over_id (GG,, η,, ε) c d) =
transportb
  (mor_disp
     (disp_functor_identity D
        (functor_identity C c)
        (right_adj_over_id (GG,, η,, ε) c d))
     (disp_functor_identity D
        (functor_identity C c)
        (right_adj_over_id (GG,, η,, ε) c d)))
  (id_left
     (identity
        (functor_identity C
           (functor_identity C c))))
  (id_disp
     (disp_functor_identity D
        (functor_identity C c)
        (right_adj_over_id (GG,, η,, ε) c d)))
transportf
  (mor_disp
     (disp_functor_identity D (functor_identity C c)
        (right_adj_over_id (GG,, η,, ε) c d))
     (disp_functor_identity D (functor_identity C c)
        (right_adj_over_id (GG,, η,, ε) c d)))
  (! id_left
       (identity
          (functor_identity C (functor_identity C c))) @
   id_right (identity c))
  (id_disp
     (disp_functor_identity D (functor_identity C c)
        (right_adj_over_id (GG,, η,, ε) c d))) =
id_disp (GG c d)

    
C: category
D, D': disp_cat C
FF: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D D'
GG: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D' D
η: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D)
  (disp_functor_composite FF GG)
ε: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite GG FF)
  (disp_functor_identity D')
c: C
d: D'[{c}]
thisax: unit_over_id (GG,, η,, ε)
  (functor_identity C c)
  (right_adj_over_id (GG,, η,, ε) c d) ;; 
♯ (right_adj_over_id (GG,, η,, ε))
  (counit_over_id (GG,, η,, ε) c d) =
transportb
  (mor_disp
     (disp_functor_identity D
        (functor_identity C c)
        (right_adj_over_id (GG,, η,, ε) c d))
     (disp_functor_identity D
        (functor_identity C c)
        (right_adj_over_id (GG,, η,, ε) c d)))
  (id_left
     (identity
        (functor_identity C
           (functor_identity C c))))
  (id_disp
     (disp_functor_identity D
        (functor_identity C c)
        (right_adj_over_id (GG,, η,, ε) c d)))
! id_left
    (identity
       (functor_identity C (functor_identity C c))) @
id_right (identity c) =
idpath
  (identity
     (functor_identity C (functor_identity C c)))

    apply homset_property.
Defined.


C: category
D, D': disp_cat C
FF: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D D'
EFF: is_equiv_over_id FF
c: C
adj_equivalence_of_cats (fiber_functor FF c)


C: category
D, D': disp_cat C
FF: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D D'
EFF: is_equiv_over_id FF
c: C
adj_equivalence_of_cats (fiber_functor FF c)

  
C: category
D, D': disp_cat C
FF: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D D'
EFF: is_equiv_over_id FF
c: C
forms_equivalence (fiber_is_left_adj EFF c)

  
C: category
D, D': disp_cat C
FF: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D D'
GG: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D' D
η: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D)
  (disp_functor_composite FF GG)
ε: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite GG FF)
  (disp_functor_identity D')
tris: form_disp_adjunction_id (GG,, η,, ε)
isos: form_equiv_over_id (GG,, η,, ε)
c: C
forms_equivalence
  (fiber_is_left_adj ((GG,, η,, ε),, tris) c)

  
C: category
D, D': disp_cat C
FF: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D D'
GG: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D' D
η: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D)
  (disp_functor_composite FF GG)
ε: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite GG FF)
  (disp_functor_identity D')
tris: form_disp_adjunction_id (GG,, η,, ε)
isos: form_equiv_over_id (GG,, η,, ε)
c: C
∏ a : D[{c}],
is_z_isomorphism
  (adjunit (fiber_is_left_adj ((GG,, η,, ε),, tris) c)
     a)
C: category
D, D': disp_cat C
FF: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D D'
GG: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D' D
η: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D)
  (disp_functor_composite FF GG)
ε: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite GG FF)
  (disp_functor_identity D')
tris: form_disp_adjunction_id (GG,, η,, ε)
isos: form_equiv_over_id (GG,, η,, ε)
c: C
(λ _ : ∏ a : D[{c}],
       is_z_isomorphism
         (adjunit
            (fiber_is_left_adj ((GG,, η,, ε),, tris) c)
            a),
 ∏ b : D'[{c}],
 is_z_isomorphism
   (adjcounit
      (fiber_is_left_adj ((GG,, η,, ε),, tris) c) b))
  ?pr1

  
C: category
D, D': disp_cat C
FF: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D D'
GG: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D' D
η: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D)
  (disp_functor_composite FF GG)
ε: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite GG FF)
  (disp_functor_identity D')
tris: form_disp_adjunction_id (GG,, η,, ε)
isos: form_equiv_over_id (GG,, η,, ε)
c: C
∏ a : D[{c}],
is_z_isomorphism
  (adjunit (fiber_is_left_adj ((GG,, η,, ε),, tris) c)
     a)
 
C: category
D, D': disp_cat C
FF: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D D'
GG: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D' D
η: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D)
  (disp_functor_composite FF GG)
ε: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite GG FF)
  (disp_functor_identity D')
tris: form_disp_adjunction_id (GG,, η,, ε)
isos: form_equiv_over_id (GG,, η,, ε)
c: C
d: D[{c}]
is_z_isomorphism
  (adjunit (fiber_is_left_adj ((GG,, η,, ε),, tris) c)
     d)

    
C: category
D, D': disp_cat C
FF: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D D'
GG: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D' D
η: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D)
  (disp_functor_composite FF GG)
ε: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite GG FF)
  (disp_functor_identity D')
tris: form_disp_adjunction_id (GG,, η,, ε)
isos: form_equiv_over_id (GG,, η,, ε)
c: C
d: D[{c}]
is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso c)
  (adjunit (fiber_is_left_adj ((GG,, η,, ε),, tris) c)
     d)

    apply (is_z_iso_unit_over_id isos).
  
C: category
D, D': disp_cat C
FF: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D D'
GG: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D' D
η: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D)
  (disp_functor_composite FF GG)
ε: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite GG FF)
  (disp_functor_identity D')
tris: form_disp_adjunction_id (GG,, η,, ε)
isos: form_equiv_over_id (GG,, η,, ε)
c: C
(λ _ : ∏ a : D[{c}],
       is_z_isomorphism
         (adjunit
            (fiber_is_left_adj ((GG,, η,, ε),, tris) c)
            a),
 ∏ b : D'[{c}],
 is_z_isomorphism
   (adjcounit
      (fiber_is_left_adj ((GG,, η,, ε),, tris) c) b))
  (λ d : D[{c}],
   is_z_iso_fiber_from_is_z_iso_disp
     (adjunit
        (fiber_is_left_adj ((GG,, η,, ε),, tris) c) d)
     (is_z_iso_unit_over_id isos c d))
 
C: category
D, D': disp_cat C
FF: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D D'
GG: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D' D
η: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D)
  (disp_functor_composite FF GG)
ε: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite GG FF)
  (disp_functor_identity D')
tris: form_disp_adjunction_id (GG,, η,, ε)
isos: form_equiv_over_id (GG,, η,, ε)
c: C
d: D'[{c}]
is_z_isomorphism
  (adjcounit
     (fiber_is_left_adj ((GG,, η,, ε),, tris) c) d)

    
C: category
D, D': disp_cat C
FF: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D D'
GG: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D' D
η: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D)
  (disp_functor_composite FF GG)
ε: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite GG FF)
  (disp_functor_identity D')
tris: form_disp_adjunction_id (GG,, η,, ε)
isos: form_equiv_over_id (GG,, η,, ε)
c: C
d: D'[{c}]
is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso c)
  (adjcounit
     (fiber_is_left_adj ((GG,, η,, ε),, tris) c) d)

    apply (is_z_iso_counit_over_id isos).
Defined.

End Equiv_Fibers.
